Name: Verisure
Description:
Verisure is the leading provider of peace of mind and protection to residential and small business customers across Europe and Latin America.  We deliver professionally-monitored security services  to over 6 million customers in 18 countries across Europe and Latin America, with a team of more than 30,000 colleagues.

Verisure’s brand family  includes: Securitas Direct in Spain and Portugal (*), AlertAlarm, Falck Alarms, Mediaveil, TeleAtlantic and NorAlarm to name a few! 

Our alarms are the most widely installed home security systems in Europe. A strong focus on quality and service means our customers are among the most satisfied in the industry!

GROWTH

Verisure enjoyed consistent growth over the past 35 years as a result of its highly entrepreneurial and innovative approach to business. We also continue to expand internationally.

- Strong and visionary Management Team and a robust business plan for value creation.
- We are a big company with a start-up mindset,  fast, agile and lean, merit based, high-performance and value-driven

INNOVATION

- We continuously invest more in new innovation to provide effective, intelligent and reliable security solutions.
- Offer a breakthrough product & service proposition: identify, research, develop, test & refine advanced security solutions.
- Develop exclusive hardware and software features.
- Research & Development centers in Madrid, Geneva and Malmö. 
- +1700 Technologists… and growing!

PEOPLE 

Our successful growth is dependent on our talent pipeline. Our People are our business!  We are:
- Passionate in everything we do
- Committed to making a difference
- Always Innovating 
- Winning as a Team
- With Trust & Responsibility

Name: HelloFresh
Description:
HelloFresh is on a mission to change the way people eat, forever!

From our 2011 founding in Europe’s vibrant tech hub Berlin, we’re evolving from the world’s leading meal kit company to the world's leading food solutions group. We delivered 243.3 million meals and reached 7.5 million active customers around the world in Q3 2022. 

HelloFresh Group consists of six brands that provide customers with high quality food and recipes for different meal occasions. Every ingredient needed for our meals are carefully planned, responsibly sourced and delivered to your door when it’s most convenient for you. Only HelloFresh gives you the tools to achieve something delicious every day.

Making a meal a delicious achievement - not just fuel for your day - takes a lot of work and smart people. From Designers and Copywriters to Data Scientists and DevOps Engineers, to potato farmers, pasta makers and the people who ensure every box is perfectly packed for every customer, we’re collectively disrupting the food supply chain and the multi-trillion-dollar food tech industry.

Our more than 21,000 high-performing and ambitious employees across the globe from New York to Berlin, London to Sydney and Toronto to Milan enjoy a number of benefits including flexible working arrangements, discounts on our boxes, health and well-being and learning and development programs.

We’re always looking for quality ingredients to perfect our recipe, so join us now!  https://www.hellofresh.com/careers/locations

Name: WIN Home Inspection
Description:
At WIN, we are transforming delivery of actionable insights for homeowners to help improve health, safety and quality of life while saving significantly in repair bills with preventive maintenance. We are doing so by building scalable models, investing in the cloud, data science, artificial intelligence, machine learning, and unmatched training and certification programs. That's what makes us the most innovative, fastest-growing, and #1 home inspection services company in the US year over year!

Our home is central to our mental and physical health. Home is where we build memories, grow together with our loved ones, and find comfort, safety and security. Which is why at WIN, we continue to reimagine deep insights via inspection and testing services for millions of residential and commercial facilities to bring peace of mind via actionable insights.

If you're interested in making a difference as part of our corporate team or as a franchise owner in an essential industry, we'd love to hear from you! Click here to learn more: https://lnkd.in/eRAxk_tF

Name: Livelo Brasil
Description:
Somos um time de #LoucosPorGente, que cultiva o brilho nos olhos para fazer diferente e liderar uma revolução no mercado. 

Nossa história começou em 2014, com a união entre Banco do Brasil e Bradesco. De lá pra cá, crescemos prestando um serviço de primeira, que nos enche de orgulho e nos motiva a fazer 
sempre melhor.

A Livelo é um lugar pra sonhar alto, para quem quer gerar um impacto positivo nas pessoas, nos negócios e na sociedade. Afinal, somos o maior programa de recompensas do Brasil, e conectamos mais de 54 milhões de pessoas e centenas de parceiros de resgate de recompensas e de acúmulo de pontos.

É dessa forma que a gente soma felicidade às escolhas do dia a dia, oferecendo para cada pessoa a melhor recompensa. É dessa forma que cada um de nossos #LiveloLovers faz e acontece com paixão e protagonismo, sempre de um jeito descomplicado. Simples assim!

Cuidamos muito bem da nossa cultura, com a certeza de que ela é uma das fortalezas que nos mantém entre as melhores empresas para se trabalhar do Brasil.

Nossos reconhecimentos falam por si: 1º lugar no ranking GPTW Barueri e Região, 3º lugar nacional em médias empresas e 4º lugar no GPTW São Paulo.

Estamos sempre olhando para o futuro: confiantes da força que temos, conscientes do que precisamos para ir mais longe e certos de que temos o melhor time para chegar lá
 
Se você se identifica com a gente, inscreva-se em nossas vagas: https://livelo.gupy.io/

Name: Simpl
Description:
Simpl is India’s leading 1-tap checkout network meant to make payments invisible and money intelligent. It is committed to the simplification and democratisation of digital transformation in the payments space.

As India’s foremost consumer experience platform, Simpl is on a mission to empower merchants to build trusted relationships with customers, one transaction at a time. With more than 26,000+ available merchants and millions of trusted users pan-India, Simpl envisions creating an inclusive digital payment experience for India that empowers and fosters trust between merchants and their customers.

Simpl provides a full-stack solution for e-commerce conversion. It enables merchants to give customers 1-tap checkout, buyer protection, and a pay-later facility to allow them to feel safe and trusted when shopping online. Through Simpl, merchants can provide consumers with an easy, secure, and intuitive user experience.


For career opportunities: recruitment@getsimpl.com 

For press queries: media@getsimpl.com
For partnership opportunities: biz@getsimpl.com

Name: Grupo Ramos
Description:
“Grupo Ramos es la empresa líder en ventas al detalle de la República Dominicana.”

Desde el año 1965 servimos con esmero al mercado dominicano a través de nuestras diferentes marcas y formatos de negocio. Actualmente operamos 70 establecimientos comerciales distribuidos en 13 provincias, incluyendo: 25 tiendas La Sirena, 8 supermercados Pola, 34 tiendas de descuento Aprezio, 1 Gran Aprezio y 2 centros comerciales Multiplaza.

Nuestras tiendas reciben en conjunto más de 50 millones de visitas al año. Con cerca de 10,000 colaboradores que trabajan en nuestras tiendas, oficinas corporativas, panificadora y centros de distribución, somos uno de los mayores empleadores privados de la República Dominicana.

Grupo Ramos es el principal contribuyente en el sector comercial, con aportes anuales al fisco de más de RD$5,200 millones de pesos.

Name: HEMAS HOLDINGS PLC
Description:

Today, we empower families to aspire for more to live a better tomorrow through our focus in Consumer, Healthcare and Mobility. Woven into the socioeconomic fabric of Sri Lanka, Hemas has also expanded operations to Bangladesh.

Name: NerdWallet
Description:
NerdWallet is on a mission to help provide clarity for consumers and SMBs so they can make financial decisions with confidence. We work hard to cultivate an award-winning culture in which our Nerds can realize this mission, and we pride ourselves on the programs we’ve created to positively impact the lives of our consumers, our Nerds, and our wider world.

NerdWallet invests in its people, fostering an equitable and inclusive workplace in which Nerds can thrive professionally and personally. This includes a remote-first philosophy that allows for diverse recruitment and hiring, development programs to facilitate career growth, and a twice-yearly pay equity review process. NerdWallet also has five employee resource groups (ERGs) to provide inclusive, supportive peer communities within the workplace: NerdOut, NerdParents, NerdWomen, NerdWallet Women in Data & Engineering and Nerds of Color. 

NerdWallet invests in its larger communities through our Corporate Social Responsibility program that was created to support those traditionally locked out of the financial system. Millions of Americans are unbanked or underbanked, lacking access to credit and other financial products that some of us take for granted. Through our CSR platform, we’re striving to make a tangible difference for these underserved communities. 

NerdWallet’s award-winning culture was named an Inc. Best Workplace in 2022 and has also been recognized by Fast Company, Fortune, People, and more. Come Nerd out with us at www.nerdwallet.com.

Name: Remote Raven
Description:
We provide professional, well-trained and thoroughly screened virtual assistants to meet your hiring needs.

Remote Raven will connect you with a highly qualified virtual assistant to quickly fill your positions, allowing you time to focus on your business. Our local recruiting managers are able to identify, meet in-person, interview and select potential candidates. With no start up fees or minimum hours mandate, Remote Raven provides you with an affordable and flexible choice for finding your ideal assistant.

Name: Australia Post
Description:
Connecting businesses with consumers is the heart of commercial prosperity and the cornerstone of Australia Post's commitment to Australian businesses. As connectivity transforms our lives, Australia Post is evolving to meet the future needs of businesses by providing trusted service solutions in etailing, retailing, communications, financial services and postal. Continuous improvement of these services is our relentless objective.

On LinkedIn, Australia Post only collects, uses and stores your personal information that relates to providing information in response to your queries. Without this information, Australia Post will be unable to look into your query. Your personal information may also be disclosed to third party service providers to facilitate this process. Your personal information is managed in accordance with Australia Post’s Privacy Policy. This sets out how you may seek access to and correction of your personal information and how to make complaints. A copy is available at auspost.com.au/privacy. Australia Post may only disclose the information provided by you if required or authorised by law, or in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Please refer to the Privacy Policy or contact the Privacy Contact Officer, Australia Post, GPO Box 1777, Melbourne, Vic 3000 for any privacy related queries.

Name: NEXT Ventures
Description:
NEXT is a global fintech group. We own & operate FundedNext, a leading prop trading platform, and are expanding into the CFD broker industry.

We are a team of 450+ diverse professionals operating across 5 countries, serving over 220,000+ daily active traders from 170+ countries.

Name: Cradlewise
Description:
Cradlewise is a smart sleep company reimagining how families rest, bond, and thrive, starting from day one.

We combine responsive technology, sleep science, and user-focused & intuitive design to build sleep solutions that help support families in the sleep journey.

Our flagship product is one of the world’s smartest all-in-one convertible cribs. Our AI learns your baby’s unique sleep patterns, senses early wake-up cues, and soothes them back to sleep with a gentle bouncing motion and sound. It also monitors sleep with an in-built baby monitor, provides real-time insights via the Cradlewise app, and adapts as your baby grows from a newborn to a toddler.

At Cradlewise, we’re building the future of sleep. One that supports families with smarter sleep tech, calmer nights, and deeper peace of mind.

Built for Parents, by Parents.

Name: Tai Loy S.A
Description:
Tai Loy es la primera cadena de Stationery en el Perú. Somos los especialistas y líderes del sector de útiles escolares y de oficina a nivel nacional, con 53 años de experiencia ofreciendo la mayor variedad y los mejores precios del mercado.
 
A lo largo de los años hemos desarrollado un sistema comercial que logra atender de forma eficiente y rápida los pedidos de nuestros clientes. Tenemos una gran fuerza de ventas que llega a todo el Perú.
 
En la actualidad contamos con 72 sucursales, 52 en Lima, 2 en Ancash, 4 en Arequipa, 1 en Ayacucho, 1 en Cajamarca, 5 en Chiclayo, 2 en Huancayo y  5 en Ica y nos encontramos en constante proceso de expansión. Tenemos tiendas de formato mayorista, en las que atendemos principalmente a clientes de librerías e instituciones, y tiendas de formato retail o minorista, en las que se atiende a instituciones y al consumidor final.

Name: Securitas Direct, part of Verisure
Description:
We are the leading provider of peace of mind and protection to residential and small business customers across Europe and Latin America.  We operate under two strong brand names: Securitas Direct (*) and Verisure . Verisure in the majority of our markets and as Securitas Direct (*) in Spain and Portugal. 

We believe it’s a human right to feel safe and secure. We protect what really matters to our customers.  Our service brings peace of mind to households and small business owners. 

We deliver outstanding service to our 3 million customers with a team of more than 18,000 employees and we're present in 15 countries across Europe and Latin America. 

Passion for our People
We believe that we make a difference every day. To do that, we need committed and engaged employees. Our people are accountable for delivering world-class service and they are passionate about making the world a safer and more secure place. Our teams operate with integrity and respect for one another fueled by an entrepreneurial spirit. We are building a high-performance organization through investing in our people with great development and growth opportunities.  

Passion for Innovation:
We are a growth company. Our continuous investment in innovation has led to consistent top and bottom line growth. The more we grow, the safer the world becomes. 

Our Investors
We are owned by a leading private equity firm:  Hellman & Friedman. Our sponsor has invested in our innovation pipeline and in our organization to fuel our accelerated growth and play a leading role in the industry.

For more information, visit our web http://www.securitasdirect.com or visit the Verisure group page.


(*) Under license from Securitas AB

Description:
T.K. Group was founded by two brothers, Mohammed Abu Tayab and Mohammad Abul Kalam, in 1972.

Inspired by their father, Mir Ahmed Sowdagar’s success, they maintained the trading business even after he passed away. However, they were still on the lookout for new business opportunities to serve the country better. Today, T.K. Group is one of the biggest conglomerates of Bangladesh.

Arya Noble, Indonesia’s first Intelligent Derma Beauty investment and strategic holdings company, has achieved significant success in the nation’s skin and hair care industry with leading brands like ERHA Clinical Group, Genero Group, ERHA OTC, and finally, renowned Padangnese Cuisine, Marco by Chef Marco Lim. Arya Noble aims to be a hub of change, innovation, and endless possibilities, shaping a brighter future through our products, services, and people. Name: PLUS Malaysia
Description:
PLUS Malaysia (PLUS) is the largest expressway service provider in Malaysia and one of the largest in South East Asia.

PLUS is the expressway arm of UEM Group is the largest highway operator in Malaysia and has been operating the country’s toll roads since 1988.

PLUS operates and maintains almost 1,000 kilometres of expressways stretching from the border of Thailand in the North to the border of Singapore in the South as well as on the East Coast. The expressway connects major industrial, commercial and transportation centres, links major seaports and airports and provide easy access that led to the development of many townships and industrial centres.

Our Corporate Wellness Program helps companies support their teams with flexible benefits designed to boost engagement, productivity, and overall well-being.

Name: Business Chicks Australia
Description:
At Business Chicks, we're reimagining the world for women.

Business Chicks is for you whether you’re running your own show, surrounded by others in an office, or just missing a sense of connection and support. We give you the tools you need to propel yourself and your business or career forward.

When you’re a member of Business Chicks, there’s not just one woman who has your back, there are thousands.

Name: Nestaway
Description:
Nestaway is India's fastest-growing "managed home rental" company, providing superior rental solutions via technology and design. Now a part of Aurum PropTech Ltd., a publicly listed PropTech giant dedicated to creating an integrated PropTech ecosystem across the entire real estate value chain.

Today, Nestaway operates on both the demand and supply sides of the rental market, i.e., we onboard homeowners with rental properties, find tenants for these homes, and subsequently manage these properties. We turn unbranded, unfurnished houses into fully furnished ones and provide them at affordable prices to quality tenants. 

We've created a young ecosystem, providing:
-Higher rental incomes for home owners
-Gorgeous, fully furnished homes at an affordable price
-A hassle-free onboarding, servicing, and exit experience for both home owners and tenants

For more information, visit http://www.nestaway.com

Name: Mentes Expertas
Description:
Mentes Expertas surge, casi por casualidad en el año 2010. Nos dedicábamos a formar académicamente a miles de alumnos al año y con más de 200 personas en plantilla, descubrimos que nadie nos enseñaba a cómo ser felices, y a mejorar nuestra actitud positiva. Desde el equipo se hizo un gran esfuerzo y se decidió contar con Emilio Duró para una sesión de motivación en nuestra empresa y fue él, el que nos animó a exportar nuestra actitud y motivación al resto de las empresas a nivel nacional.
A raíz de aquella jornada cambiamos nuestro enfoque y lo que ahora nos ocupa es que las empresas descubran la importancia de invertir en la actitud y la motivación de sus empleados. Los conocimientos suman, pero el cómo enfocas el día a día, y cómo te relacionas con tus compañeros y clientes, multiplica. En Mentes Expertas estamos convencidos que cambiando los malos hábitos mejoramos nuestra vida personal y laboral, y con ello los resultados se multiplican exponencialmente.
¿Quieres vivir la experiencia de Mentes Expertas? Asiste a nuestras conferencias de forma digital y/o presencial. Visítanos!

Name: Care.com
Description:
Care.com is where families go to find care and where caregivers go to find meaningful work. Since 2007, over 45 million people have turned to Care.com—across child care, senior care, adult care, pet care and housekeeping. We’re here to make care simpler, smarter and more personal. 

Through Care for Business, Care.com empowers over 700 companies to provide family care benefits to their employees. With HomePay, we make it easier for families to manage household taxes and payroll. 

As moms, dads, pet parents, sons and daughters ourselves, we’re a passionate team of innovators and problem-solvers. We utilize data, AI and cutting-edge solutions to address universal care challenges and build connections. If you’re driven to apply your talents where innovative tech meets heart and want to contribute to a platform that has supported millions of families (and counting!), explore a career with us. 

Care.com is proud to be part of the IAC family.

Name: Airlift Technologies
Description:
Founded in 2019, Airlift is on a mission to build a world of self-empowerment using technology-backed logistics solutions that enable safe, reliable and affordable access to necessities. Airlift scaled Pakistan's largest decentralized transportation network to change the way people move, shifting away from private vehicles towards shared mobility and affordable mass transport. 

In 2020, Airlift diversified into last-mile delivery through Airlift Express, delivering essentials across households in 30 minutes across nine cities in Pakistan, soon launching across South Africa. Airlift Express spans across food supplies, household supplies, pharmacy, stationery, pet food, fresh fruits and vegetables, small electronics and more. 

On this mission to enable self-empowerment in the region, Airlift raised $110m+ USD in venture financing.

Name: Playboy
Description:
Playboy is one of the most recognizable, iconic brands in the world, synonymous with pleasure, leisure, style, and sophistication. In collaboration with leading licensees, Playboy connects consumers with products, content and experiences across approximately 180 countries. Our mission—to create a culture where all people can pursue pleasure—builds upon over 70 years of creating groundbreaking media and hospitality experiences and fighting for cultural progress rooted in the core values of equality, freedom of expression and the idea that pleasure is a fundamental human right. 


At Playboy, it isn’t just about what we do, but how we do things.  Our values are at the core of all that we do. Embedded in our values is our belief that each individual brings a unique perspective and voice to both our team and our business. We are committed to learning from each other, creating a safe and welcoming environment for all, lifting up the voices of others and treating each other equitably and respectfully.

Name: Fosun 复星
Description: Fosun was founded in 1992. After more than 30 years of development, Fosun has become a global innovation-driven consumer group. Adhering to the mission of creating happier lives for families worldwide, Fosun is committed to creating a global happiness ecosystem fulfilling the needs for families in health, happiness, and wealth. In 2007, Fosun International Limited was listed on the main board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX stock code: 00656). As of 31 December 2024, Fosun International's total assets amounted to RMB796.5 billion and it received an AA MSCI ESG rating.

Name: Rover.com
Description:
At Rover, everyone has ownership of their work and the opportunity to make a true impact. We believe that being diverse and inclusive is key to our success and encourage every employee to share their unique perspective while being their true self. 

We believe everyone deserves the unconditional love of a pet, and Rover exists to make it easier to experience that love. We’re supporting dog owners and empowering dog sitters to run thriving pet-care businesses in your neighborhoods. The Rover app and website connect dog and cat parents with loving pet sitters and dog walkers in neighborhoods across the US, Canada, and Europe.

Name: Grupo Vierci
Description:
Somos un grupo empresarial paraguayo con presencia multinacional que invierte en distintos sectores de la economía, buscando la mayor sinergia entre los mismos, fijando en Paraguay el centro operativo de los negocios; hoy, con empresas en Brasil, Uruguay, Panamá, Bolivia, Chile, Perú, Estados Unidos, España y Portugal.

Estamos comprometidos con la proyección de Paraguay en el exterior, siendo referentes de liderazgo e innovación en América Latina.  

Grupo Vierci está integrado por diferentes áreas de negocio que forman parte del día a día de los consumidores, y nuestro liderazgo se basa en ofrecer soluciones, productos y servicios a las familias, en diversos contextos de su actividad diaria.

Somos conscientes de que una de las claves del éxito se basa en empresas dirigidas por profesionales de primer nivel, dispuestos a aceptar riesgos y asumir responsabilidades.

Creemos en nuestra capacidad de integración. Los colaboradores jóvenes aportan nuevas ideas, nuevos bríos, nuevos puntos de vista. Los más antiguos brindan todo el saber acumulado durante años de experiencia en el negocio, buscando la excelencia en todos los órdenes.
Nuestro compromiso está presente en todos los valores y principios que nos rigen como sociedad. 

Creemos y trabajamos sobre principios de diversidad, inclusión, gobernanza, transparencia y responsabilidad ambiental. Somos un agente de transformación social y por ello nuestro compromiso es con una sociedad justa y con oportunidades para todos. 

Estamos convencidos de que la ética y la moral natural de todos los seres humanos deben ser los pilares sobre los cuales se sustente el desarrollo de todas las empresas que componen el Grupo.

Name: Grupo Garden
Description:
MISIÓN
Proporcionar a nuestros clientes el más alto nivel de servicio a través de mano de obra calificada, logrando su reconocimiento y generando utilidades como medida de nuestra eficiencia; que contribuyan al desarrollo sostenible, económico y social del país.

VISIÓN:
Ser la empresa automotriz líder a nivel nacional a través de la venta de sus productos y servicios brindando satisfacción a sus clientes.

OBJETIVOS:
Satisfacer las necesidades de los clientes, mediante ofertas de productos y servicios basados en normas de calidad internacional.

Conseguir el bienestar de los funcionarios, en sus diferentes niveles de atribuciones y responsabilidades.

Recuperar el capital invertido, a través de resultados anuales satisfactorios, respetando leyes, decretos y normativas que regulan el estado paraguayo.

VALORES:
Responsabilidad
Calidad
Compromiso organizacional
Honestidad
Trabajo en Equipo
Integridad
Profesionalismo
Liderazgo

Name: Cargills Ceylon
Description:
At Cargills Ceylon, we are not just a company; we are a cornerstone of Sri Lanka's vibrant economy. With a heritage spanning 180 years, we have continuously evolved to become a leading force in the country's food industry. Built on a strong foundation of values and ethics, we have spread our reach across Sri Lanka, with investments and operations that touch the lives of millions of consumers, farmers, and entrepreneurs on a daily basis.

Our commitment to quality, innovation, and sustainability is embedded in each of our businesses. Beyond business, we take pride in our role as a responsible corporate citizen, having gained global recognition for linking farmers and entrepreneurs to the market through a sustainable and inclusive value creation model. We actively engage in initiatives that uplift communities, promote education, and protect the environment, because we believe in creating a brighter future for all.

Join us at Cargills Ceylon and be part of a dynamic team that's shaping the future of Sri Lanka's food landscape, while making a positive impact on society. Together, we can contribute towards a better Sri Lanka.

Name: Beam Mobility
Description:
Beam is Asia Pacific’s largest shared micromobility company. Our mission is simple; to turn little drives into better rides and make cities flow better.

Shared micromobility is one of the fastest-growing industries in the world, and we’re leading the way in Asia Pacific with operations in Australia, New Zealand, Japan, South Korea, Turkey, Thailand and Malaysia. In collaboration with cities, we bring a safe, affordable and sustainable new mode of transport to citizens with our fleets of self-driven small electric vehicles.

Following our recent US $93M Series B round, we are now operating in Turkey, Japan and Indonesia.

Name: Smytten
Description:
Smytten is revolutionizing the way every Indian experiences each and every choice available to them! As a trailblazing omnichannel platform, we offer consumers an unparalleled selection of Trial Packs spanning over 250 lifestyle categories, featuring products from more than 1200 global and homegrown brands. We're proud to be the only platform that gives consumers the opportunity to try before they buy, and make informed purchase decisions.

Our passionate team is on a mission to empower consumers with insightful choices and bespoke product discoveries. At Smytten, we celebrate diversity in all its forms, valuing the rich tapestry of backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. 
Join us in our mission to make the nation #TryItAll

Name: Ultra Voucher
Description:
PT Trimegah Karya Pratama Tbk ("UVCR") is a technology company engaged in the shopping voucher and gift card industry, both physical and digital. Established in 2017, the Company acts as a voucher generator that is distributed to the public throughout Indonesia.
 
In 2017, the Company issued the main platform used to distribute vouchers to consumers named Ultra Voucher. Ultra Voucher is an application that sells various kinds of physical and digital vouchers from merchants who have collaborated with Ultra Vouchers. Currently, Ultra Voucher has collaborated with more than 600 brands and will continue to grow with more than 45,000 outlets networks from merchant partnership throughout Indonesia.
 
Ultra Vouchers can be downloaded on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. With 500.000 active users on Ultra Voucher Mobile Apps, We deliver more than 15.000 transaction every day.

Name: CADO Gifting
Description:
CADO IS YOUR COMPLETE CORPORATE GIFTING SOLUTION
Modernizing the act of corporate gifting. 
CADO’s collaborative spirit paves the way for an inspiring gifting journey. 
We focus on the needs of businesses and future communities, and each gift we create is a story composed of chapters.
Our principal mission is to combine creative ideas with technical expertise, in order to create gifts with a purpose.

Name: Belajar Linkedin
Description: BelajarLinkedin is a LinkedIn Branding Clinic designed to empower Indonesian students and job seekers with the know-how to use LinkedIn effectively. It is a dynamic resource aimed at unlocking the full potential of LinkedIn for personal branding, networking, and career advancement. BelajarLinkedin is committed to equipping the Indonesian workforce with the tools and strategies needed to navigate the professional landscape and thrive in their respective fields by providing specialized guidance, training, and insights. Whether crafting an impactful profile, connecting with industry leaders, or leveraging LinkedIn for job searches, Jagolinkedin is the catalyst for professional growth and opportunity within the Indonesian community.

Name: PetMojo
Description: PetMojo is India's No. 1 brand for taking care of your pets. We offer services like Dog Training, Dog Walking, Pet Grooming, and Pet Boarding. Our goal is to make sure your pets get the best care. Whether it's learning new tricks, going for walks, looking great, or having a comfy place to stay, PetMojo is here to help. Trust us to take good care of your furry friends and see the amazing difference!

Name: Speshally.nhs
Description: A Social enterprise that unifies change-makers & delivers impactful solutions to build a productive flourishing Society. Encompassing skill education and Career Building with a focus on diversity and easing transitions into the corporate world especially for the youth & people with disability.

Name: Wavelit
Description:
We are building the future of news consumption and social interactions!

We are re-imagining how users consume content and interact with their friends in the AI world!

Name: FACE FOUNDRIÉ
Description: FACE FOUNDRIÉ is a focused facial bar specializing in all things face: facials, lashes, brows and skincare. Our goal is to provide efficient and effective services in a modern open concept.

Name: Portu Sunberg
Description:
Portu Sunberg is a retail sales and marketing agency. We guide innovators and brand leaders to develop, launch and grow products in more than 40 categories. With relentless energy and deep expertise, we align product, vendor and customer to make our client’s vision a reality. We are dedicated with one single focus: to add value everyday, to every customer and vendor.

Portu Sunberg unites the spectrum of experts you need under one roof. Our three interdisciplinary business groups work together to make your brand unstoppable at every stage. 

Portu Sunberg, Tana Sales & Marketing LLC, Infinity World LLC, Avenue C, Belmont Partners and The Barcode Group are charting a course into unexplored territory. Exciting updates are in the works! 

Visit our website to learn more about The Barcode Group.

Name: HiCare Services Pvt.Ltd.
Description:
HiCare is a leading hygiene brand that specializes in pest control, home cleaning, bird netting and disinfection. With a legacy of 3 decades of experience, we are proud to be trusted by 30 lakh families and 300+ corporates while continuously striving to grow further. We look at the environment as our responsibility and that's why HiCare is India's only HACCP certified pest service provider. Our innovative and safe chemicals are approved by CIB (Central Insecticides Board) and our hygiene experts go through numerous background checks before being onboarded.

What makes us India's most trusted service provider pest control is our 24×7 digital presence and hassle free bookings that can be availed just at a few clicks.

Visit our website to know more about our decade’s journey in the world of hygiene solutions.

Name: Exl Service Private Limited,Noida
Description: Exl Service Private Limited,Noida is a consumer services company based out of C-29, 2Nd Floor, Sector-52, , Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India.

Name: AAA Ohio Automobile Club
Description:
At AAA Ohio, we are dedicated to providing our members, customers and employees with exceptional experiences every time. We encourage our employees to pursue growth and learning while building authentic relationships through open, honest communication with our members, customers and colleagues.

Our employees take pride in working for a brand that is nationally recognized for the safety and peace of mind we provide each member. All of our positions – emergency roadside assistance, car repair, travel services and corporate roles – are key to living up to our values and delivering on what we promise. Each employee is expected to embrace and drive positive change as well as be accountable to themselves, the organization and the members we serve.  

At AAA, we offer fair compensation, equality in employment opportunities, and potential for advancement, education and training. We reward exceptional performance, are receptive to differing points of view, and respect individual dignity. We welcome diversity.


We offer an unmatched benefits package that includes:

 ~ 401(k) with Company Match
 ~ Medical Insurance
 ~ Dental Insurance
 ~ Vision Insurance
 ~ Life Insurance
 ~ Long Term Disability
 ~ Short Term Disability
 ~ Flexible Spending Account
 ~ Employee Assistance Program
 ~ Paid Time Off
 ~ Paid Holidays
 ~ Free AAA Membership
 ~ Associate Discounts
 ~ Wellness Program with Incentives

Name: Techtronic Industries Canada Inc.
Description:
Techtronic Industries Company Limited (“TTI”, or the “Company”), founded in 1985 by German entrepreneur Horst Julius Pudwill, is a world leader in cordless technology. As a pioneer in Power Tools, Outdoor Power Equipment, Floorcare and Cleaning Products, TTI serves professional, industrial, Do It Yourself (DIY), and consumer markets worldwide. With more than 45,000 employees globally, the company’s relentless focus on innovation and strategic growth has established its leading position in the industries it serves.
 
MILWAUKEE is at the forefront of TTI’s professional tool portfolio. With global research and development headquartered in Brookfield, Wisconsin, the historic MILWAUKEE brand is renowned for driving innovation, safety, and jobsite productivity worldwide. The RYOBI brand, headquartered in Greenville, South Carolina, remains the top choice for DIYers and continues to set the standard in DIY tool innovation. TTI’s diverse brand portfolio also includes trusted brands like AEG, EMPIRE, HOMELITE, and leading floorcare names HOOVER, ORECK, VAX, and DIRT DEVIL (based in Charlotte, North Carolina).  
 
TTI’s international recognition and renowned brand portfolio are supported by a strong ownership structure that underscores the company’s global reach and stability. The Pudwill family remains the company’s largest shareholder, with the remaining ownership held largely by institutional investors at North American and European-owned firms. TTI is publicly traded on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is a constituent stock of the Hang Seng Index, operating globally with a strong commitment to environmental, social, and corporate governance standards.

Name: LoadUp
Description:
LoadUp connects customers (B2C & B2B) with local service providers for junk haul-away, donation pickup, assembly, and hourly labor. Our tech-powered platform delivers real-time, upfront pricing nationwide making junk removal easy, affordable, and transparent.

We prioritize responsible disposal with donation and recycling programs. No job is too big or small, from furniture to cardboard boxes.

Our Core Beliefs:
At LoadUp, we exist to glorify God by pursuing excellence in all we do, committed to continual improvement, attention to detail, and the highest integrity. We seek individuals who embody these core beliefs every day.

Profit Drives Purpose - Running a profitable business affords us the opportunity to fulfill our professional and personal purpose in life.
Right Shell - We constantly evaluate whether our processes, systems, and people are right-sized for maximum agility.
Own It - Everyone has a stake in the company and, therefore, is responsible for their performance.
Fellowship Matters - There is power and connection in being present in the same physical space.
Live in Truth - We’re committed to winning the right way. Call it like it is. No sugar coating.
Action Over Words - Words are important, but 1,000 words get trumped by 1 intentional action.
Build to Last - We’re building this company to last and withstand the test of time. We play the long game in our decision-making and execution.

Join Our Team
We value motivated individuals who live our core values and want to grow in a supportive, innovative environment. LoadUp offers competitive benefits and a culture of ownership, collaboration, and integrity.

Ready to build your career with a fast-growing company? Check out our openings and join the mission.

Employee Benefits:
Stipends
Medical, Dental, Vision & Life Insurance
Flexible Spending Account
401(k) With 5% Match
Employee Referral Bonuses
Company Outings
Certified Great Place to Work (2024) and Inc. 5000 Fastest-Growing Private Company (2019-2024).

Name: Sisters Beauty Lounge
Description:
When our Founder – Shirin Abulrazak created the business in 2003 it was to fill a niche in the market for a high standard, multi-functional beauty lounge for busy UAE women. The dynamic Shirin, a born entrepreneur already steered successful fashion and uniform enterprises but the decision to launch the Sisters Beauty Lounge brand was daring to go where others had dared not to. She set a trend that others continue to follow.

The name inspired by Shirin’s three daughters (sisters) evoked a vision of the environment she wanted to create for customers and team members. A sense of belonging. From the opening of the first Lounge at the Village Mall in 2004 a commitment to people development has been at the heart of Sisters Beauty Lounge with inspirational stories of personal success. Many of the team’s founding members have key roles dotted around the branches and within the head office team. Rasha, Shirin’s eldest daughter was involved in the early development of the business and remained on the board in a consultative capacity. In 2008, under the guidance of her sister Sara, Sisters Beauty Lounge launched its flagship branch at the Dubai Mall and a decade on under her leadership the Sisters brand remains unparalleled. Hind, Shirin’s middle daughter also played an instrumental role in the business from 2011 spearheading the creative processes.

Our desire to remain an undisputed market leader and ambitious growth plans for the region meant securing an investor with the same vision and energy and in April 2015 Sisters Beauty Lounge was acquired by the private equity fund CedarBridge. Whilst no longer involved in the business, Shirin, Rasha, Sara and Hind continue to act as brand ambassadors for the visionary business that still has beauty at the heart of everything it does.

Name: Zoop Live
Description:
At Zoop, we’re on a mission to revolutionise the way India buys and sells.
We empower suppliers, resellers, retailers, and wholesalers with cutting-edge tools to engage, sell, and scale through live commerce.

Live commerce is the next big unlock for millions of offline businesses in India who got left behind in the digital race and Zoop is right at the center of this transformation. 
From small shopkeepers to large distributors, we’re enabling businesses to build distribution, reach wider audiences, and sell seamlessly through livestreams.

Our vision is to build a game-changing consumer tech platform that brings the bazaar online, one live stream at a time.

Join us as we reshape the future of commerce in India.

Name: Provalliance
Description:
Né en 2008 de la fusion entre le Groupe Franck Provost et les activités européennes continentales du groupe américain Regis Corporation, le Groupe Provalliance est aujourd’hui le n°1 mondial du marché de la coiffure, avec plus de 3 500 salons et boutiques répartis dans 35 pays sur les 5 continents. 

En 2021, le fonds d’investissement européen Core Equity devient actionnaire majoritaire du Groupe, afin d’accélérer ses performances ainsi que son développement sur de nouveaux territoires et sa transformation digitale.
Aujourd’hui, le Groupe Provalliance s’appuie sur deux piliers essentiels qui assurent son indépendance et anticipent son expansion sur de nouveaux marchés de la beauté : l’exploitation de salons de coiffure, en franchises et en succursales, et la distribution de produits professionnels via la BU CSP, pour ses clients et ses points de vente. 
 
Des enseignes de salons de coiffures parmi les plus prestigieuses au monde (Franck Provost, Jean Louis David, Llongueras, Maniatis Paris), des boutiques accessibles aux professionnels de la beauté comme au grand public (Bleu Libellule, Nyx Cosmetics), des nails bars qui suivent les tendances, les 18 marques du Groupe, qui emploient 20 000 collaborateurs, sont au service de plus 35 millions de clients dans le monde.

Name: Limitless Naturals
Description:
We believe real health starts with consistent habits, not shortcuts — and it begins with four pillars: deep sleep, daily movement, clean eating, and smart supplementation. Backed by science and trusted by healthcare professionals, Limitless Naturals offers food supplements that work with your body, not against it — helping you sleep deeper, move better, eat cleaner, and live stronger. This is the Limitless lifestyle: practical, proven, and built to last. 
 
Limitless Naturals offers a wide range of advanced dosage forms — from gummies, sachets, effervescent powders, and chewables to oral dissolvable films (ODFs), fast-release strips, and multilayered tablets — designed for superior absorption, ease of use, and a better consumer experience.
 
Limitless is redefining wellness with an agile commercial model that enables fast, flexible partnerships across pharmacies, wellness clinics, digital health platforms, and e-commerce. Through innovative solutions and personalized nutrition, Limitless is shaping the future of holistic well-being, seamlessly integrating the Limitless Experience — a virtual-first wellness platform.
 
Limitless Naturals is a part of EVA Group, a global health leader present in over 70 countries with four EU-approved manufacturing complexes and a track record of quality, innovation, and impact.

Name: Cygnific
Description:
At Cygnific, we specialise in providing premium customer service solutions for leading brands such as KLM, Air France, Rituals, and Sunweb. With 1,800+ multilingual experts across four locations, we deliver 24/7 personalised support that stays true to each brand’s identity.

We act as an extension of your team, offering tailored solutions that create meaningful connections with your customers. Whether it’s seamless travel assistance or inspiring lifestyle guidance, we’re dedicated to enhancing customer experiences and building lasting relationships on your behalf.

Name: IZI by EDF
Description:
En 2019, le Groupe EDF veut rendre la vie des Français plus simple et lance IZI by EDF, sa plateforme pour accompagner ses clients vers la transition énergétique. IZI by EDF est spécialisée dans les services à l’habitat auprès des particuliers et des professionnels, avec des solutions clés en main autour de la rénovation durable et énergétique des logements ainsi que la recharge des véhicules électriques. L’entreprise allie la simplicité et la transparence du digital, à un accompagnement humain expert et de qualité. Elle se différencie par des prix justes, la qualité des travaux et l’excellence de son service client.

IZI by EDF a pour ambition de rendre la rénovation énergétique accessible au plus grand nombre pour limiter le réchauffement climatique, réduire les déperditions d’énergie dans les logements et ainsi permettre à tous ses clients de consommer moins et mieux. L’entreprise contribue chaque jour à appliquer la raison d’être du Groupe EDF, qu’elle partage et met en oeuvre dans toutes les prestations qu’elle propose : « construire un avenir énergétique neutre en CO2, conciliant préservation de la planète, bien-être et développement, grâce à l’électricité et à des solutions et services innovants. »

Name: Juniper Creates
Description:
Juniper Creates is a custom merchandising solution for independent creators and brands. We design, produce, market, and ship elevated products to fans around the world.

Since 2016, we've created and released 2,500+ unique products in partnership with content creators, gaming studios, and independent artists.

Name: Real Automóvil Club de España - RACE
Description:
Founded in 1903, RACE has a long tradition as a leading service provider for motorists. Created as a public service institution instead of a commercial association, RACE has dedicated itself to solving motorist demands in Spain and abroad. With this in mind, the club established the first two highway codes, helped in signposting roads and created international documents relevant to automobiles whose owners wanted to travel to other countries.

Nowadays, the quality of RACE services is well known throughout the country, and the road safety campaigns developed by the club, have deserved that national authorities  consider RACE a trusted entity for advice on road safety issues.

Services

* RACEtel. A call centre that respond any demand of RACE members, other than roadside assistance.
* App Bcall – RACE SOS that enables drivers to send out their location to ensure the quickest way of managing a breakdown. Under the motto: “You´ll never will be alone” RACE is a company leader of services to motorists in the country.
* Personal travel assistance in Spain and the rest of the world.
* Roadside assistance.
* Home assistance.
* Management and issuance of motor vehicle discounts.
* MOT service.
* Legal advice.
* Insurance packages (vehicles, home, health)
* Tourist information.
* AutoRACE.
* RACE cultural foundation owns the best library of the country on the history of automobile.
* Free publications for members.

Name: Team Car Care Dba Jiffy Lube
Description:
The American quick lube industry provides more than 100 million oil changes every year from over 10,000 standalone locations. Within this industry, there is one dynamic growing company that stands out from the rest – Team Car Care, dba Jiffy Lube, the largest franchisee of quick lube retail service stores in the country. Operating More than 550 Jiffy Lube locations from coast to coast and serving nearly 5 million guests each year with over 5,000 professional service advisors, Team Car Cares commitment to provide a memorable experience for our valued guests upon every visit.

We strive to do this by exceeding guests' expectations, with consistent "Signature Service" delivered through our committed organization of friendly, knowledgeable and professional teammates.

 Team Car Care is trusted by consumers and recognized by the industry as the best place for quick professional vehicle care within the neighborhoods we serve. Our company is committed to leading the quick lube industry with safe, clean, and attractive facilities; well trained and courteous staff; respect for the environment and recycling; and by providing the highest quality Pennzoil products and important vehicle maintenance services to ensure we are the first choice of every consumer.

Name: Competition and Consumer Protection Commission
Description: The Competition and Consumer Protection Commission (CCPC) is the statutory body responsible for enforcing consumer protection and competition law in Ireland. Our mission is to make markets work better for consumers and businesses.

Name: Xcode Life
Description:
Xcode Life is a leading personal genomics company that specializes in delivering personalized health insights based on genetic data. Established in 2011, the company has developed a comprehensive platform that enables users to upload their raw DNA data and receive personalized health reports. These reports provide valuable information about nutritional needs, fitness regimens, and genetic predispositions to various health conditions, fostering a proactive approach to health management.

The core philosophy of Xcode Life revolves around the belief that understanding one’s genetic makeup can lead to better health outcomes. By analyzing DNA data, the company generates detailed reports that are both informative and actionable. Users can gain insights into how their genes influence their health, allowing them to tailor their diets and lifestyle choices accordingly. This personalized approach enhances individual well-being and supports preventive healthcare practices.

In addition to its foundational offerings, Xcode Life has introduced innovative tests like the “Genes and Caffeine” test, which explores the relationship between genetics and caffeine metabolism. As Xcode Life continues to innovate, it remains dedicated to transforming healthcare through the power of genomics.

Name: OneStone
Description:
Welcome to the new era of retail. Through our retail account services, retail media and creative teams, and powerful technology, insights & analytics, OneStone, a Bluebird Group company, represents your brand across all channels to deliver a connected experience so you can sell everywhere. We develop strategies that grow our clients’ brands in store and online at the world's largest retailers like Amazon and Walmart. The Onestone team is a group of hard-working retail experts always on your side. We care deeply about our team, our clients, and especially the work that we do, which leads to outstanding results and has been recognized by Inc. Magazine as a Best Workplace. Whether you work with us or for us, you’ll discover that our focus on deep relationships is what moves us forward everyday.

OneStone's People Promise:

OneStone prioritizes the inclusion of diverse perspectives. We aspire for all team members to feel like this is a place where they belong. Where they are respected by the company and are empowered to impact the business and achieve their full potential. We understand that relationships built on trust, respect and communication better serve our clients, team members and business.

Name: The Rounds
Description: The Rounds is an AI-powered last mile delivery platform designed to more intelligently manage your inventory of recurring grocery and household essentials. Founded in 2019, The Rounds raised more than $60 million. Its mission is to make managing everyday recurring essentials effortless and more sustainable than the alternative. The Rounds was acquired by Misfits Market.

Name: Virtuelly
Description: Virtuelly is a marketplace to book interactive virtual, hybrid and in-person events enabling teams to build better connections and socialize in this distributed world. With the world moving towards distributed work, teams are struggling to re-create connection. Research shows that social teams are more productive and communicate better, hence it's critical for companies to engage their teams to help foster better connections. From team-building events to happy hours, bring your kids to work day to off-site entertainment, and from celebrating birthdays to milestones, you can find an event for each occasion.

Name: TeamEvents.ai
Description: Virtuelly is a marketplace to book interactive virtual, hybrid and in-person events enabling teams to build better connections and socialize in this distributed world. Research shows that social teams are more productive and communicate better, hence it's critical for companies to engage their teams to help foster better connections. From team-building events to happy hours, bring your kids to work day to off-site entertainment, and from celebrating birthdays to milestones, you can find an event for each occasion.

Name: Tourline Express SLU
Description:
Tourline Express tiene más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector de la mensajería, paquetería y transporte urgente en España. 

Y desde 2005, también en el mercado ibérico gracias a que forma parte de CTT, la compañía postal portuguesa con más de 500 años de historia.

Tourline Express cuenta con una de las redes de franquicias más potentes de todo el territorio y, además:

- Alrededor de 3.000 vehículos.
- 25 plataformas logísticas.
- Una red de más de 1.400 rutas.
- Y la confianza de cerca de 80.000 clientes.

Name: Budget Blinds
Description: Budget Blinds was founded on the principle of providing high quality window coverings to consumers in a highly convenient way and at prices that fit almost every budget. That was 1992. Today, the Budget Blinds franchise system of nearly 1,000 franchises still strives to provide consumers with the same superior products through convenient, complimentary in-home consultations.

Name: Lakson Group
Description:
Lakson's Corporate Values -- People, Customer Success, Excellence, Innovation, Teamwork, Openness, Social Responsibility and Sustained Profitability -- focus on our long-term perspective for leadership and prosperity. These values should inspire us to a level of excellence that maximizes value for customers, business partners, and shareholders, while supporting our employees and the communities in which our employees live and work. These values are intended to be a foundation to guide our decisions. They are reflected in our business objectives. And they represent the global standard by which all of our individual and collective actions will be measured. 

Our expanding organization demonstrates our devotion to picking the right markets and the right opportunities.	

We frequently create partnerships with foreign companies to combine industry specific skills, knowledge, and operational expertise. Our companies are part of a family, and are empowered to run their own affairs, yet the companies help one another, and solutions to problems often come from within the Group somewhere. It's like a commonwealth, with shared ideas, values, interests and goals. 

OUR CULTURE 
Ours is a culture of team work. For our teams to excel, all members must feel that they are operating in an inclusive environment that welcomes and supports differences and that encourages input from all perspectives. Our people have the right to expect a workplace in which the richness of their lives and experience is welcomed and valued by their team and by the firm.

Name: HB Travels
Description:
HB Travels  is a Massachusetts-based, home-operated travel agency dedicated to crafting unforgettable getaways, whether near or far. Our extensive travel services encompass flights, cruises and accommodations at all-inclusive resorts around the globe.

Even a short trip to a local hotel with a pool can create wonderful memories and provide a refreshing break. No matter where your travel dreams lead, I am here to help you realize them. You deserve to experience and enjoy life to the fullest.

Name: Teletrabajo Group
Description:
Somos una firma de consultoría especializada en la gestión estratégica, optimización de procesos y digitalización de las operaciones de nuestros clientes.

Diagnosticamos, diseñamos e implementamos las mejoras que las organizaciones requieren para la virtualización de sus actividades logrando resultados financieros significativos.

Name: One Technologies
Description:
One Technologies, LLC harnesses the power of technology, analytics and most importantly – real people – to create solutions that empower consumers to make more informed decisions about their financial lives.
 
Through platforms like  ScoreSense – our industry-leading online provider of consumer credit information and identity monitoring – we provide our customers with personalized insights about their credit standing.
 
But our company is not just about technology, analytics and big data – we know it only works with the right people. That’s why we nurture long-term careers at One Technologies.

Name: COMO Group
Description: Created by Christina Ong and headquartered in Singapore, the COMO Group represents an integrated approach to contemporary living with a deep respect for authenticity. The Group’s interests extend across fashion (Club 21), hospitality (COMO Hotels and Resorts), wellness (COMO Shambhala), specialty food, wine and dining, and philanthropy (COMO Foundation).

Name: OK TAMAM Group
Description:
OK TAMAM Group is an international group established in Kuwait and started its operations in 1992 under the name of Saad Al-Khayyat Group, the name changed later to be OK TAMAM Group. Lignec offre le service de construction de postes électriques, d’installations industrielles et de lignes de distribution. Transmag Énergie, pour sa part, s'occupe de la conception et de la fabrication de transformateurs de puissance.

Notre équipe multidisciplinaire regroupe des ingénieurs, des techniciens en électricité, en mécanique, en travaux civils ou en travaux de structure ainsi que des travailleurs de la construction qui sont tous disponibles pour répondre à vos besoins, et ce, peu importe le champ de compétence en électrotechnique.

For Gig Workers, By Gig Workers

At Gig Worker Solutions, we’re not just another platform; we’re a thriving community born from the shared experiences, challenges, and aspirations of gig workers like you. Our story began with a realization that the gig economy, while brimming with opportunities, lacked the necessary support structure for the very people driving its growth. We saw this gap, and rather than wait for someone else to fill it, we took action. Our mission is simple yet powerful: to unite gig workers under a collective banner, leveraging our combined strength to secure the kinds of benefits and resources that are typically reserved for large corporations.

When you join Gig Worker Solutions, you’re not just signing up for a service; you’re becoming part of a movement. A movement that’s dedicated to empowering gig workers with the tools, knowledge, and community support they need to thrive in an increasingly competitive landscape.

Empower Your Entrepreneurial Journey

The life of a gig worker is one of constant innovation and adaptation. At Gig Worker Solutions, we understand that your entrepreneurial journey is unique, filled with its own set of challenges and triumphs. That’s why we’re committed to equipping you with the most cutting-edge resources available. Our partnerships with leading technology providers ensure that you have access to the tools that can keep you ahead of the curve. Whether it’s the latest software to streamline your workflow, or innovative platforms that help you connect with clients more effectively, we’ve got you covered.

Freedom to Focus on What Matters

Being your own boss comes with a myriad of responsibilities, from managing taxes to navigating legal complexities. At Gig Worker Solutions, we aim to take some of that burden off your shoulders, offering expert guidance and resources on a wide range of topics. Our goal is to free you up to focus on what you do best – crushing your goals and growing your business.

Name: Tumbledry
Description:
An average urban household spends roughly 2 hours a week doing laundry. Also, as per a report, laundry is a highly loathed household chore surpassed in antipathy only by cleaning the toilet & washing dishes.

Laundry is a latent problem which had been begging for the right solution for a very long time. However, unlike developed countries, the penetration of professional laundry services in India is extremely low - as per research reports, the Indian laundry market was 96% unorganised in 2019.
 
To solve this problem, Tumbledry is opening live laundry stores, providing world-class services, within every 3km radius in urban India. This required a revolution in the laundry industry, and we brought that by adopting technology and turning it into a mechanism-driven industry from being a highly labour-intensive industry. 

At present, we are already India's largest laundry and dry clean chain with 1400+ stores across 600+ cities. Now, the goal is to reach every urban Indian household and provide the highest standards of quality and convenience altogether. To turn this into reality we need a hyperlocal presence PAN India. Hence, we are on our way to opening 2000 live Tumbledry stores by 2026.

Name: DNANUDGE
Description:
DnaNudge is the developer of the world’s first service to use consumers’ own DNA plus lifestyle factors to nudge people towards healthier choices while shopping. The DnaNudge service analyses and maps users’ genetic profile to key nutrition-related health traits such as obesity, diabetes, hypertension and cholesterol, enabling customers to be guided by their DNA towards healthier eating. The service has been developed by world-renowned biomedical engineer Regius Professor Chris Toumazou FRS and published geneticist Dr Maria Karvela.

This ground-breaking in-store DNA testing service created to address an epidemic – obesity and Type 2 diabetes – has now been successfully adapted for the fight against a pandemic, with the development of the rapid, lab-free CovidNudge RT-PCR test. CovidNudge can accurately detect COVID-19 and other viruses in just over an hour, without the need for a laboratory, and is now in UK NHS roll-out.

Description:
Potager City prépare et livre des paniers de fruits et légumes en provenance directe du producteur. Un service simple, rapide et 100% en ligne : www.potagercity.fr

Nous vous proposons des paniers de fruits et légumes de saison, et l’objectif est de vous faire redécouvrir la fraîcheur, la simplicité et le bon goût des produits.

Nous privilégions des fruits et légumes de variétés anciennes afin de lutter contre la standardisation.
Radis noir, carottes jaunes, poire Beurré Hardy, ... Nous avons tant de légumes oubliés dans nos régions !
C’est pourquoi nous sélectionnons des producteurs engagés dans une démarche d’agriculture durable, parfois labellisés agriculture biologique, qui ont à cœur de perpétuer le patrimoine de leur région.

En devenant client de Potager City, vous achetez naturellement des fruits et des légumes frais et de saison. Notre premier critère, c'est le goût des produits. Ensuite nous nous efforçons de trouver des producteurs proches afin de garantir la fraîcheur des produits de contribuer au maintien de l'agriculture locale. Nous faisons une exception pour les fruits et les légumes qui ne poussent pas en France métropolitaine afin d'apporter de la diversité en hiver.

Pour rester dans cette logique de respect de l’environnement, nos emballages sont écologiques, à base de papier recyclé et d’encres végétales. Les emballages de vos paniers sont recyclables, ils ne sont pas consignés afin de respecter les normes d'hygiène en vigueur.

Un service client, humain et réactif est également à votre disposition.

Name: Tommy Gun's Original Barbershop
Description:
Tommy Gun's is a Canadian-based barbershop and grooming establishment known for its commitment to providing a unique and exceptional grooming experience. Founded in 2009 by Ken Fisher, Tommy Gun's has evolved into a global brand with a presence in Australia, New Zealand, the USA, and Canada. 

In 1988, Ken Fisher laid the foundation for the thriving Tommy Gun's franchise network. Drawing from his industry expertise, Fisher spearheaded the creation of Tommy Gun's Original Barbershop in 2009. Dissatisfied with conventional barbershop experiences, Fisher aimed to revolutionize the industry by introducing unparalleled customer service within a laid-back and welcoming environment. 

Within five years, Tommy Gun’s celebrated its 1 millionth cut, and in 2014, it expanded globally with its debut location in Brisbane, Australia. Fast forward to 2024, Tommy Gun’s has marked its 10 millionth cut and operates over 100 locations worldwide. The brand's evolution is fueled by the dedication and collaboration of Ken Fisher's son and son-in-law, Keenan Fisher and Cory Anderson. 

Tommy Gun's is not just about haircuts; it's about crafting an experience for a "Fresh Cut Feeling, Every Guest Every Time." Rooted in modern male grooming, the barbershop combines traditional charm with modern amenities. Grooming is seen as an art form, and each service is an opportunity to provide a personalized experience, emphasizing precision and care. Tommy Gun's doesn't just sell haircuts; it sells confidence to each individual walking into a Tommy Gun’s Barbershop. We don't believe in appointments. Simply show up, check yourself in and spend the waiting time the way you want - watch the game, browse our product range, polish up on your arcade skills or take a walk - we'll text you when you're up.

Goodwill Kentucky uses approximately 90 cents from every dollar generated in its retail stores to operate workforce programs, so when you give to Goodwill, you do a lot of good.

Name: Hidden Disabilities Sunflower
Description:
Some disabilities, conditions or chronic illnesses are not immediately obvious to others. For some people, this can make it hard to understand and believe that someone with a “non-visible” condition genuinely needs support. Some people question whether you have a disability because you don’t look ‘like you have a disability".

That is why we created the Hidden Disabilities Sunflower - to encourage inclusivity, acceptance and understanding.

It is a simple tool for you to share that you have a hidden disability voluntarily. Simply by wearing the Sunflower, you’re just letting everyone know that you might need extra help, understanding, or just more time.

The Sunflower - always here to support you
The Hidden Disabilities Sunflower is here every day of the year to support people living with non-visible disabilities in their communities by raising awareness, training businesses and sharing stories to help create a more inclusive, understanding society.

Since its launch in 2016, businesses from every sector have been joining the global Sunflower network - ranging from retail, travel and tourism, transport, including over 280 airports - as well as railway networks, coach and bus services and ferries, education (universities, schools and colleges), healthcare, central and local government agencies to football teams, theme parks, theatres and financial institutions.  

The Sunflower has been launched locally in Australia, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Denmark, Ireland, Latin America, Mauritius, the Netherlands, New Zealand, the UK, the UAE and the USA.

Name: Deco Proteste
Description:
A DECO PROteste, criada em 1991, é a maior organização de defesa dos direitos do consumidor em Portugal. 

Damos força e confiança às escolhas dos consumidores. Testamos, comparamos e revelamos os melhores produtos e serviços para que se sinta acompanhado em todas as fases do processo de compra. Os nossos testes independentes são realizados em laboratório com o maior rigor técnico e científico para que os resultados sejam a base sólida da sua decisão de compra. 

Com um trabalho técnico, científico e político abrangente, entregamos soluções reais para os problemas que enfrenta, intervindo de forma independente junto de entidades públicas e privadas para defender os seus direitos enquanto consumidor. 

Oferecemos um serviço de informação rigoroso sobre as diversas áreas que impactam a sua vida diária com o objetivo de, com a ajuda de um serviço jurídico de excelência, esclarecer as suas dúvidas porque acreditamos que saber é poder! 

Na nossa plataforma online Reclamar, fazemos a ponte entre empresas e consumidores de forma a encontrar uma solução para diversos conflitos de consumo. 

A juntar a tudo isto empoderamos os nossos subscritores com um programa exclusivo de benefícios! 

A independência, a credibilidade e a proximidade são a base do nosso compromisso na defesa dos direitos do consumidor e o objetivo da nossa atividade diária é contribuir com informação valiosa para tornar os consumidores mais informados, participativos e exigentes. 

Saber é Poder!

Name: Quiet Revolution
Description:
In 2012, Susan Cain wrote a landmark book called “Quiet: The Power of Introverts in a World that Can't Stop Talking.” The book found an enormous global audience—it's been translated into 35 languages—and became the fourth most sold book in the world during 2013. Susan's subsequent TED Talk also went viral and now has over 31 million views, making it one of the most-watched TED Talks of all time. Quiet Revolution was launched soon after, with a mission of unlocking the power of introverts for the benefit of us all.

How does Quiet Revolution make this mission a reality in the workplace? Our proprietary, research-based learning experiences help companies build inclusive cultures that encourage both introverts and extroverts to be their authentic selves and leverage their respective natural strengths to improve personal and company performance.

In addition to Susan Cain’s leadership, we use the latest groundbreaking research by partnering with an advisory board of leading academics and business thinkers including Adam Grant of Wharton, Amy Cuddy of Harvard Business School, Scott Barry Kaufman of the University of Pennsylvania Imagination Institute, Douglas Conant of the Kellogg Executive Leadership Institute, and Brian Little of Cambridge University.

Name: Pluxee Türkiye
Description:
Çalışan deneyimi ve yan haklar dünyasının lideri olarak, yepyeni bir bakış açısıyla çalışanların hayatlarında değer verdikleri deneyimleri diledikleri gibi yaşayabilecekleri renkli bir dünyaya kapı açıyoruz. Misyonumuz net: Çalışanı Mutlu Eden Dünya

Bugün 28 ülkede sunduğumuz kişiselleştirilebilir ve dijital hizmetlerle çalışanların hem iş hem özel yaşamlarına değer katıyoruz. İşini tutkuyla yapan 5.600 kişilik ekibimizle müşterilerimize, tüketicilerimize ve 1,7 milyon üye işyerine her gün daha sorumlu ve sürdürülebilir seçimler yapma imkânı tanıyoruz.

37 milyondan fazla tüketiciye yemek ve gıdadan kültüre, hediye ve sağlıktan mobiliteye uzanan birçok seçenek arasında seçme özgürlüğü sunuyor, tüm ekosistemimiz için sosyal ve ekonomik fayda sağlıyoruz. Türkiye’de Sodexo’dan gelen 30 yılı aşkın deneyimimizle 30 binden fazla kurumsal müşterimize, çalışanlarının hayatlarına anlamlı bir şekilde dokunmaları ve onlarla güçlü bir bağ kurmaları için eşlik ediyor, her gün 120 bin farklı noktadaki üye iş yerinin hayatını kolaylaştırıyoruz.

Pluxee etkisini hissetmek ve bu heyecan verici dünyayı keşfetmek için seni de bekliyoruz

Com uma comunicação intensa, plena e apaixonada, a Tel conecta você ao que te inspira. Entre os clientes estão empresas Aéreas, de Convergência, Bancos, Órgãos Públicos, Telecom, TV por Assinatura, Financeiras e Instituições de Ensino, com suporte técnico para todo o Brasil.

Missão
Superar expectativas por meio de atendimento personalizado, motivação e valorização de pessoas e soluções tecnológicas avançadas.

Visão
Ser reconhecidamente a melhor empresa de serviços de Contact Center do país, figurando entre as cinco maiores do Brasil e América Latina.
