Name: V-Label
Description:
V-Label strives for a world where vegan and vegetarian products are widespread, popular, and easily recognizable.

V-Label is an internationally recognized, registered seal for labelling vegan and vegetarian products and services established in Switzerland in 1996. It is a reliable, go-to shopping guide for consumers. Across the globe, more than 70,000 products from more than 4,800 licensees now carry V-Label.

Name: Plansul - Planejamento e Consultoria
Description:
A Plansul é referência nacional em serviços terceirizados há mais de 40 anos, oferecendo soluções completas em Facilities e Contact Center para empresas públicas e privadas.

Desde 1984, quando iniciou suas operações em Florianópolis (SC), a Plansul atua com transparência, excelência e responsabilidade, apoiando organizações de diferentes portes e setores em todo o Brasil. Nossa presença estratégica e acompanhamento próximo garantem eficiência operacional e a entrega de resultados consistentes.

Com uma equipe de mais de 25 mil colaboradores, levamos mão de obra qualificada e processos bem estruturados para áreas como indústria, saúde, educação, logística, varejo, tecnologia e muito mais.

Nossas principais soluções incluem:
• Limpeza e conservação
• Portaria e recepção
• Apoio técnico, operacional e administrativo
• Televendas
• SAC
• Serviços especializados conforme demanda

Atendemos setores como indústria, saúde, educação, logística, varejo, tecnologia e diversos outros segmentos que exigem equipes preparadas, processos sólidos e resultados consistentes. Entregamos parceria, eficiência e segurança para o funcionamento contínuo das operações.

Plansul: Há mais de quatro décadas, conectando pessoas, operações e resultados!

Foi na sede de Florianópolis(SC) que tudo começou em 1984. Hoje nossos clientes são de várias regiões do Brasil e tem na Plansul um sinônimo de eficiência e segurança.

Estar em pontos operacionais estratégicos também é uma das formas de acompanhar de perto cada projeto implantado e honrar sua execução.

São mais de 25 mil colaboradores trabalhando junto para fazer o melhor. Todos com mão de obra qualificada para atender uma série de necessidades da sua empresa, sendo ela pública ou privada.

Name: Wag! Group Co.
Description:
Wag! Group Co. is the developer of Wag!, the on-demand dog walking platform.

At Wag! we're crazy about dogs and the people who love them, and everything we do is intended to bring them joy and keep them safe. Our company was founded in 2015 and born from a love of dogs and an entrepreneurial spirit with the aim to make pet parenthood just a little bit easier so dogs and their humans can share a fulfilling life full of joyful moments.

We invented on-demand dog walking by connecting an already passionate community of local dog walkers with Pet Parents. Launching in Los Angeles, Wag! services are now available in more than 5,300 cities nationwide. The 500,000 Pet Caregivers using Wag! are thoroughly vetted and pass a rigorous screening process, and our services are bonded and insured.

Wag! donates proceeds from walks to the Greater Good Charities GOODS program, and has already provided more than 16 million meals to shelter dogs in the United States.

Name: Euro NCAP - For Safer Cars, Vans & Trucks
Description: The European New Car Assessment Programme (Euro NCAP) is a European car safety performance assessment programme founded in 1997 by the Transport Research Laboratory for the UK Department for Transport and now the standard throughout Western Europe. Euro NCAP is backed by the governments of UK, France, Germany, Sweden, The Netherlands, Luxemburg and Spain, as well as insurance, motoring and consumer organisations. Euro NCAP publishes safety reports on new cars, and awards 'star ratings' based on the performance of the vehicles in a variety of crash tests, including front, side and pole impacts, and impacts with pedestrians. Furthermore it promotes Electronic Stability Control, Seat Belt Reminders and Speed limiters. The top overall rating is five stars.

Name: Amigos do CX
Description:
Transformar o mercado de Customer Experience (CX) com conexões genuínas e aprendizado verdadeiramente colaborativo.

Na Comunidade Amigos do CX, acreditamos que o sucesso do mercado não está apenas nas ferramentas ou processos, mas nas pessoas. Há 8 anos, criamos um espaço pensando em quem faz acontecer no dia a dia: os profissionais apaixonados por CX, que enxergam além dos desafios e se dedicam a construir experiências que realmente impactam clientes e colaboradores.

Nosso propósito é acelerar o desenvolvimento e a maturidade do mercado, conectando mentes brilhantes, trocando boas práticas e oferecendo experiências transformadoras. Aqui, não se trata apenas de aprender ou trocar ideias, mas de elevar a qualidade das conexões humanas e colocar o Brasil como referência global em Experiência do Cliente.

Somos a ponte entre diálogos significativos, aprendizados reais e impactos concretos. Não estamos aqui apenas para observar as transformações, estamos liderando esse movimento, construindo juntos um mercado mais inovador, humano e colaborativo.

Name: AMA - Alberta Motor Association
Description:
AMA is a multi-service organization representing 1 million Albertans. While most often known for our roadside assistance program, we also offer travel, registries and insurance services, Alberta’s largest driver education school, a member rewards program and member events in our communities. Part of the CAA and AAA family, we’re focused on our member’s needs and guided by their values to provide products, services and advocacy to help them live confidently.

Anyone here will tell you that we’re a different kind of employer, and it all comes down to how we treat our members - and each other. We've boiled it down to just two words: Practically Family. That’s not just a catchy phrase, we live it every day through simple gestures. 

Practically Family is the web developer heading off shift who stops to help a team member carry items in the door, the insurance advisor who uses their break to pick up an extra coffee for a co-worker who’s having a bad day, or the registries agent who takes the time to help a member put their new licence plate on their vehicle. Not to mention all the birthday parties, free food days and wedding showers we throw for each other!

Taking care of one another, encouraging one another. It’s what family does, and what being Practically Family is all about. If you can picture yourself answering yes to the question, “Am I treating this member or colleague like a close family member or friend?” with every interaction, you’re our kind of people!

Description:

Derived from the umbrella strategy that affirms ADAC as a membership-based mobility service provider and a result of more than 100 years of history, which also stands for the company's consistency as an employer, this is not just a promise to our members, but also a claim to the employees of all ADAC units.

Our foundation for strategic alignment is the membership organization, which is why protection and representation of our members are key elements that are reflected in the organization of a 3-pillar structure:

• ADAC e.V. - is an ideal association - contains central member services such as Roadside Assistance, Consumer Protection, Motorsport, Tourism, Legal Center (membership consultation), traffic and the club magazine "ADAC Motorwelt" 
• ADAC SE - Commercial activities (such as insurance, car rental, financial services) are grouped together in a separate, clearly separated joint stock company
• ADAC Stiftung - Here the non-profit activities (such as air rescue, charitable individual assistance, traffic education, mobility research, motor sport safety) of the ADAC are bundled
 

The ADAC as an employer - more exciting and varied than imagined

Discover the diversity of the ADAC and the wide range of possibilities

What we do is fueled by the joy of helping and the enthusiasm of being here for others - this is also the best prerequisite for you to write your personal success story at ADAC. With great commitment, team spirit and conviction, our employees ensure that all services and products are provided in the best quality and for the benefit of our members.

Name: dbm contact center
Description:
A dbm Contact Center foi fundada em 1996 e possui sede própria em Curitiba. Nós fornecemos soluções omnichannel e multicanal de atendimento e relacionamento para empresas de diversos portes e segmentos, promovendo a busca constante por qualidade e produtividade.

Somos o SAC, a Central de Relacionamento, Vendas, Pós-Vendas e Ouvidoria de algumas das maiores e mais renomadas organizações nacionais e multinacionais. Além disso, oferecemos as mesmas soluções de excelência para pequenas e médias empresas. Gerenciamos atendimentos e contatos via telefone, e-mail, chat, WhatsApp, redes sociais e outras mídias.

Com projetos versáteis e flexíveis, reconhecidos anualmente com premiações de destaque no mercado, contamos com uma equipe de gestores operacionais, recursos humanos, administrativos e de inteligência extremamente preparada para o mercado de atendimento. Nós trabalhamos utilizando a estrutura de nossa sede ou também no formato In Company, onde as empresas contam com nossa expertise dentro de sua estrutura própria.

Também fornecemos locação de infraestrutura física e tecnológica para empresas que desejam manter sua equipe de atendimento própria, usufruindo de um ambiente moderno, agradável, ergonômico e tecnológico.

Name: Al Musbah Group
Description:
Al Musbah Group (AMG) is  a successful network of companies thriving in diverse businesses across Saudi Arabia. Starting as a retailer of perfumes, joined by cosmetics and gift items, the Group produces its own line of fragrances and cosmetics under its brand Al Musbah , while their Xplora brand of travel accessories was launched in 2004. In addition, AMG has a Strong retail chain with more than 150 retail showrooms at major shopping malls in number of cities; SENSI and ALMUSBAH.

Diversifying and expanding business into real estate, travel retail, information technology, telecommunications, construction, parking, auto dealership, food & beverage and hospitality, the Group has nearly 200 retail outlets in Saudi Arabia, together with the Saudi Duty Free shops. 

The Duty Free Shops – the first of its kind in the Kingdom – commenced operations in 2013 at the North and South terminals of King Abdulaziz International Airport, Jeddah.. In partnership with World Duty Free Group, Al Musbah Group has since opened new duty free outlets in Riyadh and Dammam.

Also in 2013, the Group took over the operations of 14 airport lounges across the Kingdom, offering their luxury brand of Meet & Greet services through their hospitality unit, Meeza. 
While its work force of nearly 5000 employees is given the power to exercise initiative, regular training, seminars and workshops  keep them up to speed with trends and customer needs.

Currently AMG is involved in initiating  paid parking with the construction of on-street parking in Jeddah and Dammam, while Meeza continues to upgrade VIP lounges with contemporary design and luxury facilities. With a resolute aim to set the region’s benchmark in the hospitality industry at a global high, it won’t be long before Meeza Hotels, travel offices, and enhanced services covering F&B and luxury private car services, join the lineup.

Name: QNET Ltd
Description:
QNET is a prominent lifestyle and wellness company that uses a direct selling business model to offer a wide selection of exclusive products that enable individuals to embrace a healthier, more balanced life. Name: RAC WA
Description:
At RAC we offer career opportunities that will allow you to give back and make a difference to our members and the WA community. We pride ourselves on employing the highest calibre of people to meet our member’s needs. RAC promotes healthy living and aims to protect health and safety of employees, members and visitors.

RAC has been a part of the West Australian community since 1905. We are unique organisation, built by members for members. From our origins as a motoring club, we have grown to a diverse organisation of over 1,400 employees serving more than 1 million members with a range of products and services. RAC’s difference is that we are a membership organisation, which means we don't have shareholders and we reinvest our profits for the better of our members and the WA community.

House rules:
We really enjoy receiving your feedback, comments and experiences and enjoy getting the most out of our LinkedIn community. With this in mind, we ask that you stick to the following guidelines:

• Please be polite to other RAC LinkedIn users and treat each other as you would like to be treated.

• Please don’t give out any personal information.

• We cannot allow any inappropriate or offensive language.

• Advertising, spam, selling and links to external shopping sites are not allowed here and will be removed. 

• If you want to post a link to another site to illustrate your point, please do not link to sites that require registration in order to view, or any site that prompts an automatic download as these comments will be removed.

• Page admins and the RAC LinkedIn community must be able to easily understand your message. For this reason we can't allow messages which are written in code or a language which isn’t English.

• We reserve the right to de-tag RAC from any posts or photos that we deem inappropriate.

• Please note that repeat offenders may be reported and will be blocked from the LinkedIn page.

Name: DrinkPrime
Description:
About DrinkPrime

At DrinkPrime, we started with a personal challenge: How can we ensure access to clean, safe, and healthy drinking water?

As we delved deeper, we discovered that this issue extended far beyond us. Most of the water delivered in plastic cans is not fit for drinking, and less than 5% of Indians own a water purifier. What began as a personal problem soon turned into a mission to help millions of people across India access safe drinking water.

Founded seven years ago, DrinkPrime has grown from a simple idea to a trusted solution for over 3 lakh households across 9 cities in India. Our smart, tech-enabled water purifiers are designed to address the water quality challenges unique to Indian households, providing affordable and reliable access to safe drinking water.

At DrinkPrime, we are committed to making safe drinking water accessible for all. Join us in our mission to transform how people experience clean water.

Name: AAA Mountain West Group
Description:
AAA. Always here for our Members, communities, and you.

Welcome to AAA Mountain West Group. For well over a century, we’ve continued our long-standing commitment to diligently serve our Members and communities. We have achieved this, and our exemplary reputation, by delivering our wide range of services that span from the roadside assistance we’re famous for; to automobile, homeowners, life and other personal lines of insurance; as well as travel services; and discounts that allow our Members to enjoy life both on and off the road. 

Beyond the top services we offer, there is still so much more to AAA. We also lead the way in the advocacy for alternative fuels and vehicles, encourage our employees to take advantage of the ability to volunteer their time to deserving organizations and causes in our communities, and offer an array of community focused programs such as car seat installation, teen safe driving, approved auto repair, and AAA battery round-up.

Naturally, our leadership and excellence means finding the right individuals driven to continue and support the AAA commitment to serving our Members. We’re always looking for passionate people just like you to bring your unique perspectives and ideas to strengthen our team. Joining AAA means the opportunity to be yourself while building a successful career. Name: Superpedestrian
Description:
Superpedestrian is a transportation robotics company located in Cambridge, MA. Founded out of MIT in 2013, Superpedestrian develops technologies for micro-electric vehicles that optimize safety, reliability, and performance. 

Superpedestrian spent over 4 years developing its proprietary Vehicle Intelligence System (VIS), which was first introduced in the company’s consumer product, the Copenhagen Wheel. Since 2018, Superpedestrian has focused its efforts on engineering and validating its new electric scooter for shared fleets. In 2020, the company launched its vehicles under the brand name LINK. 

Featuring the mature VIS platform, Superpedestrian’s fleet scooter can detect and protect against more than 100 common malfunctions.  This platform of embedded computers and cloud software enables Superpedestrian’s scooters to autonomously protect from damage during and between rides. Within nanoseconds, the scooters can detect potential problems such as battery fires, short circuits, or failed brakes, and take corrective action to avert damage. 

Vehicle Intelligence prevents over 50% of issues that would cause other scooters to fail, and streamlines operations if issues arise. If the scooter can’t protect itself, it automatically becomes unavailable for rental and generates a detailed service ticket for repair. The result is a substantial improvement in vehicle safety for scooter riders and major cost savings for fleet operators. 

Superpedestrian is re-engineering micromobility, one vehicle at a time.

Name: UFC-Que Choisir
Description:
L'UFC-Que Choisir est une association loi de 1901 ayant pour objet d'informer, de conseiller et de défendre les consommateurs. 

L'Union Fédérale des Consommateurs est la première association de consommateurs en France, elle intervient grâce à différents leviers :

• L’action nationale et l’action locale : Découvrez et participez aux combats de l’UFC-Que Choisir aux plans national et local pour faire avancer les droits des consommateurs. Banque, Énergie, Logement, Alimentation, Santé, Environnement, Télécommunications : aucun secteur n’échappe à la vigilance et à l’action de l’UFC-Que Choisir.

• La presse écrite : Entrez dans les coulisses de la consommation grâce aux magazines Que Choisir, recevez toute l’actualité liée à la consommation, des tests comparatifs, des dossiers complets, des enquêtes sur le terrain et profitez des produits et services au meilleur rapport qualité/prix.
 
• La presse numérique : QueChoisir.Org, le site au service des consommateurs. Un comparateur de produits performant, des essais comparatifs de produits régulièrement mis à jour, des résultats que vous pouvez trier selon vos besoins, par marques, par prix, par fonctions… Retrouvez plus de 600 produits testés en continu.

• L’édition de livres thématiques : Depuis 2009, l’UFC-Que Choisir publie, via sa filiale Que Choisir Édition, des ouvrages de référence très complets pour répondre aux questions que se posent les consommateurs. 

L'indépendance étant une valeur fondamentale de l'UFC-Que Choisir, nos revues sont sans publicité et ne vivent que des recettes liées aux abonnements papier/web, aux magazines en kiosque et aux livres.

Nous contacter :
Union Fédérale des Consommateurs - Que Choisir
233 boulevard Voltaire, 75011 Paris.
Tél. : 01 43 48 55 48 - Télécopie : 01 43 48 44 35
Trouver l'association locale la plus proche : http://www.quechoisir.org/un-litige

Name: Mohamed Yousuf Naghi & Brothers Group
Description:
The Yousuf M.A.Naghi & Sons Group has its origins back in 1911 (G) when a local Jeddah resident, Mohamed Abdulwahab Naghi laid the foundations for the company. Not only did he start a small distribution business in Balad, Jeddah, but at the same time he also started what was to become an enduring tradition for innovative marketing. Innovation being the key word as he was one of the first in Saudi Arabia to use company-branded delivery trucks to improve name recognition. The business expanded and flourished and the Naghi name became synonymous as being one of major players in the kingdom’s developing economy.
Mohamed Abdulwahab’s son, the late Yousuf M.A.Naghi, built up the present group to its present status and reputation.
Today the group is jointly managed by Yousuf M.A.Naghi’s four sons, Mohamed, Yaser, Saleh and Ammar, all of whom who use the best of the company’s longstanding experience, management and marketing skills, financial strength and local expertise to continue to build the business not only in Saudi Arabia but also in the Middle East.
The group has diversified its activities into the Service, Catering, Transportation and Manufacturing sectors.
With its headquarters in Jeddah, the group operates throughout the kingdom of Saudi Arabia with a comprehensive network of offices, warehouses and showrooms as well as active companies in the UAE and Egypt.
In terms of market sectors the company is involved in the following:
•	Automotive, from Luxury Cars to Commercial Vehicles & Buses
•	Consumer Goods and Foodstuffs (FMCG)
•	Electronic and Electrical Goods
•	Operation and Maintenance Services
•	Catering and Restaurant Operations
•	Retail Outlets
•	Perfumes, Cosmetics and Personal Care products
•	Pharmaceuticals, Medical Technologies and Services
•	Transportation, Pullman Coaches, Hajj Buses and Mini Buses
•	Foodstuff Production and Packing
•	Insurance & Risk Management Services
•	Hajj & Umrah Service & Transportation Packages

Name: Jawed Habib Hair & Beauty Limited
Description:
Jawed Habib Hair and Beauty Ltd. is one of the earliest and the finest hair and beauty salons in India. Through these years, we have won the trust of several celebrities and millions of commoners who are our loyal patrons today. Besides this, we also help aspiring stylists achieve their dreams, with Jawed Habib Academy, our chain of hair education schools spread across India. Operating in 24 states and 110 cities in the country, we currently have 875 outlets in addition to establishments in Singapore, Kenya, Dubai, Bangladesh, Nepal. Through our professional services, we relentlessly strive to give our customers an experience that they would love to revisit.

 

We’ve evolved together as a family over the last 3 generations and have espoused a culture of science and understanding that is used to style hair. Our employees are our assets who are meticulously trained on the innumerable scientific methods of hair cutting and styling that would directly benefit our treasured customers. To be even more specific, the methodology that we follow is what we call science-based styling and not just styling based on products.

 

JH and its subsidiaries together constitute a huge family of 10000 employees. Unanimously, we all work towards the goal of ensuring complete customer satisfaction and boosting their confidence levels with the right grooming. This is one of the primary reasons why we encourage feedback from our customers – to understand if there is some room for improvement.

 

Our vision is to organize the muddled hair industry prevailing in the country today and hoist it to a level where it equals global standards. Training aspiring talents and regularly upgrading their skills is our modest way of benefiting people connected to this part of the grooming market. We hope to see the practice go global very soon.

Name: Spectro Analytical Labs Limited.
Description:
Spectro Analytical Labs came into existence in the year 1995 and since then it has kept itself on the track of perpetual growth and development. Their consistent hard work and dedication of over 20 years helped them to emerge as a Multi Disciplinary Lab. 

Spectro was the very first Lab in India to give direct print outs instantly on reading OES Spectrophotometer. Today, it has made itself capable of Testing and Inspecting all the Engineering Materials, Building Materials, Minerals, Food & Agro Products, Rubbers & Polymers, Coal & Petroleum Products and also deals with Environmental Monitoring. 

Starting from a small set up in New Delhi, it has become India’s foremost Analytical Laboratory with several Branches and Joint Ventures all over the country. The Central Lab and Head Office is established at Okhla, New Delhi and another Lab and Corporate Office recently established at Greater Noida is probably the largest infrastructures among all the Private Labs in India. 

Spectro has inculcated strong analytical capabilities to directly assist clients and support in-house Quality Assurance as well as Research Projects. We offer complete Testing Services, all under one roof for endless list of products and materials in the different fields. We own the most prestigious Accreditation by NABL in six field viz. Chemical, Mechanical, Microbiology, Non-Destructive Testing, Calibration and Electrical & Electronics fields.
 
We offer services for Third Party Inspection for Quality, Quantity and Packaging besides pre-dispatch Shipment Inspections and Consultancy Services for setting up Laboratories, ETP Designing and Maintenance, RLA Studies, NDT and Failure Studies. We organize Training Programs for fresher and also for experienced Analysts, Engineers, Managers, etc. belonging to various industries who are in search of upgrading their knowledge.

Name: THE TEN SPOT beauty bar
Description:
THE TEN SPOT is north america’s fastest growing beauty bar. a celebrated brand, THE TEN SPOT is led by creator and ceo kristen gale, one of the north america's most recognized young leaders and entrepreneurs. 

in 2006, kristen saw an opportunity to close the beauty market gap between the cheap and often-questionable nail shops and expense and often over-the-top spas. kristen envisioned an offering that combined the efficiency of the nail salons with the service excellence of spas. 

kristen harnessed the perfect storm of concept, timing, and market. she targeted the massive demographic of women aged 18 – 65 with a goal to deliver what all busy women want: a one-stop-shop for getting all their beauty maintenance services in one “spot”.

in 2012, the first franchise opportunities were created to fuel THE TEN SPOT’s growth. expansion into the us soon followed. the original canadian corporate locations were sold to eager franchise partners and kristen and her team set their sights on taking over (the beauty bar) world. THE TEN SPOT culture is a true reflection of its brand: fun, creative, and committed to excellence.

the future is beyond bright, there are 43 beauty bars operational with compelling strategies in place to drive sustained sales growth and recurring revenues of current and future bars through expanded service offerings, membership programs, and proprietary products. 

we’re continuing to grow the beauty of our impact by opening bars in newly available territories across canada and the usa. connect with our franchise development expert,  beyourownboss@thetenspot.com to learn more about new and existing opportunities.

Name: Alliances Françaises in India
Description:
The Alliance françaises in India are local chapters of the worldwide network of Alliance française which was founded in 1883 in Paris to promote French language and culture around the world. Its 834 branches, including the 14 centers in India, are meeting places for people who share a common appreciation for France, its language and its culture and want to learn more about it.

Alliances françaises are locally registered Indian associations which offer French language classes and organise a diverse array of activities and events in the areas of higher education and visual and performing arts. They are officially recognized by the Embassy of France in India for the organization of the DELF-DALF examinations for testing one’s proficiency in the French language. The 14 Alliances française in India are located in New Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, Chennai, Kolkata, Bangalore, Trivandrum, Goa, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Lucknow, Pondicherry, Chandigarh and Bhopal and have 19 annexes, covering the vast majority of the Indian territory. They participate actively in the cultural life of India and act as a dynamic platform for bilateral exchanges in education, arts and culture.

Name: Inburg
Description:
Turn Walk-Bys into Walk-Ins

Inburg is a patent-pending merchant network built for retail growth. It helps brands drive new footfall and repeat purchases through personalized, in-store discount coupons.

Nearly 61% of retail decision-makers say footfall is either stagnant or falling (Deloitte, 2024). At the same time, 78% of retail marketing budgets still go into offline promotions, yet fewer than 10% of marketers feel confident measuring the return on that spend.

Inburg solves this with a performance-based model that tracks walk-ins and conversions without any upfront ad spend. When a customer purchases at any participating store, they get a personalized coupon for a different store or brand in the network, encouraging repeat engagement and cross-store growth.

No commissions are exchanged between participating brands. Instead, Inburg earns only when a coupon is redeemed, making it a transparent, result-oriented system.

Power your deals and discoounts with Inburg

Founded in 2009 by CEO and entrepreneur Britnie Turner, the Aerial Group manages a portfolio of businesses across multiple disciplines with the sole focus of elevating people and places in order to develop nations by using business as a force for good.

AERIAL DEVELOPMENT GROUP
Nashville-based residential and commercial development company that revitalizes urban neighborhoods through renovation and infill by working with neighbors and community leaders.

Multi-family residential properties that encourage creative growth, build community and support the development of lifelong relationships.

A full-spectrum emergency management firm with a mission to save lives through risk mitigation, effective response, and accelerated recovery.

Media production firm that utilizes media to promote great causes, people, and ideas in order to accelerate positive transformation around the world. 

AERIAL GLOBAL COMMUNITY
A 501(c)(3) non-profit dedicated to supporting and rebuilding nations by giving models of volunteer opportunities, direct project sponsorships, skill donation, and awareness building. 

HISTORY OF AERIAL
Entrepreneur Britnie Turner is obsessed with transformation. Her original desire was to be a missionary in Africa but after visiting several times she became frustrated that she wasn’t helping in a sustainable way. She decided to use her passion for helping others to build companies that Elevate People and Places, solving root issues in developing nations as their very core of business. In 2009 Britnie founded the Aerial Group, and since then, has formed multiple companies under the Aerial brand that empower people, sustain the planet, and utilize business as a force for good.

En chemin, nous avons découvert une merveilleuse communauté de lecteurs passionnés. Leur amour des mots et des histoires nous a inspirés à aller plus loin. Nous avons réalisé que le livre, sous toutes ses formes, mérite d’être célébré et soutenu.

Parce que nous en sommes convaincus, le livre évolue avec nous. La technologie, loin d’enterrer la lecture, la réinvente et l’enrichit, ouvrant des horizons nouveaux pour tous les passionnés de lecture.

Aujourd’hui, notre mission est simple : partager l’amour de la lecture sous toutes ses formes. Comment ? En offrant aux les lecteurs de nouvelles façons d’acheter, d’échanger et d’apprécier les livres, mais aussi par le soutien des auteurs et de tous ceux qui font vivre les livres.

At Dharmik, we believe spirituality is not just a practice but a lifestyle that can be cherished every day. From artisanal products inspired by ancient traditions to innovative spiritual tools, we aim to create offerings that are premium, authentic, and meaningful.

Our vision is to build a brand that bridges the gap between tradition and modernity, inspiring individuals to embrace their spiritual roots while exploring new ways of connecting with their beliefs. Whether it’s through beautifully crafted rituals, personalized spiritual journeys, or empowering communities, Dharmik is here to make spirituality accessible, relevant, and enriching.

Our Core Pillars
- Authenticity: Staying true to the ancient wisdom of Sanatan Dharma while presenting it in a modern, premium format.
- Innovation: Creating products and experiences that combine tradition with technology to enhance spiritual practices.
- Premium Quality: Offering top-notch craftsmanship and design to elevate the spiritual lifestyle.
- Community: Building a global community of individuals who share a love for spirituality, tradition, and conscious living.

With Dharmik, we aim to empower individuals to embrace spirituality in their daily lives, using thoughtful, high-quality products and services that honor the rich heritage of Hindu culture while meeting the demands of modern living.

Description:
We at SALAO Co. are collaborating with cosmetics firms and fashion stylists.

What do we do? 
We provide internationally recognized qualifications for proficiency in professional Beauty Salons application techniques. 

What makes our qualifications special? 
Our qualifications are aimed specifically at Beauty Salon application for Beauty Salons – they are not vague ‘beauty’ qualifications for therapists or beauticians. We have a modern approach with realistic and contemporary criteria that are relevant to today’s Beauty industry. 

Who do we serve? 
We provide an industry benchmark for Cosmetologists and those who want to employ them. To hold a qualification, you must first have achieved a high level of skill in your field, thereby a potential employer or agent can be assured of your talent and credentials. For the qualified Cosmetologists, we offer a referral resource – simply agree to have an email link from our site and potential employers can reach you and you can follow up jobs that are posted on the Jobs Board Who uses our qualifications? 

Most Cosmetic Salon houses who employ counter staff would require a recognized independent qualification to show that the employee has the basic level of understanding in hygiene, application and client care. Any professional who wishes to receive insurance for public liability or against loss or damage to equipment such as your Cosmetologist kit through BABTAC you must hold a recognized qualification through an independent awarding body.

Name: Focusmate
Description:
Focusmate changes the way you work by connecting you to other professionals who have committed to being accountable for finishing their most important work.

Name: Roni Chaves
Description:

Com matriz em Caxias do Sul (RS), área física de mais de 10.000 m² e filiais estratégicas em Canoas, Ijuí, Passo Fundo, Pelotas, Içara, Araquari e um Centro de Distribuição no Espírito Santo, a Roni Chaves oferece cobertura ampliada e agilidade na entrega de peças para veículos pesados em diferentes regiões do Brasil.

Nosso portfólio reúne mais de 50.000 itens e 300 marcas em componentes para cabines, câmbios, cardan, chassis, cubos e rodas, diferenciais, direção, freios, elétrica, embreagem, faixas refletivas, trucks, carretas, motores, sistemas de arrefecimento e exaustão. Para facilitar a compra e atender necessidades específicas, contamos com catálogo digital, e-commerce e uma equipe qualificada focada em atendimento consultivo. 

Ao longo de mais de seis décadas, construímos uma reputação de tradição, ética e solidez, reconhecida por clientes e profissionais do setor. Internamente, esse legado se traduz em um ambiente de respeito, parceria e aprendizado prático, com colaboradores que sentem orgulho de vestir a marca e fazer parte da sua história. 

Hoje, somos mais de 340 colaboradores e 18.000 clientes, conectados pelo mesmo propósito: entregar soluções em autopeças com qualidade, segurança e confiança das melhores marcas. Se você é cliente, parceiro ou profissional interessado em atuar no segmento de veículos pesados, acompanhe nossa página para conhecer bastidores, oportunidades de carreira e novidades da Roni Chaves.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Registry of Interpreters for the Deaf, Inc.
Partnership for Food Safety Education
Description:
The Partnership for Food Safety Education (PFSE) delivers trusted, science-based behavioral health messaging and a network of resources that support consumers in their efforts to reduce risk of foodborne illness.  

The Partnership is the creator and steward of the Fight BAC! consumer food safety education campaign and its core four evidence-based messages of Clean, Separate, Cook and Chill. 

In 2022 the Partnership recognizes the 25th anniversary of its founding as a public-private collaboration to support consumers.  

The Partnership unites representatives from industry associations, professional societies in food science and nutrition, consumer groups, the United States Department of Agriculture, and, from the Department of Health and Human Services, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, and the Food and Drug Administration, to educate the public about the importance of safe food handling to good health.  

More information about the Partnership can be found at www.fightbac.org.  Stakeholders are urged to join the Partnership's free weekly E-card list by signing up at www.fightbac.org.

Name: SimplePay Zrt.
Description:
A SimplePay Zrt. az OTP Csoport tagjaként 2013-ben alakult azzal a céllal, hogy új fintech megoldásokat fejlesszen ki a mindennapi élet megkönnyítésére. 
A cég 2014 nyarán tette elérhetővé a Simple alkalmazást, amivel egyszerűbbé tette a fizetési folyamatot, és egyenesen élményszerűvé a vásárlást. Az alkalmazásban az olyan mindennapos tevékenységek mellett, mint a közterületi parkolás kifizetése vagy az autópálya-matrica vásárlás, megvehetjük a mozi-, koncert- vagy akár színházjegyünket, buszjegyünket és bérletünket, hívhatunk taxit vagy rendelhetünk ételt is. Sőt már biztosítást is köthetünk autónkra vagy mobilunkra, vagy befizethetjük általa csekkjeinket. Az első pillanattól kiemelten fontosak felhasználóink visszajelzései, mert ezek alapján fejlesztjük az alkalmazást, ami 2017 júniusától érintéses mobilfizetésre is alkalmas. 2023-ban pedig ismét megújult a Simple app dizájnja és funkcionalitása.
A cég nem csak a B2C piacon van jelen termékeivel, hiszen a 2015 decemberében bevezetett SimplePay termékével online fizetési megoldást is kínál. A SimplePay rendszerét közel 20 ezer vállalkozás veszi igénybe.
Emellett 2020-ban a fizikai kártyaelfogadás felé is nyitott a vállalat, a SimplePay Telefonos POS alkalmazás segítségével gördülékenyen kínálhatnak érintéses fizetési opciót a vállalkozások, üzletek.

Name: PS Salon & Spa
Description:
PS Salon & Spa is the national leader in providing exceptional salon & spa experiences for residents, their families, and senior living community partners.

Launched in August 2008 with the simple goal of transforming “beauty shops” into professional salons & spas, today PS supports 1,250+ licensed, infection-controlled senior community salon operations in 36 states with our unparalleled resources:

People & Products

All 1,500+ Team PS members share an unwavering commitment to our core values of People, Empathy and Respect.  With exclusive support from the pro beauty industry’s product and education leader, Paul Mitchell, we deliver professional services to 20,000+ residents each week – often as many as 50% of a community’s population every month.  
From traditional hair and nail services to cutting-edge color techniques and commercial spa-quality gel / acrylic nails, our ‘PS Pros’ offer something for every resident across all levels of the care continuum.

Technology & Family Engagement

Our proprietary Point of Sale and ‘Celebration Account’ rewards program provide residents, families and POAs with both in-salon and online Payment and Gifting Options. Families of residents in Memory Care, Skilled Nursing and Assisted Living communities can manage payment and authorize services / service frequency online.
Promotional videos, seasonal marketing and other digital assets are curated for each community’s specific media platforms and resident-family engagement Apps.

Space Design

PS Design & Procurement provides expertise in senior community salon & spa design, space planning, and resident-appropriate salon equipment selection and procurement.

To learn more, please visit www.salonps.com

Name: DEAF Inc.
Description:
Mission

The mission of Deaf Empowerment Awareness Foundation, Inc. is to Empower, raise Awareness, and bridge a sustainable Foundation of communication and equal access to both the deaf/hard of hearing and the hearing communities in the St. Louis metro area.

Vision

The organization’s primary vision is to provide services for deaf/hard of hearing, hearing individuals, and the community in the St. Louis metro area as a whole to ensure effective communication and cultural awareness. This purpose is accomplished through a meaningful unity of community outreach, training, education, advocacy, media, visual arts, and interpreting. The vision reflects a strong sense of community where the deaf/hard of hearing and hearing communities are empowered and aware of the importance of equal access to all.

Of, By, For and With the Deaf

DEAF, Inc. is a non-profit 501(c)(3) organization created by deaf individuals. DEAF, Inc. provides high-quality interpreting services at the lowest prices in an effort to enable the deaf and hard of hearing to freely interact with the mainstream society. 100% of all net proceeds go to programs designed to promote awareness of issues related to deaf and hard of hearing communities.

The Lash Lounge was created by Founder and CIO Anna Phillips in 2006, the result of her passion for helping women feel better about themselves and wanting to offer the same business opportunity to others. Name: Coniche
Description:
Klantcontact is een vak apart. Een vak dat Coniche als de beste verstaat. Een vak dat onze ervaren trainers en consultants al meer dan 30 jaar met veel liefde en passie bijbrengen.

𝗢𝗻𝘇𝗲 𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗲? 𝗡𝗲𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗸𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗴𝗲𝗱𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻 𝗺𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗻!

Wij vinden namelijk dat de wereld een stuk klantvriendelijker mag zijn en willen aan heel Nederland laten zien hoe belangrijk goed klantcontact is. We strijden om klantcontact beter op de kaart te zetten.

Dagelijks helpen we onze klanten en studenten hoe zij het beste om kunnen gaan met hun eigen klanten.

Dit doen we met onze diensten op het gebied van advies, interim management, recruitment, training en (erkende) opleiding.

𝗛𝗼𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝗷 𝗱𝗶𝘁 𝗱𝗼𝗲𝗻?
Door te werken vanuit een compleet zelfsturende organisatie. We geloven er heilig in dat zelfsturende teams, waarin altijd ruimte is voor persoonlijke inbreng, de beste teams zijn die er bestaan.   

𝗪𝗮𝗮𝗿 𝗸𝘂𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗻 𝘄𝗶𝗷 𝗷𝗼𝘂 𝗺𝗲𝗲 𝗵𝗲𝗹𝗽𝗲𝗻?
Met een totaalaanpak. Coniche helpt je bij klantcontact, van A tot Z. We helpen bij het vormgeven van een heldere klantcontactstrategie en adviseren bij de implementatie. Denk hierbij aan veranderprocessen, teamperformance (high performing teams) en learning & development.

Interim management
Wij leveren interim managers en teamleiders via een eigen kernteam en een selectief netwerk van associates. Ook helpen wij klanten met recruitment van nieuw talent.

Trainingen en erkende opleidingen
Coniche Business School verzorgt allerlei trainingen en opleidingen op het gebied van klantcontact. Ons aanbod bestaat uit maatwerk trainingen, e-learnings, masterclasses en workshops. Maar ook erkende opleidingen op mbo, hbo en mba niveau.

Online learning content
Naast onze trainingen en opleidingen bieden we ook online learning content aan: online trainingen waarbij specifieke vaardigheden in klantcontact op ieder moment van de dag getraind worden.

Wij maken graag kennis! https://coniche.nl/coniche/contact/

Name: D-Congress
Description:
D-Congress is the meeting place where the leading actors in commerce gather to inspire and be inspired about the latest trends shaping the commerce of tomorrow.

D-Congress is organized by Svensk Handel and is Sweden's most popular and largest meeting place for digital commerce. Every year, more than 2,800 participants, over 100 exhibitors, and more than 100 speakers meet at Svenska Mässan in Gothenburg. Everyone in the industry is there!

History

D-Congress was first organized in 2015 by Svensk Digital Handel and Svensk Handel at Svenska Mässan in Gothenburg, but it has a history that dates back to 1973 when the Mail Order Association, an interest organization for distance trade in Sweden, was formed and organized annual meetings in Borås, including the Distance Trade Day.

Between the years 2008-2022, D-Congress and its predecessor in Borås were owned by Svensk Handel's wholly-owned subsidiary Svensk Digital Handel AB. On January 1, 2023, Svensk Digital Handel was merged with the parent company Svensk Handel, which continues to organize D-Congress.

Name: Testachats / Testaankoop
Description:
Testaankoop / Testachats, founded in 1957,  is part of an association of  consumer organizations throughout Europe and Latin-America. Our mission is to defend and protect consumers’ rights, to seek solutions for their consumer related problems, and  to help them to assert their rights (freedom of choice, access to information, access to justice, right to education, health, safety and a healthy environment). 

By conducting comparative studies and tests and by highlighting the products and services with the best price-quality ratio, we actively contribute to the further development and improvement of consumer products and services.  Information about our studies is available via our website, magazines, practical guides, and our individual help service with a team of dedicated agents who deal with individual consumer questions. In addition, we represent consumers in several national and international commissions and government institutions. We negotiate legal and economic advantages for consumers and we defend their rights by means of judicial actions.

Our work for the consumer is primarily led by our 3 key values: Expertise, Independence, and Proximity. Our credibility depends on the expertise of over 300 specialists, our thorough and transparent methodology and our high professional and ethical standards. We are proud to conduct our mission in complete independency and neutrality, both from a financial and political as from an ideological point of view.

Name: Roof Maxx
Description:
Roof Maxx is the world's first asphalt roof rejuvenator. Roof Maxx's all-natural bio-oil replaces dried-out petrochemical oil to allow for daily expansion and contraction, essential to longevity and performance. 

An easy, spray-on application, Roof Maxx extends a roof’s service life for a fraction of the cost of roof replacement.

Our vision at Roof Maxx is to be a positive force in roofing sustainability through the increased service life of asphalt shingle roofing systems. To accomplish this we've partnered with world-class organizations like Airable Labs, The Ohio State University and The Ohio Soybean Council.

The Story Behind Roof Maxx Technologies:

From humble beginnings in 1988, Mike and Todd Feazel built one of America’s premier roof replacement contracting firms, selling that business in 2012 to focus solely on a sustainable solution for increasing the life of asphalt shingle roofs.

Mike Feazel is the co-founder and Chief Executive Officer at Roof Maxx Technologies. Mike co-founded Roofers Success International, wrote a monthly column for Roofing Contractor Magazine, and was featured on the cover of Successful Contractor Magazine—titled—Elevating An Industry. 
 
Todd Feazel is the co-founder and EVP of Manufacturing at Roof Maxx Technologies. Todd sat on the National Advisory Council for North America's largest roofing manufacturer, helping design one of the first Certified Contractor programs in the country.

These local partnerships help Spruce provide a higher quality service than is achievable through independent contractors, and Spruce passes scale benefits through to residents in the form of lower prices.

Name: PetSafe Brands
Description:
PetSafe Brands is the leading manufacturer of pet products with an overall purpose of unleashing freedom for pet parents by keeping their pets happy, healthy, and safe.  Our family of brands include PetSafe (www.petsafe.com), Invisible Fence Brand (www.invisiblefence.com), SportDOG (www.sportdog.com), Kurgo (www.kurgo.com) and Premier Pet (www.premierpet.com). We are a company driven by innovation and dedication to our customers and communities. Since our founding in 1991, PetSafe Brands has grown into an international corporation selling in over 52 countries and is expanding its reach every day. Our portfolio includes a wide array of electronic training and containment systems, waste management products, fountains, pet doors, innovative treats and much more. We are headquartered in Knoxville, TN but have remote offices in various places across the globe. 

At PetSafe Brands, we have an open environment in all of our offices which lends itself to collaboration and a team-oriented culture. We are dedicated to offering equal employment opportunity for all teammates and fostering a work environment free of discrimination and harassments.

We have a culture of wellness that engages and partners with our associates in their health. In our Knoxville HQ we have an onsite fitness center and medical clinic, and we reimburse remote associates the cost of a gym membership. A massage therapist comes onsite weekly, and we have lunch and learns often to educate our associates in their health.

Career development is also a huge part of our culture. Our online learning platform helps partner with our teammates for their development needs as well as hosting live courses each month. 

The best part of our culture is arguably bringing your dog to work! It is a great reminder of why we do what we do!

The Assisted Digital Convenience stores are called as Nextgen Vakrangee Kendras, which act as the ‘One Stop Shop’ for availing multiple products and services.
We offer an extensive array of services across various sectors by providing BFSI, ATM, E-Commerce & Logistics Services. Our Kendras are essential ‘One Stop Shop Assisted Digital Convenience Stores’, offering citizens goods and services at the competitive price, same time and same quality.
We have a portfolio of key licenses and partnership empanelment built over the last 25 years. We operate on an asset-light franchisee-based model. Our Nextgen Vakrangee Kendras have robust revenue generating capabilities supported by an advanced technological platform and multi-line of services. Each vertical of Vakrangee has the potential to achieve strong results and generate healthy returns. Every outlet of Vakrangee is supporting our key objective to set up a modern-day Nextgen Vakrangee Kendras, which makes our Kendras clearly and distinctly identifiable as “assisted digital convenience store”.

Name: FCP Euro
Description:
FCP Euro was established by Harry & Kathy Bauer in 1986 as a small brick and mortar auto parts store in Groton, CT. Transitioned to an online store in 2001 by their son Nick Bauer & friend Scott Drozd, we have grown to become a leading eCommerce provider of Genuine, Aftermarket, OEM, and Performance parts for European cars. Throughout our journey the company’s values have remained the same: sell only the highest quality replacement parts, provide unparalleled customer service, and offer the do it yourself enthusiast technical support to help fix and maintain their vehicles.

Today, FCP Euro has grown to over $200 million in annual sales funded through the continuous reinvestments of its profits. On our website, we maintain a sharp focus on high-quality parts of all quality tiers. We’ve committed ourselves to building a culture of service, quality, and continuous improvement - because we know that if our employees care deeply about our products, it will be reflected in what our customers receive. In Milford, CT, our total of 100,000 square feet FCP Euro Distribution Center space between two locations stocks over $15 million of inventory on our shelves. We've also recently launched our new Mesa, AZ location just southeast of Phoenix. Our newest warehouse brings the best FCP Euro can offer to serve the Western US. The 146,000-square-foot building offers the latest packing technology and a bespoke layout to ensure order volume is always fast, efficient, and accurate. Allowing us to boast "Coast-to-Coast Shipping in 3-Days or Less"

Everything sold by FCP Euro is backed by an industry-leading comprehensive, Lifetime Replacement Guarantee - including wear and tear items like wiper blades, brake pads, and more. We can do this because we’ve spent over a decade tirelessly cataloging our own products with precise and accurate fitment data, checking the quality of every single brand line and part, and constant development by our products team.

Description:
We’re disrupting a $50 billion industry.

Since 2013, we’ve offered our clients the option to truly own their beauty with a revolutionary choice—your place or ours? At home hair color or Hair Color Bar services? Our business is truly omnichannel, with the option to order or subscribe through our website, pick up in store at our Hair Color Bars, or make an appointment at one of our Hair Color Bar locations. At our Hair Color Bars, clients can choose from a variety of color services from licensed cosmetologists—permanent hair color, roots only, hair gloss, highlights and more. With the launch of our men’s line in 2020, we’re shaking up the $50 billion hair care industry with products that continue to raise the bar for doing your own hair at home.

We live our values.

Here at our San Francisco headquarters and in every Hair Color Bar nationwide, we truly live our values—Love, Joy, Courage, Responsibility, and Trust. Our values inform everything we do, from how we treat our clients to how we treat every member of our fast-growing team. Our founder & CEO, Amy Errett, has fostered a one-of-a-kind culture based on transparency, accountability, and fun; where diversity and inclusion are of utmost importance and every team member feels supported to succeed.

We are hair color that breaks the rules.

Our commitment to the ultimate client experience, paired with our dedication to product innovation and the latest beauty technology, has attracted a devoted, consistently-growing base of fans, converts, and color evangelists. We love what we do—and it shows.

Join us in our mission to live life colorfully and make personal care more personal.

We are present in India as Eurofins Analytical Services India Pvt Ltd and provide a comprehensive and one-stop testing service to businesses and organizations involved in food and feed processing,Agro products,  Export, Hospitality and Retail chains.

Our comprehensive range of services can help you in

Brand Protection : Protect the brand equity and customer loyalty by delivering healthy and safe food.
Consumer Safety : Protect your customers from any contaminated, modified and unhealthy food.
Compliance with Standards : Ensure your products are in compliance with local, national and international rules and regulations for food and food products.
Ensure correct storage, shipping, packing and distribution: of commodities, food ingredients and food products

Eurofins food testing offers more than 130,000 analytical tests including all the key areas of food safety and composition testing, such as:
Food and Feed Testing

    Contaminants Testing
    GMO testing
    Microbial Analysis
    Mineral detection
    Nutritional Labeling
    Pesticide residue
    Amino acids
    Mycotoxins
    Oil seed fatty acid profile

    Determination of food authenticity and origin (traceability)

Inspection Services

    Sampling and analysis
    Cleanliness inspection
    Pre shipment Inspection

Name: Voltalis
Description:
Voltalis is the European leader of automated Demand Response. The company’s ambition is to put technology at the service of energy savings to meet the threefold challenge of climate change, purchasing power and security of electricity supply.  

When national consumption peaks or renewable energy production falls, its technology is capable of optimising the consumption of equipped electrical appliances. Voltalis enables to:  

- Reduce energy use 
- Relieve the power grid   
- Avoid the use of polluting thermal power stations, which are called upon to deal with major imbalances between supply and demand  

Today, this technology is embedded in a new-generation connected thermostat, as heating is a major source of energy consumption and CO2 emissions. Voltalis is compensated by the electricity transmission network for the service provided, and offers this free of charge device to consumers.  

Backed by our majority shareholder Meridiam, an investment B Corp and asset manager, Voltalis is stepping up its activity to:  

- Equip 3 million French people with its connected thermostat by 2030  
- Address the end-use electrification such as electric vehicle charging, energy storage and self-consumption  
- Expand internationally

Description:
L’Office National de l’Electricité et de l’Eau Potable (ONEE) est l’opérateur public historique en charge des services vitaux de l’électricité et de l’eau potable au Maroc.
Chargé de la planification et de l’approvisionnement du pays en électricité et en eau potable, l’ONEE s’investit dans des projets structurants dotant le pays d’infrastructures modernes, performantes et fiables de production, de transport et de distribution de l’électricité et de l’eau potable.
L’ONEE dispose d’une capacité de production d’eau potable de 7,5 millions de m3 par jour et d’une capacité électrique installée de 12 GW dont plus de 45% de la puissance installée issue d’énergies renouvelables.
Pour atteindre l’objectif de plus de 52% de la puissance installée à partir des EnR à l’horizon 2030, l’ONEE est engagé dans une évolution ambitieuse de la planification et de l’exploitation du système électrique, afin de garantir sa flexibilité, sa robustesse et sa fiabilité. Il s’appuie notamment sur un réseau de transport THT/HT robuste de plus de 30000 kilomètres, déployé selon les meilleurs standards internationaux.
En outre, l’ONEE s’inscrit dans la dynamique du Royaume du Maroc en tant que carrefour énergétique régional entre l’Afrique et l’Europe, en développant des interconnexions stratégiques avec les pays de la région.

Name: TÜV NORD Turkey

RWTÜV’ün 2005 yılında TÜV NORD Grubu’na katılmasıyla, şirket bu grubun bir kuruluşu olarak faaliyetini sürdürmektedir. 2010 yılında Türk ortaklar hisselerini TÜV NORD’a devrettikten sonra şirket, TÜV NORD Grubu’nun 100 % hissesine sahip olduğu bir kuruluş haline gelmiştir.

TÜV Nord Turkey Teknik Kontrol ve Belgelendirme A.Ş., ISO 17021’e göre DAkkS akreditasyonu altında yapılan belgelendirme faaliyetlerini uluslararası alanda, TÜRKAK akreditasyonu altında ise faaliyetlerini Türkiye Cumhuriyeti sınırları içinde gerçekleştirmektedir.

Şirketin Türkiye’deki başlıca faaliyet konuları arasında;

Yönetim sistemlerinin sertifikasyonu: (ISO 9001; IATF 16949; ISO 14001; HACCP; ISO 22000; ISO 45001; BSCI; SA 8000; EN 9100), Teknik gözetim ve kontrol: (ASME Code; PED; ADR; TPED; AD-HP0; AD-W0; EN 473; EN 287; EN 288), Eğitim (Sistem sertifikasyonu ve teknik kontrol konularında eğitim programları; ISO 9001 ve ISO 45001 için IRCA tescilli lead assessor eğitim programları), personel sertifikasyonu (EN 473’e göre tahribatsız muayene elemanları) yer almaktadır.

TÜV NORD Turkey Teknik Kontrol ve Belgelendirme A.Ş., ISO 9001 ve ISO 14001'e göre sertifikasyon konusunda ISO 17021’e göre, A sınıfı teknik gözetim ve kontrol kuruluşu olarak ISO 17020’ye göre, TÜRKAK (Türk Akreditasyon Kurumu) tarafından akredite edilmiştir.

 Innovadores por naturaleza: somos los creadores de tecnologías avanzadas que garantizan la seguridad de tu vehículo, tu hogar, tu familia y tu negocio. Siempre estamos un paso adelante, anticipándonos a las necesidades del mercado con soluciones y productos desarrollados con la última tecnología 

 Equipo con chispa y talento: cada sprint es una oportunidad para co-crear, donde todos somos key players. Valoramos cada idea y fomentamos un entorno de confianza y respeto donde cada voz es escuchada y cada idea es potenciada. 

 Conectados con nuestra región: con una fuerte presencia en Latinoamérica, sabemos exactamente lo que cada cliente necesita. Entendemos los desafíos locales y ofrecemos productos que realmente hacen la diferencia.

Nuestras claves para el éxito:

 Conectar: creemos en las conexiones sin límites ni fronteras. Cada idea cuenta, cada perspectiva es crucial, y juntas, nos hacen invencibles.

 Empoderar: asumimos nuestros roles con entusiasmo y responsabilidad, siempre listos para crecer y liderar. Nos encanta lo que hacemos y nos encanta hacerlo bien.

 Transformar: Siempre en modo beta, no nos conformamos con lo que funciona, sino que lo mejoramos. Nos encanta romper esquemas y abrir caminos hacia nuevas posibilidades con soluciones disruptivas.

Cada día es una nueva oportunidad para innovar, aprender y crecer. Sumate a nuestro equipo y transformá tu mundo con Strix

strix.com.ar / @somos-strix / facebook.com/StrixArg

Name: Mission Linen Supply
Description:
Mission Linen Supply has been in business 90 years for a reason. We meet the textile, uniform and facility services needs of more than 40,000 restaurants, hospitals, hotels, industrial organizations, corporations and casinos. And we are committed to always doing MORE for our customers, community and environment.

     • We don’t just drop deliveries at the door. We’re long-term partners with cost-effective solutions that ensure your business not only looks sharp, but functions at its best for your customers every day. 

     • We give back to our local communities through donations, sponsorships and volunteering.

     • We design our facilities and business practices with sustainability in mind

     • We expand our capabilities to adapt to our customers needs, including implementing digital solutions and e-commerce platforms that allow for even faster, simpler service.

OUR STORY 

George "Ben" Page founded Mission Linen Supply in 1930, during the Great Depression. Since then, we’ve grown from a one-man linen and uniform rental business to a company of 2,500 employees providing thousands of products and services, including linens, uniforms, apparel, mats, restroom supplies, disposable food service products, office essentials, PPE and more. After 90 years, our founder’s family is still involved in our company, and we’ve preserved our fundamental dedication to customers and employees alike. Headquartered in Santa Barbara, California, we have 43 facilities across California, Arizona, Texas, Oregon and New Mexico.

BECOME A CUSTOMER

Interested in becoming a Mission customer? Please contact us — we look forward to hearing from you! In the meantime, here are a few additional links you may find useful:
