Name: AAA National
Description:
Discover Your Next Career with AAA National
From creating innovative member benefits to delivering best-in-class roadside assistance, AAA National offers a wide range of career paths. Our organization serves 65+ million members across automotive and travel services, insurance, personal finance, traffic safety, and more.

What connects all these opportunities? A shared commitment to providing safety, security, and peace of mind. At our core, AAA is about helping people.

If you’re looking for a career where your unique talents are valued and respected, we’d love to hear from you.

Name: Ignite International, Ltd.
Description:
IGNITE International is the world’s fastest growing vape device company. You can find our premium reduced risk products in over 50 countries around the world.

IGNITE has positioned itself as the gold standard and industry expert in Nicotine, Award-Winning Spirits and supported with a premium apparel line for an active lifestyle.

IGNITE disrupts marketing norms with an authentic, quality-first mission, taking its expansion world-wide. Following its September 2018 US launch, 2019 saw expansion into the UK and Mexico, with continued expansion in 2020 to the Middle East and Canada with many more to come.

IGNITE is a socially responsible company and is committed to using marketing and brand power as a positive catalyst for a healthy lifestyle. The IGNITE management team believes that these actions have a positive impact on the Company, its employees and its shareholders.

IGNITE is unapologetic in our attitude and in our promise to provide the ultimate experience to our customers.

It will always be the best or nothing for IGNITE.

Name: Donkey Republic
Description:
Founded in 2016, Donkey Republic is a Danish purpose-driven impact company active in the micro-mobility industry. Donkey Republic provides a flexible, affordable and more sustainable way of transportation to the citizens by partnering with the cities. 

Donkey Republic is a data driven technology company facilitating bike sharing, and we are able to provide cities and citizens a reliable bike sharing service. Sustainably and innovative at its core integrates with the city’s public transportation system, Donkey Republic develops end-to-end products and services that solve city and riders problems. Riders are able to enjoy a more convenient and high quality ride, with our bike and ebike fleet, designed for durability and optimal maintenance through our servicing software platform. This collaborative dedicated software solution together with our bikes, seeks to improve people's health & well-being, the environment, reducing traffic congestion across cities as well as public space optimisation.

Donkey Republic is a publicly traded company listed on the Nasdaq First North Growth Market. The company was listed in 2021 to onboard investors and support its growth and expansion into the European Market, and to continue securing its foothold and developing its market position in the European Micro mobility space. With thousands of Donkey bikes successfully implemented, Donkey Republic aims to grow its business and fulfil its vision of making urban city life quality better through responsible bike sharing.

Read more about us and what we do: https://www.donkey.bike/about/

Name: Infinity Assurance Solutions Private Limited
Description:
We, Infinity Assurance Solutions Pvt Ltd are a New Delhi (Bharat i.e. India) based portfolio company of Indian Angel Network, Aegis Centre for Entrepreneurship, Artha Venture Fund, and other marquee industry veterans; specializing in “Insurance and Warranty Claims Administration”, “Installation and Repair Services”, and “Warranty Products like Extended Warranty, Accidental Damage Protection etc.” for a wide range of electronic products. 

Incorporated in January 2014; as a debt-free, operationally profitable with positive net retained earnings, we have grown rapidly with CAGR of over 100% in the last 5 years. 

We are a CeBIT awarded company.

Our success is attributed to very agile and technologically driven unique service delivery model, loyal long-term clients, inhouse application, lean organization structure and a small team.

We have a very extensive Enterprise grade End to End Process Management Software Application that is unmatched in the industry. 

We own Service Product brand 'InfyShield" that is a Customer's choice for Extended Warranty, Accidental Damage Protection and other value added Services.

We have marquee clients from Insurance, Manufacturing, Retail, Systems Integration and others. 

We are positioned to grow faster; capitalising on key strengths of “Customer Service”, “Ethics” and “Integrity” lead profitable growth by strengthening our portfolio, reach and delivery capabilities.

Name: Notary Public
Description: My website is for Real Estate information.  Knowledge of real estate contracts gives the added advantage to ensure your paperwork is filled in completely and notarized properly.  Every notarization request receives knowledgeable attention, accuracy and care!

Name: ATMA
Description: Prazer, somos a ATMA! Entregamos com verdade e prazer soluções para um atendimento cada vez mais humano.

Name: Allianz Partners Türkiye
Description:
Allianz Partners Turkey has been operating in Turkey as Allianz Global Assistance since 2014 and Allianz Partners Turkey as of 2016, under the roof of Allianz Group and as a part of Allianz Partners group since March of 1997.

Our company develops tailored services to the needs of its customers through its strong service network and global experience in Turkey, based on Allianz Partners’ principal of focusing to help people and create customer-specific solutions.

Allianz Partners Turkey serves end-users in the automotive, road assistance, housing, health & life, travel & leisure areas with call center support, which operates 24/7  365 days in cooperation with leading institutions.

Name: TENco
Description:
Created in 2019 with the singular mission of transforming lives. Founded by Tural Mammadov, a visionary former wealth manager, our company was born from the desire to provide unparalleled support and opportunities within an exclusive community.

At TENco, we believe in liberating individuals from complexities and worries, enabling them to embrace life to the fullest. Our members lie at the heart of everything we do. In our vibrant community, authenticity reigns supreme, and individuals are encouraged to be themselves, unapologetically.

Name: TrustMark
Description:
TrustMark was established in 2005 in conjunction with Government, industry bodies and consumer protection groups. Since this time, in response to the industry-led, Government-commissioned Each Home Counts (EHC) review, the TrustMark remit has expanded to include all Repair, Maintenance and Improvement (RMI), Energy Efficiency and Retrofit measures, providing a level playing field of quality for consumers having work carried out in or around their home. 

TrustMark operates within a Master Licence Agreement issued by the Government’s Department for Business, Energy and Industrial Strategy (BEIS). 

TrustMark is a not-for-profit organisation that takes pride in continually investing in the scheme, supporting Scheme Providers and Registered Businesses to improve consumer protection and standards across all sectors.

When a consumer uses a TrustMark Registered Business, they are engaging an organisation that has been vetted to meet required standards, and has made a commitment to good customer service, technical competence, and trading practices.

TrustMark works with a network of scheme providers to ensure Registered Businesses adhere to and maintain these standards. To ensure a high quality of workmanship and trading practices TrustMark runs a programme of desktop and on-site inspections to inform our work with schemes.

Name: ChefKart
Description: We are a platform that connects home chefs with households seamlessly by building an ecosystem. Our professionals are handpicked to serve you hygienic and wholesome meals catered to your taste! We train our home chefs and, match them with a perfect household where they can always prepare homely deliciousness!

Name: Vereniging Eigen Huis
Description:
Vereniging Eigen Huis is sinds 1974 wereldwijd de grootste consumentenorganisatie voor eigenwoningbezitters.

Vereniging Eigen Huis is een organisatie met ruim 230 medewerkers. Deskundigheid, initiatief, samenwerking en klantgerichtheid staan bij ons hoog in het vaandel. Eigen Huis Bouwkundig Advies en Eigen Huis Hypotheekservice zijn dochterorganisaties van Vereniging Eigen Huis. 
Eigen Huis Bouwkundig Advies bemiddelt op jaarbasis bij het totstandkomen van ruim 35.000 bouwkundige keuringen. De keuringen worden uitgevoerd door zelfstandig bouwkundig adviseurs die bij het netwerk van Eigen Huis Bouwkundig Advies zijn aangesloten. 
Eigen Huis Hypotheekservice, de andere dochterorganisatie, heeft hypotheekadviseurs in dienst die 100% objectief zijn. Zij zoeken dan ook de hypotheek die het beste bij de persoonlijke situatie van de klant past.  

Vereniging Eigen Huis houdt iedereen scherp, zowel marktpartijen, beleidsmakers als eigenwoningbezitters. De vereniging behartigt de belangen van haar leden zonder winstoogmerk. Wat wij nastreven voor onze leden? Keuzevrijheid, kwaliteit, betaalbaarheid, waardebehoud en zekerheid. Scherp, betrokken en deskundig halen we voor de leden het onderste uit de kan, bij marktpartijen en beleidsmakers. 

Innovatie en interactiviteit spelen hierbij een belangrijke rol. De meeste contacten met leden lopen nu al via onze website. Dat geldt ook voor het aanvragen van keuringen, hypotheekadvies en andere diensten. De groei van digitale media zet ook de komende jaren door. Als vereniging willen we onze leden in de toekomst de mogelijkheid bieden om met elkaar in contact te komen. Bijvoorbeeld om ervaringen uit te wisselen en kennis te delen.

Name: Västtrafik
Description:
Västtrafik ansvarar för kollektivtrafiken i Västsverige. Varje dag väljer över 444 000 resenärer att resa med våra bussar, tåg, spårvagnar och båtar. Genom att utveckla och erbjuda hållbara resor och smarta tjänster vill vi vara det självklara valet när du reser. På så sätt bidrar Västtrafik till det goda livet i Västra Götaland och till en attraktiv och konkurrenskraftig region. 
Västtrafik AB ägs av Västra Götalandsregionen. Regionfullmäktige beslutar om Västtrafiks budget och tar vart fjärde år fram ett trafikförsörjningsprogram som anger hur kollektivtrafiken ska utvecklas på sikt. Det övergripande målet är att fördubbla resandet med Västtrafik från 2006 till 2025.

Name: Bhaktam
Description: Bhaktam is a community of believers that enables individuals to deal with life's challenges by seeking and sharing knowledge from rich Indian scriptures. Our mission is to help people grow spiritually and attain peace of mind in all times.

Name: MEC Call
Description:
A MEC Call é uma empresa voltada para o Atendimento ao Cliente, Telemarketing, Experiência do Cliente e Satisfação de Clientes. Contamos com uma equipa multidisciplinar de profissionais experientes, com sólidas competências e experiência no sector de Contact Centers e Atendimento ao Cliente.

Temos como princípio agregar valor aos nossos parceiros pela qualidade de serviço prestado e envolvimento no desenvolvimento do negócio.

A nossa equipa é jovem com mais de 10 anos de experiência no sector de Contact Centers, uma nova geração de competências e saber, apostada em usar o seu potencial para o desenvolvimento de Angola.

Juntos queremos construir parcerias fortes.

Name: GRUPO OLMOS
Description:
Nacimos en Mendoza con el firme propósito de ofrecer servicios de salud. Nuestro espíritu emprendedor nos ha llevado a expandirnos hacia sectores clave, siempre con la misión de Construir un país mejor.

Hoy, después de más de dos décadas, nos hemos transformado en un holding sólido y confiable, con presencia en áreas estratégicas de la economía argentina.

Nos comprometemos a mejorar la calidad de vida de los trabajadores y sus familias, gestionando 4 verticales de negocio: Salud, Seguros, Tecnología y Medios.

Name: CarSwitch Arabia
Description:
CarSwitch | Selling or buying a used car? Let us take over

CarSwitch is driving a fundamentally opaque and broken >$40B space into the 21st century. We are the top-rated marketplace in the UAE & KSA to sell and buy certified cars from private sellers. 

It's not just a solution, it’s a promise of the smoothest journey. With this sentiment at the forefront, CarSwitch takes the lead on everything involved from test drives to car valuation, inspections, transfer of ownership, documentation, and insurance delivering you a holistically seamless end-to-end experience. Top that with the added perk of us handling the fastest car loan approval in town. 

We believe that smooth experiences don’t just simply happen – they’re made possible, and we aim to make them happen every single time, for every single customer. CarSwitch hosts all the major brands including Nissan, Mercedes, Mitsubishi, Toyota, Honda, Porsche, GMC, Ford, BMW, Jaguar, and so much more

Name: Wendover Art Group
Description:
Starting as a small poster print company in 2005, Wendover Art Group has grown into a multi-channel American manufacturer of high-quality artwork, mirrors, wallcoverings, lighting, textiles, bed swings, and sculptures for top interior designers and brands in both the residential and commercial markets. 

From its headquarters in Largo, FL (Tampa/St. Petersburg), Wendover maintains its commitment to producing artisanal creations that are domestically made, provide superior value to customers, invest in technology and talent, and strive to be The Source for Art. Building upon their luxury portfolio, in 2022, Wendover acquired Lowcountry Originals, a South Carolina manufacturer of lighting, bed swings, sculptures, and mirrors. In 2023, Wendover acquired Kevin O’Brien Studio, a textile company designed and handcrafted in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, and Friedman Brothers, a 120-year-old decorative mirror and furniture accessories company based in Miami, Florida. Stronger together, Wendover, Lowcountry Originals, Kevin O’Brien Studio, and Friedman Brothers are building and expanding their product capabilities and offerings. All products are available through a network of sales representatives, online, and in showrooms in High Point, Atlanta, Dallas, and Las Vegas. Learn more at wendoverart.com, lowcountryoriginals.com, kevinobrienstudio.com, friedmanbrothers.com, and follow @wendoverart, @lowcountry.originals and @kevinobrienstudio.

Name: Rentokil Pest Control North America
Description:
For more than 90 years, Rentokil has served as global experts in pest control. Through an integrated pest management approach, the Rentokil network of experts offer a superior level of protection and trusted solutions, pushing the boundaries of innovation and harnessing new technology, to create pest-free environments.

Rentokil is part of Rentokil North America, which provides commercial and residential pest control to customers in the U.S., Canada and Puerto Rico. The comprehensive and digital pest management solutions include general pest control, rodents, mosquito, birds, termite and bed bug inspections and service, vegetation management and bird management. 
In addition, Rentokil North America operates business services companies including Ambius, specializing in air purification, hand and surface hygiene as well as plants and scenting services; Steritech, offering food safety and operational assessments; SOLitude Lake Management, providing lake and pond solutions; and Vector Disease Control International, which serves governments and municipalities with mosquito control services.

Name: PCCI GROUP
Description:
Leading Customer Experience and Operations outsourcing provider in emerging markets, PCCI Group has quickly emerged as a key player delivering consistent and branded customer engagement. Founded in September 2001, the Group now has several locations across Africa and employs over 2,500 of people.
 
We bring tailored value added solutions to our customers in the management of their customer experience with a range of capabilities in the areas of BPO contact centres, points of service and face-to-face interactions management, self-service and big data insights through our sites located in 20 locations across the globe.
 
PCCI Group delivers its services primarily in English, French, with + 10 languages covered and has multiple fortune 500 companies as clients including European and African leaders in telecommunications, media, BFSI, energy, retail & tourism.

PCCI Group is part of Teyliom Global Capital.
 
More information can be found at www.pcci-group.com

Name: IBL Operations
Description:
IBL Operations (Pvt.) Ltd. is one of the largest Sales & Distribution companies in Pakistan. It represents global brands such as Kellogg's, Pringles, L'Oréal, Molfix, Calibur, Dupont, Future Technologies, etc.

IBL Operations (Pvt.) Ltd. has built an extensive footprint with 100+branches in Pakistan and created healthy, lasting partnerships with its affiliates. IBL's commitment to its Core Values distinguish the Group in the Market.

Name: ElectricPe
Description:
Step into the future with ElectricPe, India's leading Electric Mobility Platform! Launched in May 2021, ElectricPe offers products and services to deliver a holistic electric vehicle (EV) experience. 

At ElectricPe, we are on a mission to provide smart, affordable, and clean Electric Mobility to a billion Indians. Our platform is the one-stop destination for all your EV-related needs. Discover a comprehensive suite of services, including Find, Charge and Pay at the nearest charging station, purchasing top-notch EVs online or offline, and enjoying affordable subscription models for hassle-free battery ownership.

ElectricPe is committed to delivering a delightful and seamless EV ownership, charging, and battery subscription experience, propelling exponential growth in India’s EV adoption. Join us on a journey towards a greener, sustainable future. Embrace shaping the future of mobility with ElectricPe – to infinity and far beyond!

Ab India Chalega ElectricPe!

Name: Vision Elevators (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Vision Elevators (Pty) Ltd. provides mobility solutions to corporations and individuals throughout Africa. We manufacture, install, repair, maintain and modernise a variety of lift products: Elevators, Escalators, Home Lifts, Platform Lifts, Goods Hoists, Dumbwaiters, Stairlifts and other equipment for disabled access. We pride ourselves in innovation, reliability and unmatched customer support. 

Our journey began in South Africa in 2004. Now we are located in three African countries: South Africa, Namibia and Mauritius. Our main offices in South Africa are in KwaZulu Natal, Cape Town and Johannesburg. We also have representative agents in various regions in Africa. 

Safety and security is our top priority. We manufacture and design all of our products in accordance with SANS and EN regulations. We are gold members of the Lift Engineering Association of South Africa and are ISO 9001:2015 accredited which gives testament to our commitment to bring you value, safety and quality.

Visit us here: https://visionelevators.africa/

Name: College Pro
Description: Our Entrepreneurs Start Here program is the leading student development program specializing in skills required to separate yourself with experience. You might recognize us as by our yellow College Pro Window Cleaning signs on your neighbours' lawn, but our mission is to provide exceptional leadership and management training to student and young entrepreneurs through real-world experiences. Since 1971, we've focused on values-based leadership as we coach thousands of first-time entrepreneurs through a tried and tested process by which we systematically train, mentor and support our people to succeed.

Name: TÜV NORD Hellas
Description:
TÜV NORD Hellas is a certification and inspection body, 100% subsidiary of the German TÜV NORD GROUP. It has been active in Greece since 1987, providing Third Party Inspection-Certification services, for all types of enterprises, in both the private and public sector, in the fields of Technology, Quality, Security, Energy, and the Environment.

TÜV NORD Hellas has become a leader in the field of Inspection-Certification, offering services with prestige, reliability, visibility and added value. It has managed to link the Organization's name with the largest infrastructure and development projects in our country, contributing through its services to the quality and safety of products and constructions.

TÜV NORD Hellas is responsible for coordinating and planning TUV NORD’s development strategy in the Balkans and the Southeastern Mediterranean (Cyprus, Egypt, Albania, Bosnia - Herzegovina, Bulgaria, Kosovo, Croatia, Lebanon, Libya, Romania, Serbia, Turkey, FYROM).

TÜV NORD Hellas operates two subsidiaries, TÜV CYPRUS and TUV Egypt in Cyprus and Egypt respectively, while it has a branch office, TÜV LEBANON, in Lebanon. Recently, it started to operate at international level; with the collaboration of the 70 subsidiaries of the TUV Nord Group and its network of experienced inspectors, TÜV NORD Hellas can offer its services in the Oil & Gas sector worldwide.

Name: PT Reska Multi Usaha
Description:
PT Reska Multi Usaha (RMU) (menjalankan bisnis sebagai KAI Services) adalah anak perusahaan PT Kereta Api Indonesia yang memiliki 3 bidang bisnis utama yaitu on board services, integrated facility services, dan commercial services

Name: Sowee by EDF
Description:
Sowee, start-up interne du Groupe EDF, est née d’une conviction : assurer le bien-être durable dans l’habitat, en devenant un acteur innovant de la maison connectée.  
Grâce à un environnement nativement digital et très agile, le Pack Sowee, première offre associant une Station connectée, un Thermostat intelligent et un Contrat gaz, a été lancé sur le marché en décembre 2016. Face au contexte très évolutif (développement de la concurrence, smart home…), la forte réactivité de l’équipe a permis la commercialisation d’offres complémentaires. 
En pleine expansion, Sowee recherche activement de nouveaux talents pour accompagner son développement. 
Vous êtes sensible à l’univers de la Smart Home ? Vous rêvez de rejoindre une structure dynamique ? Vous cherchez un poste propice au développement de compétences larges et multidisciplinaires ? Rejoignez-nous !

Name: Grupo Elo
Description:
O Grupo Elo é um conjunto de empresas que tem como missão desenvolver, atuar e contribuir com o relacionamento entre empresas e consumidores. Um grupo jovem, que nasceu em meio a transformação digital.

Fundado em 2012, o Grupo Elo é formado atualmente pelas empresas: Elo Contact Center, Conecta, KTS e TOP, e conta com aproximadamente 2 mil colaboradores, com escritórios em São Paulo (SP), Rio de Janeiro (RJ) e São Luís (MA).

Name: Casalimpia S.A.
Description:
Tenemos más de 65 años de experiencia brindando a nuestros clientes soluciones integrales en la prestación de servicios empresariales de limpieza y bienestar, servicios especializados, mantenimiento técnico locativo, limpieza hospitalaria, administración de activos y servicios para pymes y hogares, con altos estándares de calidad y oportunidad.

¿Quiénes Somos?

Somos una empresa con un enfoque centrado en la calidad, la responsabilidad social, la sostenibilidad y la innovación. Contamos con más de 20.000 expertos, tenemos presencia en más de 10 ciudades de Colombia y en 3 países de America. Hacemos parte de las 10 empresas empleadoras más grandes del país y prestamos nuestros servicios en más de 7.000 frentes de trabajo.

Nuestros Servicios
Ofrecemos una amplia gama de soluciones personalizadas, incluyendo:
 Servicios de aseo y limpieza profesional para oficinas, centros comerciales, hospitales, industrias y más.
 Mantenimiento locativo y técnico para la conservación de instalaciones en óptimas condiciones.
 Facility management para optimizar la operación y administración de espacios corporativos.
 Servicios especializados como jardinería, brigadas de aseo, limpieza en alturas, fumigación y control de plagas.

Contamos con certificaciones:
ISO 9001: 2008
ISO 14001: 2004
OHSAS 1800: 2007
FENALCO (Certificado de Responsabilidad Social)

Name: eTrade Marketing P Ltd.
Description:
eTrade: "Transforming Brands, Driving their e-commerce Growth" 

eTrade Marketing Private Limited was founded in 2010 with the vision of becoming the largest e-commerce aggregator in India. Over the years, the company has successfully established itself as a market leader in the industry and has carved a niche for itself in the e-commerce space. 

Today we are serving over 500 top brands and over 4 million products. We are recognized among Top 30 Future Ready Workplaces by Fortune India & CIEL HR for our focus on People Development and Sustainable Growth. 

The company's core business revolves around technology, logistics, inventory management, and brand nurturing. eTrade leverages cutting-edge technology to streamline its processes, enhance customer experience, and optimize its operations. The company's warehousing and logistics network is well-established, ensuring seamless delivery of products to customers across India with a robust inventory management system that enables to effectively manage inventory and ensure we are always near to our customers. 

One of the key differentiators of eTrade is its brand nurturing process. The company elevates consumer-leading brands to their full potential through a combination of technology, logistics, inventory management and comprehensive analysis of the brand's strengths and weaknesses, as well as its target audience, to formulate a customized strategy.

With such a wide range of options, customers are sure to find what they are looking for and more. The large selection of high-quality brands and products allows us to meet the diverse needs of our customers and sets us apart in the market.

Name: Rentokil Terminix
Description:
The Rentokil and Terminix family of brands have come together to form the world’s leading pest control company. With our shared vision, we’ll be expanding our products, services, and technology. And with our combined resources, we’ll do more to power innovation and develop sustainable solutions for our planet. 
It’s all part of our commitment to putting you first and delivering the highest level of comfort and peace of mind to families, businesses and local communities around the corner and around the globe.

This page is intended for corporate updates. To see brand specific content, visit our affiliated pages.

Name: STLTH
Description:
STLTH Vape was started by a group of entrepreneurs, all of whom were ex-smokers. An introduction to vaping products almost a decade ago quickly helped our founder's transition away from traditional cigarettes. This life-changing experience confirmed their belief in the potential of vaping systems.

They knew, however, in order for vaping systems to be adopted by adult smokers it would have to be one that is practical, affordable, and effective.

With that in mind, they developed a simple yet powerful mission: 

To provide adult smokers with a real alternative to traditional tobacco products.

With ongoing investments in Canadian production, such as filling and packaging, supported by a wide array of subject matter experts from science and technology to user experience and customer support, STLTH continues  to advance towards our vision:

A world free of nicotine addiction.

Name: KellyConnect | Contact Center Solutions
Description:
At KellyConnect, we believe the impact of the right talent on your business is limitless. 

Our parent company founded the staffing industry 75+ years ago, we pioneered the modern work-from-home model in 2010, and we’ve continued to pave the way forward for companies (around the globe and across industries) who demand the very best in their customer service interactions. With us, you’ll have a workforce partner who speaks your language and knows your field, while fully understanding your talent needs. Let us connect the dots for you—so your contact center can grow and thrive without limits.

Name: Via Verde
Description:
Via Verde was born in 1991 as an innovative technological solution that allowed drivers to pay toll charges without stopping their vehicles. 

Since then, with the dedication of our team and the company stakeholders, we have been enriching our range of services with several new applications for the Via Verde identifier: payments in Galp fuel stations, parking lots and McDrive establishments, as well as access control for historical sites.

We have recently integrated Brisa's strategy and repositioned ourselves in the market, with more focus on people and mobility. Via Verde now travels alongside you with Viagens & Vantagens (Journeys and Advantages), a loyalty program that offers exclusive discounts and benefits for our clients.

Via Verde Portugal is majority-owned by Brisa and has other shareholders including Ascendi.

Name: Capital Maharaja Group
Description:
Capital Maharaja Goup, Founded in 1930 is a truly unique organisation that has become an integral part of the lives of all Sri Lankans.

Be it using your mobile phone, using electricity from the National Grid , having a cup of world famous Ceylon tea, providing children with the best nutrition (Anchor Milk), Using water or electricity for your daily needs. Even watching TV or listening to radio or getting unbiased factual news, we touch a part of all Sri Lankan lives.
In addition, our group has the single most comprehensive, CSR programme in the country and is striving to improve the lives of everyone in every way we can.

Name: The HelloWorld
Description:
Every place has a story, we just make it better by creating an alternate world of spaces. Through our spaces we let people repurpose themselves. We believe in the power of shared energy, which helps each one of us to get re-energized and welcome every day with a Hello World.

Urban housing in India has not adapted to evolving demands for technology, services and flexibility. We provide shared living solutions for working professionals and students, having entered this ambit in April 2019. We transform large residential units architecturally to budget-friendly spaces rented on a sharing basis. Our working strategy assures total elimination of the brokerage, allowing the procurement of quality spaces at affordable rates. Present across 20 cities in India, we are backed by Tiger Global, Goldman Sachs, Chiratae Ventures, UC-RnT.

Name: Ornikar
Description:
Ornikar, from a pioneer online driving school to a comprehensive digital platform to ease young people’s access to mobility!
Founded in 2013 by Benjamin Gaignault and Flavien Le Rendu, Ornikar has made driving education more accessible, by reducing prices and making students experience frictionless thanks to the digitalization of the experience.
Ornikar is now the referent online driving school platform in France with more than 2,5M customers and a satisfaction rate of 98%. Our ambition is to become a leading player when it comes to access to mobility and more largely to autonomy for young people, while pursuing our revolution with the launch of a car insurance business of a new kind.
In 2021, Ornikar has raised 100 million euros and has been awarded with the #next40 label, a French government label promoting the 40 most promising young companies likely to become technology leaders.
Today, Ornikar team is made of 250 employees and growing, with shared values of both ambition and humility. We share one common goal: always go the extra mile to become the indisputable emancipation partner for young people

Name: Nuevocentro Shopping
Description:
Nuevocentro Shopping es un centro comercial inaugurado el 24 de octubre de 2013, ubicado en el corazón de Montevideo. Se encuentra en el barrio Jacinto Vera, el segundo punto más transitado del país, en la intersección de las avenidas L.A. de Herrera y Bvar. Artigas.

El shopping cambió la zona y se convirtió en un lugar en donde todos se sienten bienvenidos. DERES distinguió al centro comercial por contribuir con los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible de la ONU y lo reconoció adicionalmente por su “Práctica inspiradora”. En este marco, Nuevocentro trabaja para derribar las barreras del entorno físico, de acceso a la información y de carácter actitudinal.

Ser nuevos está en el ADN de Nuevocentro Shopping, por eso en 2019 tuvo su primera ampliación para ofrecer más estacionamiento, más marcas nacionales e internacionales, más diversión, más emociones y más motivos para ser visitado. 
Actualmente, supera los 95.000 m2 y cuenta con un mix comercial de 150 locales.

Con un moderno e innovador diseño, Nuevocentro Shopping facilita a los uruguayos la resolución de sus necesidades. Presenta 8 niveles de estacionamiento, marcas nacionales e internacionales, salas de cine, una amplia plaza de comidas, un parque de diversiones, un hipermercado y ofrece una gran variedad de servicios.

SiPhox was founded by MIT scientists Michael Dubrovsky and Diedrik Vermeulen to integrate microfluidics and biochemistry with Silicon Photonics to miniaturize protein and hormone testing. As we work on building advanced home diagnostic devices, we are creating the most comprehensive at-home test kit on the market, providing valuable health insights and actionable plans to help achieve health goals.


The entire SiPhox team is driven by a shared passion: combating the chronic disease epidemic. Name: Illovo Sugar Malawi plc
Description:
ILLOVO SUGAR (MALAWI) plc is listed on the Malawi Stock Exchange with 76% of the issued share capital held by the Illovo Group and the balance by public and other institutional investors. 

The corporate office is based at Limbe with two operations at Nchalo in the southern part of Malawi at Chikwawa and Dwangwa in the mid-central region of Nkhotakota, producing sugar cane and raw, brown, and refined sugar, together with speciality sugars especially at Nchalo. 

The company annually cultivates around 1.8 million tons of cane which together with approximately 350 000 tons produced by Malawian smallholder farmers, results in the production of about 250 000 tons of sugar.

Illovo Malawi, which is one of two sugar producers operating in the country, supplies more than 60% of its total sugar sales into the domestic consumer and industrial markets, and a portion of the balance exported regionally within the sub-continent. Exports also take place to the EU and the USA markets, which include a range of speciality sugars.

Name: Edify.Club
Description:
Welcome to Edify - Empowering Sustainability Through Technology

At Edify, we believe in a future where technology drives progress without compromising our planet's health. In a world of rapid technological evolution, we stand as a beacon for sustainability, providing high-quality refurbished laptops to individuals and businesses alike.

Our Mission
Our journey began with a simple yet profound mission: to reduce electronic waste and make technology accessible to everyone. We understand that behind every device is a story - a student's first project, an entrepreneur's dream, a designer's masterpiece. By refurbishing and revitalizing laptops, we give these stories a new chapter, extending the life of devices and making a positive impact on the environment.

What We Offer
Edify offers a meticulously curated selection of refurbished laptops that meet the highest standards of quality and performance. Our expert technicians breathe new life into each device, ensuring it not only looks like new but operates at its peak. From budget-friendly options for students to high-performance machines for professionals, our range caters to every need, all while promoting a more sustainable tech culture.

Why Choose Edify?

Sustainability: Choosing Edify means taking a step towards a more sustainable future. Each refurbished laptop reduces e-waste and the carbon footprint associated with producing new devices.
Quality Assurance: Our comprehensive refurbishment process guarantees that each laptop meets stringent quality and performance standards(50+ Checkpoints on quality), backed by a warranty for your peace of mind.
Affordability: We make technology accessible by offering premium devices at a fraction of the cost, without compromising on performance or quality.
Exceptional Service: At Edify, customer satisfaction is at the heart of everything we do. We're here to help you find the perfect tech solution as per your needs.
Buyback Guarantee : All laptops come with buyback guarantee.

Name: Guide Dogs for the Blind
Description:
At Guide Dogs for the Blind (GDB), we believe that everyone deserves to move through the world safely and confidently—to live the life they want to live. Our passionate community employs innovative practices to create life-changing partnerships. And, we advocate for the policy reforms that change how the world views blindness and disability. Because when everyone is empowered to participate, our communities are stronger.

With world-class client services and a robust network of instructors, puppy raisers, donors, and volunteers, we prepare highly qualified guide dogs and K9 Buddy dogs, provide guide dog readiness skills, and offer youth programs to empower individuals who are blind or visually impaired. GDB not only improves mobility for our clients, we further inclusion.

As the largest guide dog school in North America, more than 16,000 guide dog teams have graduated from GDB from across the U.S. and Canada since our founding in 1942. All of our services are provided free of charge, including personalized training and ongoing support, plus financial assistance for veterinary care, if needed. Our work is made possible by the generous support of our donors and volunteers; we receive no government funding.

Name: Murfy
Description:
Jeter ou réparer, chez Murfy on a choisi notre camp !
À l’origine de Murfy, un constat : chaque année, 28 millions d’appareils électroménagers tombent en panne, et seul 1 sur 5 est réparé. 
C’est donc 23 millions d’appareils qui sont jetés chaque année. 

Notre défi : diminuer ces déchets inutiles  en prolongeant la durée de vie de vos appareils.

Chez Murfy, nous avons pour ambition d’installer la réparation comme le réflexe en cas de panne, avant l’achat du neuf, grâce à une offre simple et transparente, accessible en ligne et d’un service client 5*. 

Depuis notre création, nous avons réparé plus de 200 000 appareils et reconditionné plus de 50 000 machines dans nos ateliers de Paris, Lille, Lyon, Nantes et Metz. Nous avons ainsi évité plus de 14 000 tonnes de déchets électroménagers. Et ce n'est que le début 

Murfy propose une nouvelle expérience de la réparation d’électroménager : l’accompagnement à l’auto-réparation, des tarifs transparents et abordables, des techniciens locaux salariés et un suivi client tout au long de la réparation.

Murfy est en forte croissance, et recherche en continue de nouveaux talents qui veulent nous aider à faire bouger les choses. Pour consulter nos offres d'emploi et postuler, c'est par ici : https://emploi.murfy.fr/

La team Murfy

Name: MiChem Dynamics (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Our History
MiChem Dynamics was established in the year 2014 by two entrepreneurs, Santie van Niekerk and Vinay Moodley who are both experts and qualified as microbiologists, auditors and laboratory quality management systems. The organisation was established out of a mutual dream and vision they shared. This dynamic organisation was founded on a blue print philosophy to save lives, change lives and create a better future for both their employees and customers alike. MiChem Dynamics firmly believes in investing and motivating its employees as the biggest assets by proving a conducive working culture, continuous skills development and well being. This forms the ever reliable foundation that was set up by Santie van Niekerk and Vinay Moodley.

MiChem Dynamics was primarily established to be the link between different laboratories and manufacturing industries as consultants, in order to support organisations with interpretation of laboratory results, root-cause analysis, customised approach in implementation of corrective actions and continuous improvement, to ensure accurate, reliable and consistent laboratory test results. Over the years, additional services were introduced that included training, consulting, auditing, coaching and mentoring, making MiChem Dynamics (Pty) Ltd a comprehensive provider of all services in the scientific, agriculture, food and beverage, manufacturing, services and mining industries.

MiChem Dynamics has positioned itself as the best go to consultants, auditors and facilitators in any of the fields, its involved in. The organisation, has a drive to promote professionalism, ethical practices and commitment to change peoples lives through its unique and diligent work ethic. Through its work, MiChem Dynamics is leading change to the future.

We solve real problems with technology to make people’s daily lives better.

Name: Squeeze Massage
Description:
Squeeze was designed to revolutionize the massage experience, from our forward-thinking technology to our dedication to team member experience. We are focused on the human side of business, and our goal is to be the best employer brand for massage therapists nationwide. We work to foster an inclusive environment, where everyone can shine bright. It’s so important that we’ve made it our company mission to be the best part of our guests’ and team members’ day.
Squeeze offers a completely fresh approach to a way better massage experience, all in a beautifully designed space. Personalized services allow guests to select massage preferences, choose their in-suite lighting and music, and rate, tip, and review all at their fingertips.

Additionally, we’ve partnered with an equally-minded “feel good” nonprofit. For every membership sold, Squeeze is helping to provide a day of canine support to a person with a disability through Canine Companions. To learn more about joining The Feel-Good Revolution and see a video showcasing what our team members have to say, visit us at https://www.squeezemassage.com/careers

Squeeze opened in March 2019 in Los Angeles at 12338 Ventura Blvd in Studio City, CA and we are now franchising nationally! So, why did the founders of Drybar start a massage business? Because we love making people feel good. And, we love massages (who doesn’t?!). But, we found ourselves frustrated with the options out there: either mediocre discount establishments or overpriced spas ($250 for a massage? No, thank you!). Not to mention hard-to-book appointments, awkward checkout counters and massages that were never the right pressure. So, we built the brand and massage experience we longed for. We hope you’ll love it as much as we do.

Name: SeniorWorld
Description:
“People don’t grow old. When they stop growing, they become old.”
This is the underlying philosophy of Senior World, India‘s first company established to cater to the overall needs of seniors. Indian seniors’ lives are getting re-shaped like never before. To start with, we are all living longer. With more & more people living well into their 80’s & 90’s, the 60+ group is today the fastest growing segment in India. 
It’s not just how long they are living, but also how they are living that’s changing. More and more families are going nuclear. Seniors are therefore increasingly staying away from their children. Technology and the internet have never been as important as they are today, in keeping families connected.
While these changes are making some Seniors more vulnerable and hesitant, they are also opening doors for others who are reclaiming their retirement to ‘refire’ – carving out active retired lives, pursuing passions they never had time for earlier, travelling & contributing to society. At SeniorWorld, we strongly believe that Indian seniors aspire to get a lot more from life, and also wish to give back a lot more to society. Our mission is to enable them to do both. We also believe that India’s current ecosystem of products and solutions for Seniors is completely unprepared for their burgeoning needs.

Sinds 2006 worden alle Bruno vestigingen zelfstandig uitgebaat door franchisenemers. De concepten beheren en onderhouden is nu één van de taken van de grondleggers van Group Bruno.

Name: ISIC - International Student Identity Card
Description:
Created in 1953, the International Student Identity Card (ISIC) is the only internationally accepted proof of full-time student status. The ISIC card is currently issued in over 130 countries and gives access to more than 150,000 discounts and benefits worldwide for approximately 5 million cardholders each year. 

All full-time students over the age of 12, regardless of their nationality, race, gender, religion, sexual or political orientation can purchase an ISIC card at an affordable price. Via one single card, ISIC students gain preferential and discounted access to products, services and experiences relevant to all aspects of student life, from software and cinema access, to bookstores, public transport, cafes and eateries.

The ISIC Association is the non-profit organisation behind the ISIC card. Through the wide range of opportunities available to cardholders, the ISIC Association aims to play a supporting role in improving intercultural understanding, increasing educational opportunities and facilitating student life across the world. In recognition of this, the ISIC card is endorsed by organisations such as UNESCO, UNWTO, the European Council on Culture and the Andean Community of Nations. The card is recognised by universities, academic institutions, student organisations, national governments and ministries of education and youth around the world. The ISIC Association works closely with strategic partners such as MasterCard, IELTS British Council, EF Education First, and Microsoft to support students internationally.

The ISIC card is managed at a global level by the ISIC Service Office, located in Belgrade, the Serbia. With a team of dedicated professionals, the ISIC Service Office manages the worldwide network of ISIC card issuing partners, and provides them with centralized marketing, sales, finance, IT and operational support services.

Visit www.isic.org and www.isicassociation.org for more information.

Name: League of Extraordinary Women
Description:
We were female entrepreneurs starting out in business and discovering what being an entrepreneur meant - the entrepreneurial journey was at times lonely and isolating. It was hard to explain to our friends why we couldn’t go out for wines on Friday nights so we could pull all-nighters to work on building our business. As fate would have it, we met at networking events and realised that we were all on the same entrepreneurial journey – we were thrilled that we weren’t the only ones experiencing the joy and pain of building a business. So over coffee and cupcakes, we dreamed of creating a small group that would allow other female business owners, entrepreneurs, and startups meet other inspiring women to connect, share and inspire. 

That small group turned into a group of 160 women at our very first event. Since then, the last 5 years have been a whirlwind journey watching the League grow across Australia and North America.

We have seen first hand over the last 5 years how the League has inspired new business startups, facilitated collaborations, created incredible friendships and inspired the next generation of female entrepreneurs and intrapreneurs. We have showcased over 80+ female entrepreneur speakers, run conferences with over 3000 women attending, and created a community of over 100,000. The League continues to pave the way for the female entrepreneurs of the future. Not just in Australia, but globally – especially in countries where women don’t have the opportunities and freedom that we do.

- Softlines & Leather/Foootwear

- Furniture & Food Contact Materials

Our services include:

- Certification: Global standards, ESG frameworks, management systems & product certification

Name: Suddath Relocation Systems
Description:
Suddath Moving & Storage is a nationally recognized leader in residential and commercial relocation services, with a legacy that dates back to its founding in 1919 in Jacksonville, Florida. The company has built a reputation for delivering high-quality, stress-free moving experiences through a combination of expert personnel, comprehensive service offerings and a commitment to customer satisfaction.

Residential & Commercial Moving 
Suddath offers a full spectrum of moving services, including local, long-distance and international relocations. Whether you're moving a household or an entire office, their professionally trained and vetted crews manage every detail—from packing and crating to disassembly and reassembly—with precision and care. As an agent of Atlas Van Lines, Suddath combines global capabilities with local knowledge. This partnership enables them to provide seamless service across the U.S. and internationally, backed by award-winning quality and customer support. 

Employee Relocation 
Suddath delivers customized, end-to-end employee relocation solutions tailored to businesses of all sizes—from single relocations and lump sum moves to large-scale global mobility programs. Their services emphasize flexibility, personalization and technology-driven efficiency. 

Military Member Relocation 
Suddath has been a trusted partner in military relocation, managing over 38,000 military moves annually across the U.S. and internationally. Suddath is deeply committed to supporting service members and their families through the often complex and emotional process of a Permanent Change of Station (PCS). 

Our mission is to serve our customers, communities and each other with the highest level of care, making lives easier by delivering in moments that matter.

The product range includes Padlocks, Dead Locks, Night Latches, Cylindrical locks, Jemmy Proof Locks, Furniture Locks, and Shutter locks, etc.

EUROPA has selected a suitable product range for its customers to provide security to the houses they build. As builders in India get smarter and their occupants more global, there is a perceptible appreciation in the demand for higher technology security products. EUROPA with its state-of-the-art manufacturing, R & D and testing facilities is preparing to handle situations where customers specify their respective security needs and it devises an alternative. Aided by an Impressive Distributors/Dealers Network spread across the country, the Company is able to supply its cost-effective and innovative product range to a wide cross-section of discerning buyers in India.

Name: ACL - Automobile Club du Luxembourg
Description:
L’ACL, ACTEUR ENGAGÉ DE LA MOBILITÉ AU LUXEMBOURG

L’Automobile Club du Luxembourg ou ACL est aujourd’hui une association et une communauté de 194.000 membres qui s’engage pour la mobilité au sens large, pour garantir et promouvoir l’accès à la mobilité, sa qualité, la sécurité et le libre choix du moyen de locomotion. 

La mission de l'ACL est d’offrir une assistance 24/24, 7j/7 et un conseil privilégiés et neutres à travers des services complets pour garantir la mobilité. 

Que ce soit un conseil, une assistance ou des solutions en termes de mobilité classique et électrique - véhicules privés ou de société (autos, motos,…),  mais également en termes de mobilité douce et urbaine (Vélo, E-bike,…) ou mobilité partagée (location partagée de véhicule « carsharing » ou covoiturage « carpooling »), l’ACL soutient le développement d‘une auto-mobilité durable et les concepts de multi-modalité.

Actif et engagé auprès des pouvoirs publics et des autres acteurs de la mobilité pour défendre les intérêts de ses membres et de l’auto-mobilité durable, l’ACL est également actif dans les campagnes de sensibilisation pour améliorer la sécurité sur les routes et soutient les programmes et campagnes du ministère du Développement durable et des Infrastructures, de La Sécurité Routière, de la Police Grand-Ducale et de la Fédération Internationale de l’Automobile (FIA).

L’ACL fait partie d’un réseau de coopérations institutionnelles au Luxembourg et d’un réseau de partenaires internationaux: l’ACL est membre de la FIA (la Fédération Internationale de l’Automobile) ; partenaire d’ARC Europe, le plus grand fournisseur de services d’assistance routière en Europe avec un réseau dans plus de 40 pays européens et partenaire des clubs automobiles européens et mondiaux.

Name: Tumelero Materiais de Construção Ltda
Description:
Fundada em 1º de novembro de 1967, em Porto Alegre/RS, por Melson José Tumelero, a Tumelero iniciou sua trajetória com apenas 10 funcionários, comercializando madeiras, ferragens e produtos de uso colonial. Desde o início, o trabalho sério, a proximidade com o cliente e o compromisso com a qualidade estiveram no centro de sua atuação.

Ao longo das décadas, a Tumelero ampliou continuamente seu portfólio, profissionalizou suas equipes e fortaleceu seus processos, consolidando-se como uma das principais referências no mercado do Rio Grande do Sul no segmento de materiais para construção, reforma e manutenção. Essa evolução aconteceu de forma consistente, sustentada por confiança, relacionamento e entrega de valor.

Em sua trajetória, a Tumelero esteve integrada, por um período, à operação do grupo francês Saint-Gobain, experiência que contribuiu para o seu desenvolvimento estrutural, tecnológico e operacional, ampliando sua capacidade de gestão e sua visão de varejo em larga escala.

Em 2025, a Tumelero passou a integrar o Grupo GG10, conglomerado multinegócios com sede em Dois Irmãos/RS, com atuação nos segmentos de máquinas e ferramentas, materiais para construção, consórcios e desenvolvimento de sistemas empresariais. Sob liderança de Germano Grings e com empresas de forte relevância no mercado, estrutura logística robusta, canais digitais consolidados e atuação em escala nacional, o Grupo amplia a força da Tumelero, potencializa sua capacidade de atendimento, expande seu portfólio e sustenta seu desenvolvimento de forma consistente.

Por meio de suas 16 lojas físicas, e-commerce, televendas e canal de atendimento a empresas, além de um amplo mix de produtos, a Tumelero oferece soluções completas para quem constrói, reforma e mantém. Seu diferencial segue sendo o equilíbrio entre tradição, eficiência operacional, atendimento qualificado e compromisso com a evolução contínua.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: MRJADE Holding
Description:
The Story of Jade Sen

Founder · Visionary · Global Entrepreneur

MR JADE represents luxury, craftsmanship, creativity, and international scale.
Founded by Jade Sen, the brand is built on a rare combination of European precision, entrepreneurial discipline, and a deep passion for culture, music, and design.

From construction sites in Germany to global lifestyle brands across Europe, the Middle East, and the United States — MR JADE is not a trend. It is a legacy in motion.

⸻

The Journey

1977 – Düsseldorf, Germany
Born into a family rooted in craftsmanship and discipline.

Early Years
While still in school, Jade Sen worked in his father’s construction company, learning responsibility, structure, and how real businesses are built — brick by brick.

Alongside this, music became a second foundation. Performing live at weddings and events as a guitarist and keyboardist shaped his sense for rhythm, emotion, and stage presence — skills that later defined his brand storytelling.

1996–1999
Completed professional training in reinforced concrete construction and electrical work, building strong technical and operational expertise.

1999
Founded his first company in Frankfurt am Main.
Opened MR JADE Eventlocation Dieburg, one of the first modern wedding halls in the state of Hessen — a pioneering step in Germany’s event industry.

⸻

Building Icons

2010
Opened MR JADE SAAL Eventlocation Düsseldorf-Mülheim, which quickly became one of the region’s most recognized venues for high-end events.

2012
Founded MR JADE Catering, now operating across Europe with offices in Düsseldorf and London.

2015
Expanded into international construction with MR JADE Construction and MR JADE YAPI in Istanbul, managing major building projects across Turkey.

⸻

From Infrastructure to Lifestyle Brands

2018
Launched MR JADE Coffee and MR JADE Chocolate — based on original recipes, in-house roasting, and uncompromising quality standards.
The same year marked the start of his official music career

Name: Tumelero Materiais de Construção S/A
Description:
Fundada em 1º de novembro de 1967, por Melson José Tumelero, com apenas 10 funcionários, a primeira loja comercializava madeiras, ferragens e produtos de uso colonial. 

No decorrer dos anos, a Tumelero foi ampliando sua linha de produtos e profissionalizando sua equipe. Com isso, tornou-se sinônimo de qualidade, conquistando a cada ano novos clientes e aumentando sua participação no mercado. Em pouco tempo, a Tumelero já era referência no ramo, sendo procurada cada vez mais por quem tinha interesse em construir, reformar, decorar e mobiliar sua casa. 

Hoje, a Tumelero conta com 29 lojas, o site de compras, distribuídos no Estado do Rio Grande do Sul, oferecendo mais de 50 mil itens de 6 mil marcas diferentes aos seus clientes. Tudo isso com um suporte tecnológico que permite que todas as unidades da Tumelero fiquem interligadas on-line ao Sistema Central de Processamento. A perfeita combinação de tecnologia e mão de obra altamente especializada fornece todo o tipo de informação referente a estoques, clientes, crediário, caixas, comunicação entre lojas e auxilia os consultores de vendas a agirem com rapidez e eficiência junto aos seus clientes.

Da fundação da primeira loja, em 1967, até os dias atuais, evoluímos muito, somos referência de qualidade e atendimento aos nossos clientes e ganhamos participação de mercado. Somos um modelo vencedor e queremos continuar a crescer.

Neste tempo, encontramos a Saint-Gobain Distribuição Brasil, a companhia com a qual nos unimos. A rede pertence ao Grupo Saint-Gobain, uma das maiores empresas do mundo no setor, com operação em 66 países e mais de 170 mil funcionários. A divisão de Distribuição opera 4.100 lojas de 26 diferentes bandeiras em 24 países. No Brasil, são 41 lojas das bandeiras Telhanorte, Telhanorte Conceito e PRO Telhanorte em três diferentes Estados – São Paulo, Minas Gerais e Paraná.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

TUR ASSIST, tarafından oluşturulan hizmet birimleri ağı; günümüze dek kalite, servis ve hacim anlamında gelişerek bugün tüm Türkiye’de hizmet sağlayan dev bir yapı haline dönüşmüştür.Bu hizmet ağına dahil olan çekici, kurtarıcı, rent a car, ambulans, ev onarım, otel, acente gibi firmalar düzenli denetim ve eğitimlerden geçerek en üstün standartlarda hizmet vermektedirler.

Türkiye’de başta sigorta, otomotiv ve finans olmak üzere pek çok sektördeki değerli kurumun müşterisine 365 gün 24 saat hizmet sunan TUR ASSIST, oluşturduğu yaratıcı ürünler ve yenilikçi uygulamalar ile asistans sektöründeki lider konumunu, sağlamlaştırarak korumaktadır.

Her biri konusunda uzman TUR ASSIST operatörleri, son teknoloji ve çağdaş güvenlik sistemleriyle donatılmış çağrı merkezinde %99’un üzerinde müşteri memnuniyet oranıyla çalışmaktadır.

TUR ASSIST, bağlı bulunduğu RS Otmotiv Grubu’nun sektördeki deneyim ve uzmanlığını da arkasına alarak bugün Türkiye’de asistans hizmetlerinin yönünü belirlemektedir. Kurulduğu günden beri stratejik bir iş ortağı olarak gördüğü sigorta şirketlerinin hizmet kalitesi ve karlılığını arttırmak hedefi ile çalışmış, pazarın ihtiyaç ve eğilimlerini takip ederek geliştirdiği yenilikçi ürün ve projelerle asistans sektörünün lider şirketi haline gelmiştir.”

Name: Petro Seven
Description:
¿Quiénes Somos?
Somos estaciones de servicios, para personas que valoran su tiempo y están en constante movimiento, las cuales necesitan una recarga de energía (funcional y emocional) oportuna y eficiente para continuar su camino y disfrutar de su día. Nuestro camino comenzó hace 21 años con el nacimiento de nuestra primera gasolinera, cuyo objetivo era satisfacer las necesidades de servicio de combustible y lubricantes de nuestros clientes, siendo ésta la primera estación de servicio de 7-Eleven.

Este crecimiento nos llevó, en 2001, a implementar la marca comercial Petro-7 que hoy en día cuenta con 216 estaciones de servicio, 5 auto-lavados y 5 centros de lubricación, en diferentes plazas del país, donde servimos diariamente 3 millones 740 mil litros a 226 mil clientes; Pero la industria sigue avanzando y hoy ha dado un giro positivo que nos permite tener una imagen propia que concuerda con nuestra convicción de que la energía que proviene de las personas es la que mueve al mundo.

Hoy, Petro-7 es un punto de recarga de energía para nuestros clientes, es aquí donde nace nuestra transformación, contando ahora con estaciones más iluminadas y seguras. Garantizando litros exactos, así como un servicio cálido, ágil, rápido y personalizado.

Petro-7 llega lejos y decide moverse hacia el futuro transformando la imagen de sus estaciones en México, reiterando su compromiso con el desarrollo del mercado energético en el país.

Continuaremos con el proceso de transformación de la imagen de nuestras estaciones de servicio y expansión de nuevas ubicaciones principalmente en los territorios donde opera

Name: Cascioli Group
Description:
Correva l'anno 1964 quando Ernesto Cascioli apriva a Teramo una delle concessionarie più importanti d'Abruzzo, collegata ad un grande marchio: Renault. Fu una felicissima intuizione che rivelò da subito l'amore della famiglia per quei progetti che, collegati al mondo automotive, fossero sinonimo di qualità. Una grande eredità, quella paterna, che Giuseppe e Stefano hanno fatto subito propria, anche se non si sono limitati a raccoglierla. Infatti, hanno iniziato subito ad allargare i loro orizzonti e a fare posto a idee nuove ed originali: quella del prestigio, concetto che si traduce nella costituzione della SIRIO Srl e successivamente della CASCIOLI Spa. 

Attualmente Il Gruppo Cascioli è leader del settore automotive per le province di Ascoli Piceno, Fermo, Macerata, Ancona, L'Aquila e Teramo attraverso la commercializzazione dei più importanti marchi, quali: Bmw, Mini, BMWi, BMW Motorrad, Mercedes-Benz, Veicoli Commerciali, Smart e di più recente acquisizione il brand Toyota. Rappresenta l’eccellenza nelle regioni Marche e Abruzzo con i suoi 12 punti vendita, 2 centri noleggio a breve e lungo termine e oltre 230 collaboratori al vostro servizio.

Nel 2024 ha registrato l'anno record con vendite superiori alle 9.000 unità, 40.000 interventi aftersale e 500 noleggi. Cascioli Group è diventato tra le realtà più importanti del centro Italia per dimensione, numero dei brand e volume d'affari.

Name: Service My Car
Description:
ServiceMyCar.com is the First and Largest Car Servicing Network operating in the UAE, Oman, UK, and Qatar. Using Our App You can Book a Car Service or Repair from the convenience of your home or work.

Your Safety is our Number one Priority.

How We Work:
Step 1
Once you book a service online, our driver will collect your vehicle from your chosen location at your chosen time.
Step 2
A 360 degree full health check is carried out on your vehicle and sent to you. If any issues are found, we will contact you and give you a quotation along with the price for the service parts.
Step 3
Once we receive your approval, we then continue the service and carry out the repairs.
Step 4
Your vehicle is road tested and checked prior to delivery.
Step 5
Your vehicle is delivered back to you.

Till date we have serviced more then 25,000+ cars…

Name: UpTodd
Description:
UpTodd: Introducing the world's best personalised one-stop platform for the holistic developmental needs of infants and toddlers aged 0-5 years, setting a new standard in early childhood care.

UpTodd is a pioneering program, a beacon of hope for parents worldwide. We've distilled insights from 10,000 research papers and tapped into the wisdom of experts from prestigious institutions like MIT, Stanford, IITs, and AIIMS. Our innovative approach weaves together the best from early stimulation, Montessori principles, multiple intelligences theory, Waldorf's holistic approach, the Reggio Emilia Approach, indigenous parenting, and mindful parenting.

But UpTodd isn't just about data and techniques; it's a profound commitment to your child's limitless potential. We empower babies everywhere to not just survive but thrive, to embrace their fullest potential with evidence-backed guidance. As parents, your dreams for your child are our dreams too.

Our program is both scientific and deeply emotional, a journey that combines knowledge and love. We're here to walk this path with you, offering a customized program as unique as your baby. Your little one's journey is our shared responsibility, and their future is our passion.

Join us on this extraordinary voyage, where we cherish the beauty of childhood, savor the moments of joy and discovery, and embark on a heartfelt journey towards a brighter future. UpTodd, because your child's potential is our purpose, and your love is our guide.

Notre concept permet également aux marques d'accompagner les clients dans cette démarche en leur apportant un service de réparation permanent ou ponctuel, pour assurer la durée de vie des vêtements qu'ils distribuent. Notre atelier de réparation de textile permet de réparer les produits en respectant leur design. 

Notre service est destiné aux particuliers qui souhaitent prolonger la durée de vie de leurs vêtements du quotidien.  Doudounes, jeans, vestes,... Grâce à notre calculateur, les clients peuvent commander en toute autonomie leurs réparations et nous envoyer leurs vêtements à faire réparer. 

L’idée de départ étant d’entreprendre le plus proprement possible, Les Réparables entreprennent un système de gouvernance RSE qui s’ajoute à la comptabilité de l’entreprise.

Membre 1%, labélisés RUPTUR et éco défi, Les Réparbales mettent un point d'honneur à ce que la RSE soit présente dans toutes les décisions. 

Pourquoi jeter quand on peut réparer ? 

Pour plus d'information, contactez-nous à l'adresse suivante : 

hello@lesreparables.fr

Name: Relay Technologies
Description:
Relay is fundamentally reshaping how goods move in the online era.
Backed by Europe’s largest-ever logistics Series A ($35M), led by deep-tech investors Plural (whose portfolio spans everything from fusion energy to space exploration), Relay is one of the fastest-scaling startups in Europe.

Our mission: free commerce from friction.

Today, high delivery costs act as a hidden tax on e-commerce, quietly shaping what can be sold online and limiting who can participate. Relay exists to break these barriers. We envision a world where more goods move more freely between more people– where buying and selling online is seamless, accessible, and open to everyone.

In this future:

- Delivery feels invisible: free shipping is the norm, and logistical friction disappears from consumers’ minds.
- Retailers of all sizes thrive online: whether selling a £5 item or a £500 one, as delivery becomes universally efficient and cost-effective.

Just as the internet eliminates friction from communication, Relay removes friction from the movement of goods, unlocking new opportunities for merchants and consumers alike.

We’re building the delivery network for a new era of commerce.

Name: PrivacyHawk
Description:
PrivacyHawk is an all-in-one personal data protection service for consumers. PrivacyHawk reduces individuals' risk of their personal data falling into the hands of scammers, spammers, hackers, and identity thieves.

What's unique about PrivacyHawk is that the product not only helps get consumers personal data out of data broker databases and off the surface web, it also helps reduce consumers' risk of being in a data breach by 90% or more by automated removal from tens of thousands of corporate databases holding much more sensitive information. PrivacyHawk also offers a full suite of identity monitoring, protection, restoration and insurance.

PrivacyHawk has two patents, (and two more pending), including its proprietary "Privacy Score," the first personal data exposure risk score that works like a credit score. Users can install the app for free, do a free privacy scan, get a privacy score, and find out how many personal data exposures they have. Premium subscribers can then get access to a full suite of personal data protection services to help reduce their digital footprint and protect their personal data.  

Founded in 2021 by seasoned privacy, consumer data, and engineering experts, PrivacyHawk is venture backed and headquartered in Los Angeles.

Name: SAWACO - Water Desalination
Description:
"DESIGNER WATER" - We Customize our Water for the very specific needs of our clients.
 
SAWACO water desalination is the leading supplier of un-bottled potable water for people and businesses in Saudi Arabia. SAWACO  operates and maintains its own and third party desalination plants and trucks & trailers fleet. 

SAWACO’s main plant is at North Obhur in Jeddah. Built in 2002, in collaboration with internationally renowned water treating companies, it now boasts a desalination capacity of 22,500 m3/day with another 10,000 m3/day. Its state of the art facilities employ technologically innovative processes to ensure high quality water that surpassed even the international standards set by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Saudi Arabian Standard Organization (SASO). 

In recognition of its competence, SAWACO was the first private commercial water production plant to operate in the Kingdom with license granted by the Ministry of Water and Agriculture.

Producing safe fresh water was just the prelude, making it available for everybody 24/7 is another thing. SAWACO’s sizeable fleet of HACCP certified bulk carriers improved steadily and substantially access to this clean water in the greater Jeddah area and the Western region of Saudi Arabia. 

It prides itself for being the only company in the KSA and the Middle East to utilized stainless steel 316 tankers for bulk distribution. It is SAWACO’s unwavering commitment to quality, by preserving product integrity from the plant right to the consumers doorsteps.

Name: Ovation Fertility
Description:
Ovation Fertility is different than your average stand-alone IVF lab because we practice “collaborative medicine”. As a collection of independently-thinking IVF and genetics labs that share research, experience and best practices, the depth of knowledge supporting the care provided by Ovation Fertility and its affiliated physicians is fundamentally greater. Our integrated platform provides our patients with unique IVF solutions based on the collective knowledge of our 70+ scientists and physicians, rather than on the opinion of one or two well-intentioned individuals working at a local lab.

Our collaborative approach make sense. Working as a cohesive team, Ovation Fertility’s scientists produce more research, generate more experience and therefore have greater insight into what works and what does not. In the end, the data shows, our scientists and clinicians achieve better outcomes and deliver fewer twins and triplets than the vast majority of independent providers. In essence, what Ovation Fertility delivers is value – in the form of fewer cycles and more singleton live births.

Description:
We’re the creators of soil transformation, an environmentally-friendly alternative to burial and cremation. Over a 30-day process, we gently transform a body into nutrient-rich soil.

Families receive a portion of this soil - to scatter or plant - and the remaining soil is sent to conservation land that we acquire, to restore and protect it for future generations.

Our experience is carbon neutral, digital-first and underpinned by best-in-class family care.

Visit earthfuneral.com to learn more.

Our offerings, from handcrafted Crystal Trees and Rudraksha to Pooja Essentials and Bespoke Corporate Gifts, are designed to bring peace, balance, and positivity to personal and professional spaces.

We are on a mission to infuse everyday life with depth and meaning through products that inspire, heal, and transform, promoting well-being and mindfulness to redefine spirituality for the 21st century.

Name: Audo
Description:
Ambitious young people weren’t taught skills applicable to a marketplace, let alone the workforce in an ever shifting economic environment. 

From this insight, a new version of Audo was born. 

Designed to guide our ambitious users through targeted upskilling toward an ultimately fulfilling career. We want to serve anyone who has a desire to find and create meaningful work.

It incorporates A.I. technology and gamification to introduce and connect an ambitious community of the forever curious to their unique path, unlocking opportunities for anyone, anywhere, who has a desire to find and create meaningful work and live their life to the fullest.

Purpose:
We’re building the clearest and most personalized path to find fulfilling work, so our users can create something meaningful for themselves and the world. Help us build a better tomorrow for everyone, today.

Name: alias entrepreneur·e
Description:
alias entrepreneur·e a pour mandat de fonder un mouvement en faveur de l’entrepreneurship et la création de richesses. Ce mouvement vise à rendre accessible des outils essentiels qui serviront les entrepreneurs d’aujourd’hui. Ultimement, nous désirons remplacer les vieilles institutions et créer un sentiment de partage entre bâtisseurs. 

C'est une plateforme web qui me permet de non seulement répondre à vos questions, mais d'en faire profiter toute la communauté entrepreneuriale québécoise.

Selon alias entrepreneur·e, l’entrepreneurship se définit par un état d’esprit alimenté par la passion de bâtir, l’audace de l’aventure et la volonté de constamment se dépasser.

La plateforme, en soit, a quatre objectifs :
La mobilisation : Créer un mouvement social qui valorise l’entrepreneuriat.
L’appartenance : Créer une communauté active et adaptée aux réalités d’affaires d’aujourd’hui.
L’utilité : Montrer la réalité de l’entrepreneuriat et offrir quelque chose d’utile.
L’inspiration : Offrir des perspectives et des leçons d’expériences.

alias entrepreneur·e, une nouvelle façon d'apprendre. Une façon unique, dynamique, originale.

Serge Beauchemin

Nous intervenons sur l'ensemble du Territoire.

Name: Nisan Bereket
Description:
Finans yönetimini yalnızca rakamların takibi olarak değil; şirketin bugünkü performansını koruyan ve gelecekteki büyümesini şekillendiren stratejik bir alan olarak görüyorum. Finans Yöneticisi olarak, sürdürülebilir kârlılık ve finansal disiplin odağında çalışıyorum.

Bütçe, nakit akışı ve finansal raporlama süreçlerini; risk yönetimi ve mevzuata uyum çerçevesinde yönetiyor, yönetime sağlıklı ve güvenilir finansal içgörüler sunuyorum. Analitik bakış açım ve detay odaklı yaklaşımım ile finansal verileri doğru kararların temelini oluşturacak şekilde yorumluyorum.

Description:

Our mission is to provide exceptional residential and commercial services by upholding the legacies of our brand partners, empowering their growth, elevating performance, and enhancing the quality of life in the communities we serve. Name: 1BRIDGE
Description:
1Bridge is a village commerce network present in 6000+ villages of 60 districts across 6 states through a 7000+ network of 1Bridge Advisor(1BAs) who are our local trusted entrepreneurs.  By enabling their integration into the digital world through our tech platform, building social capital in their village communities, and creating opportunities to generate additional incomes consistently, we make it compelling for the 1BAs to stay & grow as part of the 1Bridge network. 
Our Partners today include Amazon, Myntra, Snapdeal, Mahindra Logistics, Flipkart, Ananya Microfinance and digital aggregator platforms like BankIT, Cyberplat, Eko, etc.. Our unique network and its capabilities make us a Partner of Choice for any partner  looking to build a deep engagement, cost effective, reliable distribution model to reach the rural heartland of India. It also makes us an attractive collaborator for any third-party logistics(3PL) provider or larger transportation network aggregators looking to rapidly add rural connectivity to their existing networks without the costs of building and managing it. 

1Bridge currently has physical distribution hubs in 50 Districts – each with around 1000-4000 sft space, fully staffed with Station Managers/ Team Leads, rented vehicles for delivery and all digital facilities. These hubs manage the delivery network in that district. All transactions/tasks are delivered by our 1BAs on our 1Bridge Advisor App – which integrates delivery, financial transactions, and order aggregation. All financial transactions with our 1BA – payments, collections are completely cashless- operated through closed wallets & UPI transfers.

Name: Student Painters.net
Description:
Our Story

In the spring of 2000, UW graduates Dwayne and Jessica Bishop branched out from a nationally owned organization and formed the locally recognized Student Painters.net. Since acquiring local ownership the Northwest operations have grown tremendously, grossing over $2.3 million in 2007. In 2008, CEO Jessica Bishop was chosen by the Puget Sound Business Journal as a 40 under Forty honoree.

Student Painters is founded on the belief that universities hold a unique resource; a small pool of future business and community leaders that are ready to do great things if only they can be provided with the skills and knowledge necessary to do so. Your Student Manager has been carefully selected for responsibility, drive, and passion for business from a pool of thousands of interested students. Their challenge is to utilize the Student Painters system that has been developed over the last 30 years and implemented by hundreds of students, to develop their exclusive branch into a successful, professional business.

We know that our Students Managers are remarkable people capable of doing great things. Please read what our Satisfied Customers have said about their experience with Student Painters, then request your Free Personalized Estimate.

Our Mission

To provide a challenge, in the spirit of Entrepreneurialism, where exceptional young people, with the voice of our experience to guide them, can attain a level of confidence and achievement that will forever set them apart.

Description:
