Name: Happinest Brands
Description:
Happinest is all about building partnerships with like-minded home service-related brands, making the American dream real for franchisees and giving customers a trusted resource to turn to for all of their home service needs. Sharing resources all under one umbrella but allowing partner brands the room to keep their unique brand identity. Think of it as the Avengers of franchising.

Happinest is building a company within the home services space that is helping existing or emerging brands by providing centralization where it should be and decentralization where it needs to be.

• Happinest is truly focused on only service concepts and building out a “Home Advisor” of franchising model.

•Happinest offers mobile and lower cost models that are not storefront or brick and mortar based.

• Happinest leverages its infrastructure and over five decades of experience to provide world class support and shared services for its brands.

• Happinest provides immense value with its centralized media programs driving leads and significant local demand for owners.

• Happinest differentiates itself by utilizing a state-of-the-art in-house sales center to address speed to lead and convert sales for franchisees.

• Happinest allows for scale at the unit level with recurring revenue business models and high retention rates.

Our purpose is to "Change Lives - One Happy Nest at a Time". We provide exceptional quality, customer focused home services that free our customer's time to spend in more valuable ways. Happinest is a leader in the home service industry. We believe in innovation, integrity, teamwork, and the power of our people. We intend to expand our reach until we deliver home services of just about every type. The corporate office consists of a Marketing Department, People and Culture, Accounting, Business Advisors, a Call Center and Manufacturing. Our company culture is one based upon mutual support, trust, and the belief  that we can accomplish great things as a team.

Name: Pinger
Description:
Pinger has been building apps that help people communicate in new and surprisingly simple ways since 2005. Our two flagship services, Sideline and TextFree, have been used by over 100 million people around the world. 

Sideline gives people a 2nd phone number to organize work and life on one device. As the go-to phone solution for mobile professionals, Sideline is one of the fastest-growing communication apps in the App Store and Google Play.

TextFree makes communication free and accessible, even without a carrier plan. As the original free texting app, TextFree lets anyone with an internet connection call and text for free from a real phone number.

Name: Lederne - Danmarks største lederorganisation
Description:
Velkommen til Lederne. Vi er en interesseorganisation og A-kasse for ledere og andre betroede medarbejdere. Vi repræsenterer mere end 130.000 medlemmer, og vi har som den eneste faglige organisation i Danmark specialiseret os i ledere og ledelse – derfor hedder vi Lederne.

Medlem hos Lederne
Som medlem kan du trække på et en bred vifte af eksperter, der har erfaringen og kompetencerne til at udvikle dig og hjælpe dig videre, når du møder udfordringer i lederjobbet. Hvad enten du er ny eller garvet som leder, ruster vi dig til fremtidens arbejdsliv, sikrer din relevans og klæder dig på til morgendagens ledelsesudfordringer. Læs mere her, hvor du også kan melde dig ind: www.lederne.dk/medlemsfordele 

Om Ledernes LinkedIn-side
Følg vores lederunivers, som vi har skabt til dig, der er leder. Her deler vi nyheder, events, jobopslag, faglig viden og inspiration om ledelse. Vores mål er at sætte fokus på ledere, og hvordan god ledelse kan gøre en stor forskel. 

Vi kan desværre blive nødt til at slette indlæg eller blokere brugere, som ikke lever op til god opførsel. Vi tillader ikke kommercielle indlæg, jobopslag og lignende. Vi håber, at I vil bidrage til den gode stemning og tone på vores side og engagere jer i snakken om ledere og ledelse. 

Lederne - en verden til forskel

Name: CLEAR
Description: CLEAR is a security identity company making experiences safer and easier—physically and digitally. With over 33 million Members and a growing network of partners across the world, CLEAR’s identity platform is transforming the way people live, work, and travel. Whether you are in the airport, at the stadium, or on your phone, CLEAR connects you to the things that make you, you. CLEAR+ helps you speed through airport security, while CLEAR1 is our enterprise product that powers trusted identity solutions for businesses across healthcare, travel, and financial services. Headquartered in New York City with offices in Austin, TX and Washington D.C., CLEAR’s mission is to strengthen security and create frictionless experiences.

Name: Britvic plc
Description:
Britvic is now part of the Carlsberg Group. In the UK, it has combined its business with Carlsberg Marston’s Brewing Company to form Carlsberg Britvic go and follow us there for updates! 

With a leading portfolio of soft drinks, beers and cider – the company celebrates iconic brands, rich heritage and innovation.  

In each of our markets across the globe, we own much-loved brands, including household names such as Robinsons, Tango, J2O, MiWadi, Teisseire and Maguary. In Great Britain and Ireland, we have an exclusive licence with PepsiCo to make and sell Pepsi MAX, 7UP, Rockstar Energy and Lipton Ice Tea.  

Our portfolio will refresh you wherever you are: in your home, going out or on the go.  

Find out more at www.Britvic.com

Please drink responsibly and only share our alcohol content with people of legal drinking age.

Name: Enercare Inc.
Description:
Enercare Inc. is one of Canada’s largest home and commercial services companies, providing leading products and services in heating, cooling, plumbing, electrical, water heating and water purification. Our purpose is to provide energy-efficient products and services to our customers, so together we can take action for a greener tomorrow, starting in our homes and buildings. We take pride in continually striving to make a positive impact in the communities we operate in.

Enercare is a company that believes strongly in the health, safety and wellness of our people. It’s a place where careers are made.  A place where people care about the communities we operate in, and who are inspired everyday by our purpose. In our values and our ambitions, we embrace change, and support our team members along the way. 

Nationally, Enercare Inc. operates under several brands including Enercare, Service Experts, HydroSolution, Pioneer Plumbing & Heating, and Syles Mechanical Services, servicing Canadians in Ontario, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec and New Brunswick. We are united through our joint commitment to excellent customer service to the Canadians we service every day, and our mission to contribute to a resilient, sustainable future. 

Enercare Inc. Is wholly owned by Brookfield Infrastructure Partners LP (“Brookfield”), a global leader in the management of alternative assets across real estate, infrastructure, renewable power, and private equity.

Name: Work From Home
Description: Do you want to be your own boss, and make money working from home? Some work will earn you income from the comfort of your home. Alot of people are seeking flexible arrangements that enable them to work from home at their convenience.

Name: Zamil Air Conditioners
Description:
Zamil Air Conditioners Holding Co. Ltd., a subsidiary of Zamil Industrial Investment Co., was founded in 1974 as pioneer in the Saudi Arabian air conditioning industry. The company has expanded over the past five decades to become a leading international manufacturer of air conditioning systems and is currently the Number One producer in the Middle East. 

Zamil Air Conditioners designs, manufactures, tests, markets and services a comprehensive range of air conditioning products, from compact room air conditioners and mini splits to large scale central air conditioners, chillers and air handling units for highly specialized commercial and industrial applications. The company's products and services are marketed under various brand names depending on the specific market. Zamil Air Conditioners factories are located in Dammam, Saudi Arabia. 

Zamil Air Conditioners supplies air conditioning products to over 55 countries across the world – the major markets are GCC, Middle East, North Africa, Europe and Asia.

Name: Enrich
Description:
At Enrich, we strive to help people realize how gifted they are & also help discover the magic in others. We practice this every day by creating systems and services that help our team members and their families, customers, and young budding beauty students look, feel, and be the best version of themselves. 

We are one of the leading salon chains in India with over 83 salons across six cities - Mumbai, Ahmedabad, Pune, Surat, Vadodara, and Bengaluru. But that’s not all. We also run the Enrich Academy where we train beauty therapists and stylists to hone their skills and polish their talent. We offer courses in hair, skin, makeup, nails, and salon management. Our Academy has international accreditations including CIDESCO, CIBTAC, and ARTH among several others.

Our work ethic and love for our customers and employees alike have not gone unnoticed. We have bagged the Best Regional Salon Chain of the Year award for three consecutive years and our stylists participated as Regional Finalists thrice in the Indian Hairdressing Awards. We have also won awards for Salon of the Year- West at the Beauty & Wellness India Awards 2021, Best Salon in Digital Marketing, Regional Retailer of the Year, and the Award for IT Impact. Moreover, the fact that we have been recognized with the credentials of Best Workplace Practices at the Global HR Excellence Awards 2021 (presented by Times Ascent World HRD Congress), Best Workplaces for Women 2021 (presented by The Economic Times) & The Best HR Practice of the Year proves that Enrich truly is a great place to work.  

More than a list of awards, we are a group of people helping each other reach and deliver their maximum potential every day to produce the best results for our clients, our students, and our Planet Enrich.

Name: Collinson
Description:

We deliver market-leading airport experiences, loyalty and customer engagement, and insurance solutions for over 400 million end consumers.  

We are also the operator of Priority Pass, the world’s original and leading airport experiences programme. Travellers can access a network of 1,800+ airport lounges and travel experiences in 841 airports in 146 countries   

Private ownership means we can focus on the values that are important to us. These drive everything we do and result in us acting with integrity and agility while making long-term investments and decisions.

Name: Qi Group
Description:
We are a multinational conglomerate with a global footprint across Asia, Europe, Africa, and the Middle East. Our diverse portfolio encompasses education, travel & leisure, wellness and lifestyle, direct selling, luxury goods, retail, and more. 

With a global workforce exceeding 2,000 individuals across our group's entities, we are committed to cultivating an environment that values diversity, equity, and inclusion.  

Our commitment to sustainability is evident in our meat-free operations and the elimination of single-use plastics across our offices. We are also a proud Forum Partner of the World Economic Forum (WEF), a Horasis Global Visions Community member, and a member of the UN Global Compact. 

At the heart of our operations is a steadfast commitment to creating positive impact, both within our organisation and the communities we serve. 

From our inception in 1998, we have been driven by a vision of a world where individuals and communities thrive. This vision is realised through our diverse business ventures and guided by our unwavering dedication to social responsibility. Our ethos, RYTHM (Raise Yourself To Help Mankind), lies at the core of everything we do. 
  
Our successful journey thus far is proof that incremental progress can lead to extraordinary outcomes. 

We have learned that extraordinary achievements are built brick by brick, day by day.  

Our Founders, Vijay Eswaran and Joseph Bismark instilled in us the belief that progress, no matter how small, is a victory. 

This enduring principle has guided us on our journey, shaping us into the organisation we are today, where we harness the power of human potential to create an environment where our diverse employees can flourish. 

To learn more about what we do and why we do it, visit our website at https://www.qigroup.com/.

Name: Shuttl
Description:
Founded in 2015, Shuttl is India’s largest office commute service provider. With a mission of solving the pain of commute, Shuttl offers a space-efficient, safe, and cost-effective solution for urban India.

Shuttl has demonstrated the ability to simultaneously address the dual challenge of congestion and pollution. The company catalyzes a shift away from private vehicles towards shared mobility - a win-win for citizens and cities. It also drives entrepreneurship by providing bus-owners on its platform with the latest technology, better financing, and relevant training, to help them scale and participate in offering a smarter, safer, and greener solution to bus riders.

Today, Shuttl serves over 1,00,000 rides daily in seven cities including Delhi-NCR region, Mumbai, Kolkata, Pune, Chennai & Hyderabad. It covers 350+ long routes and operates a fleet of 2000 buses. It has also been awarded UK’s Ashden Award (2018) and Road Safety Award by FICCI (2017). Shuttl is backed by Sequoia Capital, Amazon Alexa Fund, Times Internet, Lightspeed Ventures, Dentsu Ventures, Toyota Tsusho & SPARX Group.

Name: Distribuidora Corripio
Description:
QUIENES SOMOS

Somos una empresa del Grupo Corripio, dedicada a  la comercialización de prestigiosas  marcas nacionales e internacionales, caracterizadas por sus estrategias de ventas,  la calidad y servicio que ofrecemos.

La innovación comercial  y  la  investigación de mercado son las  herramientas  principales  para  maximizar  el desarrollo de marcas y su penetración en el mercado dominicano, satisfaciendo sus más altas expectativas.

 HISTORIA DE LA EMPRESA

 Al inicio de la década de los 60, el Señor José Luís Corripio, empresario dominicano de ascendencia española, inició un proceso de diversificación y expansión del pequeño negocio familiar. Se enfocó en la comercialización de electrodomésticos y juguetes. Desde entonces,  se añadieron paulatinamente diversas marcas y otros tipos de productos. Fuimos creciendo consistentemente;  hoy en día somos una de las empresas más importantes del país, parte del Grupo Corripio.

El Grupo Corripio cuenta con más de 30 empresas y 14,000 empleados.  

VISIÓN

Contar con la preferencia de mis marcas, productos y servicios en toda República Dominicana

MISIÓN

Ser la mejor empresa elevando la calidad de vida con nuestras marcas, productos y servicios.

VALORES

RESPONSABILIDAD Somos dueños, responsables y veloces en lo que hacemos y en lo que obtenemos.

EXCELENCIA Somos excelentes ganando aún en las situaciones más difíciles por nuestra determinación y pasión por lo que hacemos. 

HONESTIDAD Somos honestos, sinceros y abiertos con nuestros socios estratégicos, clientes, proveedores, consumidores y compañeros.

RESPETO Somos respetuosos tratando a los demás como nos gustaría ser tratados.

Name: Neighborly
Description:
Neighborly brands repair, maintain, and enhance properties — to make life easier and more enjoyable for homeowners. Our consistency and quality work are the basis for everything we do, and are what make us a leader in the home services space, as we constantly strive to "be so remarkable, we become a beloved household name." Our team of dedicated associates and franchise owners, united by service to others, comprise the foundation for unleashing our elevated products, home repair services, and an elevated customer experience to the communities we serve. When combined with our Code of Values of Respect, Integrity, Customer Focus, and Having Fun in the Process, Neighborly sets the tone for our culture and business, and empowers the pursuit of entrepreneurship and a meaningful career.

Neighborly has over 2,000 corporate employees worldwide with the Global Headquarters located in Waco, Texas and Irving, Texas.

Name: TÜV NORD GROUP
Description:
With over 10,000 employees in more than 70 countries in Europe, Asia, Africa and the Americas, TÜV NORD GROUP is actively committed to its national and international customers. Its broad consulting, service and inspection portfolio encompasses both specific individual tests and inspections and also management of complex safety solutions.

TÜV NORD GROUP is organised into Mobility, Industrial Services, Training, IT, Natural Resources and Aerospace business units – competence centres are in permanent contact with customers for analysing, consulting and also developing and implementing customised solutions.

TÜV NORD GROUP customers benefit from the broad, well-founded expertise of qualified and approved consultants and inspectors. Through their understanding of the customer's situation and needs and the technical area concerned, these experts form the backbone of the Group's success.

Name: Arcoprime
Description:
Nuestra historia comienza en 1990 con la inauguración de la primera Tienda Pronto en Nos, un lugar estratégico a la salida de Santiago donde innovamos con el acceso a servicios higiénicos, venta de hot dogs, snacks y bebidas junto a nuestra Estación de Servicio Copec.

En nuestra misión de rol país asumimos el desafío y actualmente somos la cadena de Alimentación al Paso más relevante del Chile, con más de 450 Tiendas Pronto -y Punto- que se han convertido en el principal espacio de encuentro en el Viaje de todos los chilenos. Asimismo, nuestro negocio se ha diversificado y consolidado también hacia el mundo digital a través de tiendacopec.cl

Las Estaciones de Servicio son otra de nuestras líneas de negocio; administramos una extensa Red que nos permite llegar con una gestión de excelencia y calidad a más de un millón de personas cada día en los lugares más recónditos del territorio nacional.

La sostenibilidad es uno de los grandes pilares de nuestra Compañía, por ello nos hemos comprometido en ser una empresa Cero Residuos al 2029, aportando al entorno y a las comunidades donde estamos presentes a lo largo de Chile

Te invitamos a sumarte a nuestro propósito de enriquecer la vida de todas las personas en el viaje a su destino!

Nos vemos Pronto!

Name: RealCo Indonesia
Description:
RealCo was founded based on the notion that consumer products should be meaningful. No brands out there had what people needed, such as powerful ingredients thoughtfully chosen for health benefits and products that highlight local resources while appealing to a younger audience.

That's why RealCo was invented, to bring high-quality products that work to improve health & wellness and make it accessible for everyone. RealCo comes with a variety of brands such as Realfood, Awal Mula, and  Himewa. All parent brands strive to create powerful products, that are innovative and supported by digital transformation to become the number 1 Digital-based Healthy Consumer Goods company in Indonesia. Powered by today's generation, to promote a better quality of life, bring positive impact, always think outside the box, and boldly go!

Name: Aitken Spence
Description:
Established in 1868 by two British entrepreneurs focused on trading and maritime services, Aitken Spence PLC is a leading player in Hotels, Travel, Maritime Services, Logistic Solutions and Power Generation in Sri Lanka. The Colombo-based diversified conglomerate has significant interests in Plantations, Insurance, Financial Services, Printing and Apparel.

Listed in the Colombo Stock Exchange since 1983, the Company is a signatory to the United Nations' Global Compact and has been repeatedly recognised by the country's leading business chamber as one of the best corporate citizens in Sri Lanka.

Aitken Spence has operations in nine countries. The Company believes in leading strategic growth businesses and possess a credible record of working with global leaders in the sectors it operate in.

Name: CAINCO
Description:
La Cámara de Industria, Comercio, Servicios y Turismo de Santa Cruz - CAINCO, es una organización gremial que aglutina a las empresas industriales, comerciales, de servicios y turismo, legalmente establecidas en el departamento de Santa Cruz.

Representamos al sector empresarial promoviendo el desarrollo, la competitividad, la protección y la defensa de los intereses de las empresas, coadyuvando al progreso económico y social del país.
Location: Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Andrés Ibañez

Name: Amenify
Description:
Amenify is multifamily Proptech company which powers resident lifestyle services for apartment communities. Cleaners, food and grocery delivery, handyman, chores, car washes, pet care, and more are now all part of your properties offerings. 

Amenity's unique approach to cash credits creates a verifiable and proven approach for operators to create new ancillary income like never before. Operators generate more revenue, residents get credits to use on services, and local small businesses are supported through Amenify. 

Amenify is now live in over 1.5 million homes/apartments including many of the top 50 PMCs.

Name: IPSY
Description:
IPSY is the industry’s most powerful platform, uniting brands, creators, and hyper-engaged consumers with unprecedented access to each other. Our portfolio includes IPSY Original (our sample-size subscription), IPSY Extra (our full-size subscription), and IPSY Ultimate (our most premium full-size subscription). 

Powered by expert curation, product innovation, machine learning technology, and millions of member insights, we deliver highly personalized beauty experiences every month. To date, the IPSY community has generated more than 200 million product reviews, helping us make discovery smarter and more authentic. Whether you’re a beauty enthusiast or just starting your journey, IPSY is here to inspire everyone to express their unique beauty. Join us…because beauty is more fun here.

Ready to join us as we empower people on their journey to self-expression and discovery? Visit our careers site to learn more about the values, culture, benefits, and more across all our brands. 
https://www.ipsycorporate.com/careers

Name: Seven Retail
Description:
In 2020, Seven Retail was established as a House of Brands, integrating multiple business units under one cohesive strategy for lifestyle, F&B and education. Each new venture is meticulously crafted to become a leader in its category, maintaining the company's commitment to quality, accessibility, and aggressive innovation.

We are on a mission to make high-quality, exceptional lifestyle experiences accessible, helping people get more out of their paycheck so everybody can experience a higher standard of living.

Over 200 outlets to date with +1 new store added every other day. Creating several new brands into new categories every single year.

We rapidly iterate, constantly reinvent, and obsessively experiment when it comes to product innovation and consumer experience.

Check out our website and come experience our brands for yourself!

Name: RP Sanjiv Goenka Group
Description:
The RPSG Group is one of India's fastest growing conglomerates with a significant global presence. The Group's businesses include power and energy, carbon black manufacturing, retail, IT-enabled services, FMCG, media and entertainment, and agriculture.

In the last few years, the group has grown exponentially in revenue, market cap and profitability. We have made all our businesses, leaders in their respective sectors.

Name: SEN'EAU
Description: Nous nous occupons de l’exploitation et de la distribution de l’eau potable en zone urbaine et péri-urbaine du Sénégal.

Name: Almacenes EL REY
Description:
Almacenes El Rey es una empresa 100% costarricense.

El objetivo fue y sigue siendo ser el almacén favorito de las familias costarricenses, uno donde además de comprar productos, encuentren felicidad al recorrer nuestros pasillos.

Nacimos como una tienda en el centro de Alajuela hace 23 años y hoy día somos más de 17 almacenes a lo largo del país, en los cuáles tenemos la dicha de contar con más de mil colaboradores. 

Trabajamos cada día para ofrecer un excelente servicio al cliente, variedad, novedad y precios accesibles en todos nuestros productos.
Tienda, zapatería, perfumería, librería, hogar, ferretería y hasta la confitería más grande del país, están entre nuestros servicios.

Somos un equipo que trabaja con pasión, valentía, espíritu de equipo e integridad.

Somos los reyes de los almacenes y vamos a seguir creciendo juntos!

Name: Bondi Sands
Description:
Australian made. Globally loved.

We give our lovers around the world a confident glow.

We capture the iconic Australian summer and bring it to you every day. Bondi Sands is about sand, sea and sun and the lifestyle that comes with it.

We bring a confident glow to our customers all year round with salon-quality self tan, SPF protection, body care and skincare products.

Owned and made in Australia, we have teams globally in Melbourne, Los Angeles and London. 

Welcome to Bondi Sands

Name: Voi Technology
Description:
At Voi, we use innovation and creative thinking to design the solutions of tomorrow – today. By offering a radically new approach to urban mobility, we revolutionise the way people move around, for greener cities and healthier communities, fueled by passion.

Our vision is a shift towards an urban mobility paradigm focused on community, inclusivity, environment and climate rather than individual car use. We aim for a tomorrow in which city dwellers live and move in a safe and healthy environment with less pollution, less noise and less stress.

The future we see is a sustainable one where circularity is the norm and shared mobility the way to go. Where individuals, businesses and governments alike take responsibility and strive to reduce their climate impact, help to protect our planet and contribute to more liveable cities for all.

—

Since being established in 2018, Voi has grown into one of Europe’s leading micromobility companies. Our network now extends across the continent, and we take great pride in the creativity and diversity of our talented people, who drive our innovation and continued growth. Discover more at Voi.com.

Name: Babylist
Description:
Babylist is the leading digital destination for growing families. For over a decade, Babylist has been the technology solution for expecting parents and the community that supports them, expanding from baby registry into a full-service platform that helps parents make decisions with confidence, stay connected and build happy and healthy families. Every year Babylist helps over 9M people make purchases through its registry, app, ecommerce shop and comprehensive product guides. The Babylist ecosystem now includes Babylist Health, which provides access to products and services including insurance-covered breast pumps, Expectful, a new voice in health and wellness for pre-pregnancy through postpartum care, and The Push, a branded content studio that works with the biggest companies in the baby space. With over 59M monthly pageviews and 1.2M TikTok followers, Babylist is a generational brand leading the $88 billion baby product industry. To learn more about Babylist’s registry options, editorial content and more, visit www.babylist.com

You can also see a list of open positions at www.babylist.com/jobs.

Name: Rentoza
Description:
Rentoza has embarked on the bold mission to democratize and dematerialize ownership of technology devices and appliances for all African consumers. We are South Africa’s first pure play subscription model for digital goods and appliances, our model is breaking new ground in driving access, affordability and flexibility in the e-commerce ecosystem while remaining  distinctly clear of finance and credit consumer propositions. 

We believe that the subscription economy will be the next leap frog for the African continent and it is our goal to build, scale and purport this economic phenomenon in the region by building an inclusive, technology enabled platform and business.

Name: Tango
Description:
Tango is a social live-streaming app with over 400 million downloads worldwide.
The home for creators around the world, Tango helps people unlock people’s creativity and push the live-streaming experience to the limit.
With an all-in-one platform and digital economy, we are the premier destination for meeting new people, exploring live-streaming content, and discovering new creators & entertainment in real-time. 
Tango has global offices in Kyiv, Limassol, Warsaw, Dubai and Tel Aviv.

Name: Cámara de Industrias de Costa Rica
Description:
Institución que representa al sector industrial del país.  Su liderazgo, le ha permitido impulsar mejores condiciones, no solo para el sector industrial, sino para miles de costarricenses que dependen directa o indirectamente de la actividad.

La CICR busca que sus empresas asociadas tengan un mejor clima de negocios a lo externo de ellas, así como también que sean más productivas a lo interno. Lo primero lo logra mediante sus actividades de representatividad y de impulso a iniciativas ante actores gubernamentales; lo segundo, con su oferta de servicios de capacitación, consultoría, asesoría, entre otras.

Name: Jardine Matheson
Description:
Jardine Matheson is a diversified Asian-based group with a broad portfolio of market-leading businesses. We are one of the top 200 publicly traded companies in Asia, and a member of the Fortune Global 500. 

Across the Group, our 425,000 employees work in a wide range of businesses in major sectors including motor vehicles and related operations, property investment and development, food retailing, health and beauty, home furnishings, engineering and construction, transport services, restaurants, luxury hotels, financial services, heavy equipment, mining and agribusiness.

We operate principally in China and Southeast Asia, where our subsidiaries and affiliates can leverage and tap our vast experience, expertise, networks, and long-standing relationships in the region. Our goal is to help Group companies achieve sustainable growth over the long term by providing financial and other resources.

Principled leadership, a long-term perspective, innovative thinking and a commitment to mutual growth inspire us. They also underpin our businesses which provide products, services, and experiences that impact the lives of many millions every day. These values also apply in our workspaces, where we strive to provide positive, safe working environments. We are also committed to improving communities through programmes that make a difference in environmental stewardship, education, mental health and more.

Name: John Paul
Description: Founded in 2008, John Paul provides companies and brands with relationship marketing strategies for their clients and collaborators, through three complementary offers, operated under white label. First with conciergerie services, next with affinity marketing programs and finally with the creation of exceptional events. Inspiring, John Paul conjures the unique know how of its 350 Concierges and accesses their prestigious address book of 10,000 world wide partners. Innovative, John Paul benefits from a unique and global digital platform with ultra personalised content, thanks to a proprietary technology.

Name: TruGreen
Description:
For over 40 years, our associates at TruGreen have demonstrated unwavering commitment and dedication, providing top-tier lawn care and exceptional service to our customers, with each lawn presenting a new opportunity.

Our associates embody the essence of customer service, reflecting our core values of Safety, Service, Teamwork, Accountability, and Respect. Their passion for our customers and communities, coupled with a strong sense of camaraderie, has positioned us as a leader in the lawn care industry. By consistently exceeding expectations and delivering high-quality care, our team serves as the backbone of our business; therefore, we firmly believe in investing in our associates just as they invest in our customers.

We are committed to supporting our team with competitive salaries, comprehensive benefits, opportunities for career growth, and the stability that comes from over four decades of proven success. Joining TruGreen means embarking on a career that you can truly love, where you’ll be valued and respected every step of the way.

Additionally, TruGreen is dedicated to diversity and inclusion, and we encourage candidates from diverse backgrounds to apply. We are an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer for Minorities, Females, Protected Veterans, and Individuals with Disabilities. Together, we look forward to creating a welcoming and inclusive environment where everyone can thrive

Name: AWS Distribution
Description:
Founded in 1981, AWS Distribution is one of the GCC’s fastest growing companies, operating a wide selection of brands, and hosting a diverse and dedicated force of employees. Headquartered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, it was founded under the leadership of Mr. Abdulwahed Bin Shabib, its Chief Executive Officer, and one of the UAE’s esteemed business leaders and philanthropists.

Over the years, AWS Distribution has diversified itself to become a foundation for multiple unique brands, each of which are engaged in unique sectors. Our portfolio now includes food and non-food FMCG trading, electronics and home appliances, power tools, construction, healthcare, and more. We aim to connect customers and communities with these brands, backed up by a dedication to quality and service.

Thanks to a customer-first approach and the dedicated work of its employees, AWS Distribution is now one of the most respected and successful business groups in the United Arab Emirates. Its operational reach has since expanded internationally across the GCC and MENA regions, including the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and Kuwait, and further on to South Africa and Russia.

AWS Distribution was created to provide exceptional products and services that not only enrich people’s daily lives but also strengthen and empower communities. With a commitment to excellence, forward-thinking, and long-term planning, AWS Distribution looks forward to the future, constantly looking for new opportunities and partnerships, and new challenges to take on.

Name: FLO EV Charging
Description: FLO is Canada’s largest electric vehicle (EV) charging network. We operate a comprehensive charging ecosystem that fulfills EV drivers’ needs wherever they may be—at home, at work or on the go—by ensuring a consistently simple and seamless experience. FLO offers smart home charging solutions for both single-family houses and multi-unit residential buildings, as well as access to thousands of public charging stations across the country. FLO also provides turnkey solutions to property managers, business owners, employers and municipal administrators who wish to support EV adoption by supplying charging services.

Name: SquareTrade
Description: Over the past 20 years, Allstate Protection Plans (also known as SquareTrade) has revolutionized the product protection industry. We’ve done it through innovation, seamless customer experiences, and by following the golden rule: treat others as you want to be treated. That’s why over 70% of consumers say they prefer Allstate Protection Plans over our competitors, and why Allstate Protection Plans are trusted by over 140 million customers and many of the largest retailers and mobile carriers in North America, Europe, Japan, and Australia to protect everything from smartphones to appliances, TVs to furniture, and more. Life happens. We get you back to good.

Name: Whites
Description:
Whites: Finest Garment Care

Whites is a premier provider of high-quality dry-cleaning and premium laundry services, dedicated to redefining garment care. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every aspect of our operations, from the expertise of our skilled textile professionals to the use of state-of-the-art machinery and technologies. We are focused on delivering a delightful and seamless experience for every client, ensuring their needs and preferences are at the heart of our service.

Whites specializes in high-end textile care, offering unique & exclusive couture and bridal services. Our experts handle the most cherished gowns with exceptional care, ensuring they receive the meticulous attention they deserve. In addition, we offer exclusive shoe and bag cleaning and restoration services, performed by our skilled craftsmen with years of experience in handling high-end brands.

Name: Looks Salon
Description:
In 1989, first Looks Salon was established in Karol Bagh, New Delhi with a vision to revolutionize the Salon Industry in northern India. Intend to change the beauty and Hair Industry, conceptualization of Salon from a Barber shop was initiated. The services were enhanced to provide a luxurious customer experience. 

Envisioned to provide best in class luxury services throughout the geography.   

We at Looks have been a keen believer of premier service delivery and development of employees. Looks Academy was established with the thought to revamp the Hairdressing and Beauty industry. At present, Looks Academy offers various courses to aspiring candidates. Established in 2014, Looks Academy has trained and successfully placed 1000 + candidates. 

Looks has remained at the forefront of the hair dressing industry in India, driving the professional hairdressing and exceeding all industry standards to make expertise available on a larger scale. The company has evolved over the years by constantly updating its stylists with new techniques and styles, keeping pace with the ever-growing trends in the global market. Looks Salon is now 200+ branches across India and is making headway for more additions to the family chain. Looks has also established footprints globally and expanding with Dubai.

Name: Terminix
Description: Terminix is a leading provider of residential and commercial pest control. Terminix provides pest management services and protection against termites, mosquitoes, rodents, and other pests threatening human health and safety. Headquartered in Memphis, Tenn., Terminix serves approximately 2.9 million residential and commercial customers in 24 countries and territories. To learn more about Terminix, visit www.Terminix.com.

Name: The Parentinc
Description:
Welcome to The Parentinc. 

Be part of the largest content, community, and commerce platform for parents in Southeast Asia, and join our mission to help parents have healthy pregnancies and raise healthy children and families. 

Our flagship brand, theAsianparent, provides parents with relevant content via its website and app; a social network where they can connect with the community; income opportunities as niche influencers, content contributors, and research panellists; and access to curated mama and baby products and services. theAsianparent app has a 4.9-star rating and over 12 million downloads to date.

We also own and operate Mama’s Choice, a multiaward-winning mama and child brand of safe, natural, and Halal products that are dermatologist tested and FDA approved - giving mamas #OneLessWorry in their parenting journey. 
 
In 2022, we acquired Vietnam's largest communities for women and parents, Webtretho and Bé Yêu. 

In 2024, we acquired Motherswork, a premier omni-channel retailer specialising in premium mother, baby, and kids' products. Since launching in 1998, Motherswork has two stores in Singapore and 10 in China, and offers over 300 esteemed brands, with the exclusive distribution of 20 brands including Avent, Joolz and Stokke. 

Our investors include Central Retail Corp., East Ventures, Fosun Int'l, Global Grand Leisure, JD.com, LINE SEA Corp., Mirae Asset-Naver New Growth Fund, Redbadge Pacific, SCB 10X, Tigris Capital, Vertex Ventures, and WHG Holdings.

At The Parentinc, we offer the opportunity to make a meaningful contribution to improving the quality of families’ lives through technology. We push our team to ignite their curiosity, take ownership, and lead with integrity. With us, you will hone your talent, awaken your potential, turn tech & data into real world solutions, make your mark, and most of all, impact millions of families.

Together let's strive #towards100millionhealthypregnanciesandfamilies

Contact us at info@theparentinc.com

Name: SERVPRO
Description:
Our vision at Servpro Industries, LLC is to be the premier cleaning and restoration company in the world. So when disaster strikes, homeowners, businesses and insurance providers will rely on us to respond with unparalleled service excellence. As a nation's leading fire and water cleanup and restoration company with more than 2,000 franchises nationwide, we are growing rapidly creating exciting opportunities for "A Level" talent at our Corporate headquarters in Gallatin, TN.

As a valued Servpro Industries, LLC employee, you'll be part of a stable, growing company offering state-of-the-art customer service and products throughout the United States and an excellent working environment for its employees. The top qualified candidate will receive an attractive salary and competitive benefits. 

Do you love a challenge? Are you motivated to help people succeed? Do you have a dream? Do you want to form relationships with quality people? Do you just love the color green? Servpro Industries, LLC may just be for you.
 
Servpro Industries, LLC is an Equal Opportunity Employer M/F/D/V.

Name: Capegemini Consulting India Private Limited
Description: Capegemini Consulting India Private Limited is a consumer services company based out of Wz-415-A, Naraina Village, , Delhi, Delhi, India.

Name: Eaze
Description:
Eaze delivers good with the goods. As California’s largest legal cannabis marketplace for delivery, we bring enjoyment and convenience to our customers, break down barriers to access, and cultivate community in everything we do. 

To date, Eaze has proudly serviced over $1 billion in cannabis deliveries across its 10-year history.

Name: CoutLoot Swipe!
Description: CoutLoot Swipe is an Gen AI SAAS + Demand platform that empowers everyone to sell online with short format videos & live shows by creating viral content and buyer leads. After scaling our marketplace business to 25Mn+ downloads and 1.3Mn sellers we're solving for two of the biggest problems faced by every business/individual seller - creating amazing AI led content in the most simple, fast way and target it to the right converting consumer

Name: Cashify
Description:
India’s first and largest end-to-end smartphone solution provider. 
- Use our buying guide to purchase the smartphone that’s best suited for you. 
- Buy the trendiest high quality mobile accessories that give you the edge.
- Get your smartphone repaired at the most affordable prices by our super-skilled technical team.
- Shop from our wide range of refurbished smartphones at exciting prices and 6 months warranty.
- Sell your used smartphone right from your doorstep and get instant cash on the spot.

Get in touch with us for everything mobile and find services at zero hassles.

Name: Perkbox
Description:
Perkbox is a global rewards and benefits platform that helps companies to care for, connect with and celebrate their employees, no matter where they are or what they want. Our platform helps organisations to align their people with their purpose. 

Trusted by over 4000 businesses across the globe, the Perkbox platform helps keep employees motivated, supported and engaged. Our platform empowers teams with the choice in how they’d most like to be rewarded, recognised and celebrated. From personalised reward and recognition, to meaningful benefits and wellbeing support — we’ve got something for everyone, regardless of where they are or what they like. 

Our global mobile app provides a seamless experience on the go for everyone and is proven to save businesses time and money, as well as improving team performance. With over 10 years’ expertise, we’re here to help you take your employee value proposition to the next level.

Name: FINN
Description: At FINN our mission is to drive change for people, organizations and the planet through frictionless mobility: We help everyone who loves driving their own car but refuses the struggle, commitment and intransparent costs associated with car ownership. We achieve this by offering all-inclusive, immediately available, monthly car-subscriptions. Best thing, yet: FINN provides a more sustainable mobility option through funding climate protection projects.

Name: Grooters India
Description:
We believe that our future holds "NATURE'' and technology. 
Our existence is totally based upon this fact and working towards to make this belief come true

Name: Laundryheap
Description:
Laundryheap is an on-demand, next generation laundry & dry cleaning startup operating across 13 countries globally. 
Our drivers pick & deliver to your door, all within 24 hours.

Our services are available in the following countries:
UK: London, Coventry, Birmingham & Manchester.
Ireland: Dublin
France: Paris
Netherlands: Amsterdam & Haarlem
UAE: Dubai & Sharjach, Abu Dhabi
Denmark: Copenhagen
Qatar: Doha
USA: New York, Boston, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Chicago, Miami
Kuwait: Kuwait City
Bahrain: Manama
Saudi Arabia: Riyadh & Jeddah
Singapore: Singapore
Peru: Lima

Customers can book via our website or our mobile app.

Name: GraceKennedy Ltd.
Description:
GraceKennedy Limited is a publicly listed company on the Stock Exchanges of Jamaica and the Republic of Trinidad & Tobago. The Company was founded on 14 February 1922, and is the parent company of a Group of subsidiaries operating mainly in the Food and Financial Services industries. The Group’s operations are
structured into two Divisions:

Food Trading: This comprises the business of food manufacturing through our own factories, as well as through external suppliers; the distribution of Grace and Grace-owned brands in Jamaica and internationally; and the operation of retail outlets through our Hi-Lo Supermarket chain in Jamaica. The Group also manufactures and distributes third party brands in Jamaica and internationally. The Food Trading segment operates in Jamaica, the Caribbean, Central America, North America, Africa, the United Kingdom (UK), and several European countries.

Financial Services: This comprises our commercial banking, general insurance, insurance brokerage, investment banking, remittance, cambio and payment services businesses. Our Financial Services subsidiaries presently operate within the English-speaking Caribbean.

Name: INDIGO Group
Description:
INDIGO is the world leader in parking and individual mobility, serving the metropolitan areas and smart cities of tomorrow. Present on two continents, INDIGO is a global player with local roots. INDIGO brings together several businesses: off-street parking, on-street parking, individual mobility, digital solutions and urban services. Indigo is present in 9 countries and is a leader in its field worldwide, developing tailored solutions and targeting all market segments.
Finally, what is the strength of Indigo is the proximity we have with local territories. 

INDIGO est le leader mondial du stationnement et de la mobilité individuelle, au service des métropoles et smart cities de demain. Présent sur deux continents, INDIGO est un acteur global à l’ancrage local. INDIGO rassemble plusieurs métiers :  les parcs en ouvrage, la voirie, la mobilité individuelle, les solutions digitales et les services à la ville. Le Groupe est présent dans 9 pays et leader de son secteur à travers le monde, en développant des solutions sur mesure, sur tous les segments de marché.
Enfin, ce qui fait la force d’Indigo, c’est la proximité que nous avons avec les territoires.

Name: Starship Technologies
Description:
Starship Technologies is the world leader in autonomous robot delivery. 

Our robots have made more than 8 million deliveries globally - they've travelled over 17 million kilometres and make more than 125,000 crossings each day. 

Sustainable, scalable, ethical and efficient - we're revolutionising last-mile delivery. 

We partner with household names to deliver hot food, groceries and supplies in settings as diverse as US college campuses, local communities across Europe and on industrial sites.

Name: ServiceMaster Brands
Description:
ServiceMaster Brands is a leading franchise provider of needs-based residential and commercial services in the restoration, cleaning, moving, and bioremediation industries. Founded in 1929, today the company is home to over 3,500 franchisees across 4,900+ locations serving over 1M homes and businesses each year.

Our Brands and Purpose
ServiceMaster was founded with a deep commitment to integrity, customer service and developing people and does business under seven brands today across 50 states and nine countries that generate more than $3.7B in system-wide sales: ServiceMaster Restore, ServiceMaster Clean, Merry Maids, TWO MEN AND A TRUCK, TWO MEN AND A JUNK TRUCK, Aftermath, and Indoor Science. While each brand maintains a distinct identity, we share a commitment to our purpose to Be there when you need us.

Our Core
Whether helping a family recover their most precious items and return to their homes following a fire, enabling a business to provide a clean, welcoming work environment to their employees, or moving a young couple to their first home, our Core guides our actions:

•	Do what’s right. We show leadership and courage by demonstrating integrity and doing what’s right for our teams, partners and customers.

•	Take care of each other. We put others first and create a safe environment for people to be successful and supported.

•	Think like an owner. We are passionate about our work, empowered to make decisions and accountable to each other to achieve results.

•	Bring out the best in others. We include all voices, seek out different points of view and invite healthy conflict to find the best ways to reach our goals.

•	Act with agility. We stay nimble, continuously listen and learn, and take smart risks to innovate and deliver long term success. 

•	Play to win. We come prepared, stay on offense and stretch ourselves to deliver our commitments to all stakeholders.

Description:
Lakmé Lever Pvt. Ltd (Lakmé Lever) is a 100% subsidiary of HUL. It operates India’s most trusted and leading chain of Lakmé Salons that offer expert services in hairstyling, skin, and beauty care. With nearly 40 years of experience and a footprint of over 450+ Lakmé Salons across 160 cities, Lakmé Salon has a deep understanding of the beauty and wellness industry. Lakmé Salon’s aim is to Beautify the Future by enabling consumers, employees, and partners to learn, grow and care for the planet and become the best version of themselves. Known for its innovative, customized, and result-oriented solutions across make-up, hair and skin services, Lakmé Salon brings the backstage expertise and experience of Lakmé Fashion Week to modern Indians through a team of over 5000+ highly trained professional stylists, presented in a unique Runway Secrets menu. Employees are offered individual development and growth plans based on their personal and professional goals. More than 300 entrepreneurs have partnered with Lakmé Lever as franchisees to own Lakmé Salons across the country. Lakmé Academy powered by Aptech, India’s leading vocational training organization, operates 140 academies and has trained over 50,000 students to become beauty professionals. With 55+ safety measures implemented across every touchpoint at every salon, Lakmé Salon has been voted SAFER THAN HOME by its customers and has witnessed an increase in its Net Promoter Score from 58% to 88%, despite the pandemic.

Visit our Website: www.lakmeindia.com/lakme-salon/
Visit our Facebook Page: www.facebook.com/LakmeSalon

Name: HomeServe USA
Description:
Finding the happy since 2003. 

HomeServe takes pride in putting people at the heart of everything we do. From our customers to our technicians to our employees, caring is at the core of our culture. That’s why for the past four years, we’ve been rated a “Great Place to Work” certified employer.

At HomeServe, we strive to provide a workplace where our nearly 3,000 employees feel welcomed, acknowledged, heard, and respected. Our strong commitment to a formal Diversity and Inclusion strategy and through our HomeServe Cares Corporate Social Responsibility initiatives, HomeServe is committed to putting our employees, our customers, and our communities first. 

For over 20 years, HomeServe has been a leading provider of home repair solutions in North America providing home repair plans that help protect our customers’ budgets from the expense and inconvenience of water, sewer, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, and other home repair emergencies. We have helped to save our customers over one billion dollars in home repairs by providing affordable home repair coverage and exceptional, local repair service. HomeServe is a BBB Accredited Business that is dedicated to putting a smile on the faces of nearly 5 million customers across the U.S. and Canada. 

For more information about HomeServe, please visit us at www.homeserve.com.

Twitter @HomeServeUSA
Instagram: @homeserve_usa

Name: American Residential Services
Description:
ARS / Rescue Rooter is a nationwide, company-owned network of residential and light commercial service providers specializing in plumbing, heating, air conditioning, electrical, indoor air quality, sewer, and drain services.

Headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee, ARS operates more than 70 locally managed service centers across 24 states and Washington, DC. The company supports a diverse portfolio of well-known national and regional brands, allowing customers to work with trusted local providers backed by national resources, systems, and standards.

ARS operates under a “Be National. Act Local.” philosophy, combining centralized training, technology, and strategic partnerships with local leadership and market-level decision-making.

As an employer, ARS offers career opportunities across technical, operational, and corporate roles, with a focus on professional development, safety, and service excellence.

Whether you’re booking a PCR test for travel, looking to pamper yourself with a massage, ordering groceries for the week or planning a stylish haircut in the comfort of your own home, Swan is all you need. 

Saving your time and bringing you comfort is our priority! We’re always adding more features, expanding our delivery locations, and partnering with new service providers to bring you a constant stream of new services!

Swan is available in Abu Dhabi, Dubai, Sharjah, and Al-Ain! Discover everything you could be getting from the comfort of your living room - download our app!

Description:
The Sandberg Goldberg Bernthal Family Foundation (SGB) works to build a more equal and resilient world. We bring people together to support each other through three initiatives:

Description:
Hi there. We’re Zipcar, the world’s leading car-sharing network, driven to make cities better places to live.
We started with a simple but brilliant idea: get more people sharing cars than owning them. 25 years later, we're still on a mission to enable simple and responsible urban living by providing cars on demand to members.

Name: Elite Foods Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Elite Foods & Innovations Pvt Ltd. is a diversified group that handles activities in various sectors such as Food Processing, Retail, Solar Energy & Real Estate. The Elite Food Division runs one of the largest food companies in South India that retails to more than 60,000 outlets in India through a network of 1,100 distributors. The company has an annual turnover of Rs. 4,500 million, out of which 15% comes from International Businesses alone. The Group’s food sector is powered by 11 quality driven high-tech manufacturing facilities that run all across India.

Elite is an ISO 9001-2000 and HACCP certified company that has adopted a Total Productivity Maintenance policy under the guidance of the renowned Japanese Institute of Productivity Management (JIPM). With more than 150 SKU’s, the group has the capacity to supply over 600 mts of branded products daily with stringent safety and quality control through its HACCP certified plants. Being the pioneer of its own milling units, Elite Group has a great Milling Story to tell to its customers. A story, which boasts of the excellent quality control the brand has been following since the start from producing a wide spectrum of non-adulterated natural products, to its state of the art packaging and delivering procedures. Our excellent business and management systems supported by ISO 22,000 and TQM ensure quality that par excels at all levels.

Spreading their operations across 5 continents and many global markets including UAE, USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Singapore, Maldives, Oman, Bahrain, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Botswana, Hong Kong & Israel, Elite have been attracting customers from all over the globe by delivering the best quality, superior taste products along with the promise of good health. With a production and processing base in Kerala, Elite has successfully captured the global market and are now exploring future opportunities.

Name: Autotorino
Description: Founded in 1965, Autotorino has achieved its current structure through continuous evolution, thanks to the geographical proximity of its commercial and assistance services as well as its supply formulas and digital relationships with all customers.

Name: Orkin
Description:
For 125 years, Orkin has set the standard for reliability and performance in the pest control industry. How? By keeping our promises – every day, every service. The pests hate it, but our customers love it.

Our thoroughly trained Pros use our innovative approach to Integrated Pest Management and the latest technology, so you get maximum protection with minimum exposure. Plus, you can rest easy knowing The Orkin Pro is on the job because all of our customers are backed by one of the industry’s most comprehensive guarantees. 

Interested in joining our award-winning team? As an Orkin Pro, you’ll be the person delivering on the promise behind pest control’s best-known brand. It’s more than a job—it’s a career with growth potential and benefits that go beyond the basics. With Orkin’s hands-on training program, we’ll provide you with all the tools you need to succeed. That means no industry experience is required to start and build a career with us. Plus, if there’s one thing we know at Orkin, it’s that pests keep coming back, and that makes our industry recession-resistant. By joining Orkin, you can count on a career with the best in pests.

Orkin is a wholly owned subsidiary of Rollins, Inc., (NYSE: ROL).

Name: Supertails
Description:
At Supertails, we’ve spent the last four years wagging, purring, growing, and glowing...all thanks to the incredible community of pet parents who’ve believed in us. 

Our mission? To be your friendly neighbourhood pet parenting sidekick, making every step of your pet care journey easier!

From launching three state-of-the-art pet clinics in Bengaluru with Fear-Free certified vets, to expanding our online store with everything from food to fashion, we've gone all out to give your furry friend everything they deserve! 

In the past year alone, we’ve:
 Partnered with some of India’s biggest petfluencers
 Distributed 1000 kg of food to streeties across the country
 Crossed the 4 lakh mark in our growing community of pet parents

And we’re just getting started.

Follow our journey, the chaos, the cuteness, and everything in between, here on LinkedIn and over on Instagram: @supertails.official

We’ve created an environment where you can look forward to coming to work and interacting with compassionate people who enjoy what they do and love supporting their team.

We’re dedicated to keeping our Associates fulfilled and helping them feel secure. With such a diversity of products and services, our Associates have the opportunity to fulfill customer needs while advancing their own career. AAA Club Alliance received the prestigious Ragan Diversity Award for Allyship in Action in 2021 and in 2023 was a finalist for Ragan’s Corporate Social Responsibility & Diversity Award for our Stepping Up for Hunger campaign. Description:
Bienvenido/a al perfil de Macrotech!

Somos una empresa líder en brindar y diseñar propuestas de servicios integrales en el Sector Salud, tenemos la misión de mejorar la calidad de vida de los pacientes a través de terapias y alternativas de tratamientos innovadores.

Contamos con un equipo multidisciplinario, enfocados en diseñar propuestas de alta complejidad adaptadas a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, generando diferenciadores de valor que nos convierten en un aliado estratégico del Sector Salud.

Name: Libbey
Description:
As an Americas-based business with a global reach and exemplary customer service, Libbey delivers the finest glassware and tabletop to the world. 

We’re redefining fine tabletops through the creation of glassware, tableware and flatware with unparalleled beauty and durability.

We are proud of our Midwestern grit and the entrepreneurial spirit of our hometown in Toledo, Ohio where we oversee the manufacturing of environmentally responsible glassware and tabletop products. 

We’re dedicated to increasing our environmental sustainability and we’re transparent about the progress we are making.

Our products instill confidence in our end users to empower consumers to celebrate life’s moments. Whether it’s enjoying a cold beer with a coworker after a long day at the office, a casual night out with friends or family, or a special occasion with that certain someone, Libbey makes every moment one to remember.

Glass is the earth-friendly solution for today’s sustainably minded lifestyles, because everything taste better in glass – naturally. 

We’re artisans who believe that form and function can combine to create beautiful sensory experiences that enhance every occasion. Because we know that total tabletop solution should begin with the menu in mind.

Our designers, engineers and artisans are meticulous in their resolve to produce the finest tabletops for the makers of drinks, the makers of meals, and the makers of memories.

Libbey: Made for Makers, by Makers since 1818.
 
If you like a challenge, having an impact, and making a difference, become a maker and join our Libbey team!

Name: goeasy Ltd.
Description:
goeasy Ltd. is a Canadian company, headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, that provides non-prime leasing and lending services through its easyhome, easyfinancial and LendCare brands. Supported by over 2,600 employees, the Company offers a wide variety of financial products and services including unsecured and secured instalment loans, merchant financing through a variety of verticals and lease-to-own merchandise. Customers can transact seamlessly through an omni-channel model that includes online and mobile platforms, over 400 locations across Canada, and point-of-sale financing offered in the retail, powersports, automotive, home improvement and healthcare verticals, through approximately 11,300 merchant partners across Canada. Throughout the Company's history, it has acquired and organically served over 1.6 million Canadians and originated approximately $18.5 billion in loans.

Accredited by the Better Business Bureau, goeasy is the proud recipient of several awards in recognition of its exceptional culture and continued business growth including inclusion in TIME Magazine's inaugural list of Canada's Best Companies, 2024 Best Workplaces in Financial Services & Insurance, Waterstone Canada's Most Admired Corporate Cultures, ranking on the 2022 Report on Business Women Lead Here executive gender diversity benchmark, placing on the 2024 Report on Business ranking of Canada's Top Growing Companies, ranking on the TSX30, Greater Toronto Top Employers Award and has been certified as a Great Place to Work. The Company is represented by a diverse group of team members from over 90 nationalities who believe strongly in giving back to communities in which it operates. To date, goeasy has raised and donated over $6.7 million to support its long-standing partnerships with BGC Canada and many other local charities.

Name: Mohamed Naser Al-Hajery & Sons Ltd.
Description:
Mohammed Nasser Al-Hajery and Sons Company founded in 1946 with a single ‘Kuwaiti Drug Store’ has now grown into one of the largest consumer services group in the state of Kuwait. We take immense pride in our rich and prestigious history as it has helped us lay down a foundation for an illustrious future and helps us grow each day. The company has now become a household name and is engraved on the heart of Kuwait.

Progressing and growing from a single drug store to the position that we now find ourselves in is a true testament to what we are capable of achieving as a team. Name: BORWITA CITRA PRIMA
Description:
BORWITA is an independent distribution company that was founded in 1976 by Mr. Hady Karyono. Borwita was first involved in the business of pharmaceutical distribution based in Surabaya. The company's business grew aggressively and in 1988, Borwita started a Consumer Products Distribution Division.

Driven by the rapid growth of the consumer products distribution division, PT. Borwita Citra Prima (BCP) was incorporated in 1995. Today, BCP distributes the full spectrum of consumer products, including personal care & hygiene, food, and beverage. BCP's principals are market leaders within their respective segments and include both multinationals and home-grown conglomerates.

Borwita's current distribution reach spans East Jakarta, West Java, Central Java, East Java, Bali, Lombok, Nusa Tenggara, Sulawesi, Maluku, and Papua. Our family of 5,000+ people is our greatest asset which allows us to cover 340,000+ outlets across all channels, ranging in size from hypermarkets, supermarkets, minimarkets, wholesalers, big retailers, and small stores. Borwita's infrastructure includes 34 warehouses, 349 delivery trucks, and 280 delivery motorcycles operating out of 170 branch offices across Indonesia.

Commencing 2014, Borwita has expanded its business to start a Logistic Services unit. Leveraging its strong infrastructure and network, backed by strong & in-depth experience logistic professionals, Borwita Logistic has been able to provide & serve unique solutions to its customers in warehousing, multi-mode deliveries, and cross-docking activities. Borwita Logistics serves logistics services for P&G, Frisian Flag Indonesia, Nutrifood, Mitra Bukalapak, and many more.

Under the auspices of PT. Borwita Indah, in 2018, Orbiz, an e-commerce enabler with freedom built in was launched. ORBIZ was built as a strategic partner to meet the business needs of online sales, both in pureplay retail to e-commerce platforms as online distributors, or through direct sales to customers.

Starting out as India distributors for Lutron Lighting Control Systems (USA) and Crestron automation systems (USA), today, the company has over twenty-three years of experience in providing solutions for automation (over 200 clients) and lighting controls to over 100 hotels across the country.

KeyMe leads the industry in both customer experience and technological innovation, consistently setting new standards for service excellence and reliability.

Description:
At Stellar Lifestyle, we are committed to moving people and enhancing lifestyles by transforming everyday transit spaces into vibrant destinations. As Singapore’s largest manager of retail and advertising spaces within the rail network, we continuously innovate to create meaningful connections between businesses, commuters, and communities.

Creating Vibrant Transit Destinations
We manage and optimize 42,000 sqm of retail spaces across MRT/LRT stations and bus interchanges, turning them into dynamic environments that enhance the commuting experience. With initiatives like Hive 2.0, modular vending machines, and placemaking activities, we bring convenience and vibrancy to commuters’ lives, offering on-the-go F&B, retail, and services tailored to their needs.

Our spaces are more than just transit stops—they are hubs of connection, providing meaningful retail and lifestyle experiences that reflect our commitment to serving communities and supporting businesses.

Connecting Through Media and Engagement
Through Stellar Ace, our media and advertising arm, we connect brands with millions of daily commuters using innovative advertising solutions. From traditional media to digital activations and ad tech, we help businesses create lasting impressions on diverse audiences across Singapore.

Enabling Convenience with Staytion
Staytion introduces co-working spaces located at MRT stations, offering a seamless solution for work, celebrations, and connection. Designed for flexibility, these spaces support productivity and collaboration—all conveniently a stone’s throw away from home.

We believe in doing right, doing good, and doing well by creating transit destinations that serve communities, businesses, and lifestyles. Serving over 3 million passengers daily, Stellar Lifestyle is dedicated to building spaces that inspire, connect, and grow with the people of Singapore.

Name: Mosquito Joe
Description:
ABOUT MOSQUITO JOE

It’s no secret that mosquitoes know how to ruin outdoor fun. They constantly show up uninvited to ruin outdoor parties, sporting events, games, BBQs, family time and special events. It’s time to stop smacking yourself in the face and say hello to Mosquito Joe.

Mosquito Joe is your solution to make outside fun again. We provide mosquito control services to residential and commercial customers, repelling and killing outdoor pests such as mosquitoes, ticks and fleas. Our technicians are trained mosquito control experts who can come to your house to apply barrier spray solutions that keep your yard itch-free for 21 days, or install misting systems, which offer a more permanent solution. We also provide services for special events to keep your guests chatting and laughing instead of scratching and slapping. 

Learn more about us at www.mosquitojoe.com or connect with us through Facebook (www.facebook.com/mosquitojoecorporate) or Twitter (http://twitter.com/mosquitojoe).

COMPANY BACKGROUND
Mosquito Joe began operation in 2010, based out of Norfolk, VA. In 2012 the company initiated a plan for national expansion and moved the corporate headquarters to Virginia Beach, VA.  Mosquito Joe franchises are now available in markets across the United States. Visit www.mosquitojoefranchise.com or call toll-free 855-JOIN-JOE to learn more about our high-margin, low investment opportunity in the emerging mosquito control industry.

Description:
Funeral Partners was founded in 2007 and is the third-largest funeral company in the UK with more than 200 branches and continue to expand through acquisition and opening new branches.

Our mission is to deliver funerals that we, the communities we work in, and the families we serve, can all be proud of. We offer a sensitive, professional service to the families in our care, and we are a forward-thinking, open-minded organisation leading the way in setting new standards of excellence within the profession. 

We have always been ambitious; we are driven by our desire to provide an excellent service in all the communities that we serve. Our teams are recruited and are based within the communities that they know and serve, with key members of our leadership team having been born and raised in family-run funeral homes. We may be national company, but we continue to act and think like a local business, being involved in the heart of our communities through charity work and retaining the vital heritage of the businesses we acquire.

Our people are key to our success, they bring a wealth of experience from both inside and outside the Funeral industry. We invest in our people through continuing in-house and external training at all levels to support our commitment to the communities we serve. 

We are looking for colleagues to join the Funeral Partners family of businesses that demonstrate personal qualities consistent with our core values, having a caring and understanding approach, respect, and courtesy towards the deceased and their families.

Name: OTP Mobil Kft.
Description:
Az OTP Mobil az OTP Csoport tagjaként 2013-ben alakult azzal a céllal, hogy új fintech megoldásokat fejlesszen ki a mindennapi élet megkönnyítésére. 
A cég 2014 nyarán tette elérhetővé a Simple alkalmazást, amivel egyszerűbbé tette a fizetési folyamatot, és egyenesen élményszerűvé a vásárlást. Az alkalmazásban az olyan mindennapos tevékenységek mellett, mint a közterületi parkolás kifizetése vagy az autópálya-matrica vásárlás, megvehetjük a mozi-, koncert- vagy akár színházjegyünket, buszjegyünket és bérletünket, hívhatunk taxit vagy rendelhetünk ételt is. Sőt már biztosítást is köthetünk autónkra vagy mobilunkra, vagy befizethetjük általa csekkjeinket. Az első pillanattól kiemelten fontosak felhasználóink visszajelzései, mert ezek alapján fejlesztjük az alkalmazást, ami 2017 júniusától érintéses mobilfizetésre is alkalmas. 2023-ban pedig ismét megújult a Simple app dizájnja és funkcionalitása.
A cég nem csak a B2C piacon van jelen termékeivel, hiszen a 2015 decemberében bevezetett SimplePay termékével online fizetési megoldást is kínál. A SimplePay rendszerét közel 20 ezer vállalkozás veszi igénybe.
Emellett 2020-ban a fizikai kártyaelfogadás felé is nyitott az OTP Mobil, a SimpleBusiness alkalmazás segítségével gördülékenyen kínálhatnak érintéses fizetési opciót a vállalkozások, üzletek.

Lease is more! Because bicycle leasing means more financial benefit for the employee at the same wage cost for the employer. How? Thanks to the tax benefit for the employee, bicycle leasing is up to 40% cheaper than a private purchase. And for you as an employer, it is budget-neutral.

Moreover, with our state-of-the-art digital platform, we remove all barriers for HR managers, employees and bicycle dealers to get started with bicycle leasing. This allows you to experience the financial benefits, convenience and pleasure of a leased bike for your employees without any hassle.

And we like to pass on our passion for cycling: at o2o, we are pioneers in building a vibrant cycling culture within companies. With a smashing kick-off, tailor-made presentations and fun cycling events, we stimulate the cycling spirit in your organisation.

In short, at o2o we share our (cycling) passion for making the world just a little bit healthier, more social and more sustainable. It is no coincidence that 'smart move' is our slogan: together, we go for it and with our smart online tools we get everyone on the road, safely ánd smoothly.


Interested in bicycle leasing for your business? We would love to help you get started! Contact us at info@o2o.be.

Interested in joining our o2o team and making an impact? Then check out our vacancies or apply at jobs@o2o.be.

Name: Naki
Description:
Naki is changing the way people charge their electronic devices on-the-go. 

Founded in Belgium in 2019, the company started with two observations: 
∘ First, phones and other electronic devices are an integral part of many people's daily lives, so they cannot afford to run out of battery.
∘ Second, owning your own powerbank only displaces the problem: you have to keep it charged, carry it everywhere you go, and manage so many cables.

With Naki Power, you can charge your electronic devices, anywhere, anytime, on-the-go, without having to leave your device behind or worry about cables. Our powerbank rental offers freedom and convenience for people in cities, like other sharing economy services such as electric bike and scooter rental.

Naki stations can be found in cities across Europe, in bars, restaurants, hairdressers, airports, public transport hubs, shopping centres, fitness centres and hotels.

The Naki Power app makes it easy to locate stations, and once a user account is created, it takes just a few seconds to pick up or return a powerbank.

Naki powerbanks can charge any kind of smartphone, thanks to the three included charging cables. They are also ultra-efficient, taking 60 minutes for a full mobile device charge, and providing two full charges, on average.

Mission | Our ambition is to create a world where people are free from phone battery constraints, can easily charge their electronic devices on-the-go and no longer worry about being cut off from their phones and essential apps.
Vision | To be the most accessible mobile charging network in Europe.
Values | We trust in freedom, simplicity and reliability.

Thanks to the recycling company Bebat, once our powerbanks have reached their full potential, they are broken down into separate components and used for new products and applications.

Name: Grupo Ambar Amaral
Description:
Somos um Grupo composto por 7 empresas de ramos diversificados. Dentre elas, temos: - Agropecuária (A3); - Condomínio Ambar; - Frigorífico de Peixes (Brazilian Fish); - Imobiliário (Loteamento Portal do Sol); - Indústria de Rações (Raguife); - Piscicultura  (3A) e - Raguife Transportes. Todas elas foram iniciadas através de muito trabalho e na determinação da família Ambar Amaral. 

Há pouco mais de 25 anos, o zootecnista Antônio Carlos Lopes do Amaral (in memoriam) deixou de trabalhar nas fazendas de gado do pai, em Santa Fé do Sul, município do interior paulista, distante 640 quilômetros da capital, e se mudou para Pontes e Lacerda, em Mato Grosso, a 460 quilômetros de Cuiabá. Entre os dois extremos – Santa Fé do Sul e Pontes e Lacerda – são quase 1.600 quilômetros e 20 horas de viagem por rodovia. 

Em Mato Grosso, Amaral fez a vida como pecuarista, também construiu uma família, casou-se com a cirurgiã-dentista, Sonia Ambar do Amaral e teve três filhos: Antonio Ramon, e os gêmeos, Guilherme e Felipe. Atualmente, Sonia e os filhos administram os negócios da família, agregando qualidade, sofisticação, e profissionalismo às atividades empresariais.
Location: Santa Fé do Sul, São Paulo
