Name: sparXcharge
Description:
WHO WE ARE
Founded in Q3 2023, SparXcharge is B2B & B2C service brand of NEZO ENERGY INDIA LLP, a Thiruvananthapuram headquartered startup with a mission to accelerate the mass adoption of electric vehicles by delivering sustainable DC & AC fast-charging solutions for EVs, which can be deployed anywhere, supporting EV30@30 campaign and INDIA NetZero 2070 sustainable goals.

Company was founded by a team of highly inspired young technocrats with 40+ years of cumulative experience in Energy Storage, Automobile, Sustainability, Information Technology, Manufacturing Industries & Power Electronics.

WHAT WE DO
Redefining EV charging in India, SparXcharge provides On-Demand, Convenience, Mobile DC & AC Fast Charging-as-a-Service (EV CaaS) in city and on highways, anywhere, anytime through our innovative and exclusive product “PulZe”. Our On-Demand Mobile Charging-as-a-Service (EV CaaS) will be safe, convenient and reliable.

We provide personally customized scheduled service for each individual customer as per their convenience, wish and demand. It will be provided in 3 ways namely; 1) charge at doorstep, 2) charge as you drive (top-up charging) and 3) charge at stationary (destination charging), with the use of a user-friendly mobile App, SparXev and WhatsApp API.

WE INNOVATE
Goodbye to the top 3 problems faced by any EV user viz. Range Anxiety, Lack of Charging Infrastructure and Charging time, our innovative product will have IOT and AI based features for the identification, traceability and real time data management system for various built-in components along with its seamless integration with charging management software.

PulZe has built-in Fast DC Charger powered by Off-Grid Battery Pack and On-Grid Power Supply, to dispense electric energy to electric vehicles for both Destination charging and Top-up charging Anytime, Anywhere EV user wants.

Name: Planet-score
Description:
L’alimentation représente un impact important sur l’environnement, et il est possible d’améliorer les choses, voire de contribuer positivement à la santé de la planète. Né en 2021 sous l'impulsion de la société civile, soutenu par un large collectif souhaitant agir concrètement (dont UFC-Que Choisir et de nombreuses ONG), Planet-score reflète la valeur environnementale des aliments selon une méthodologie scientifique, exigeante et indépendante qui intègre tous les aspects environnementaux, sans tabou et sans greenwashing. Planet-score donne aux citoyens et aux entreprises les clés pour devenir réellement acteur de la transition écologique de l’agriculture et de l’alimentation. En fournissant la transparence environnementale sur les aliments, Planet-score vous permet de contribuer au quotidien à lutter contre le déclin de la biodiversité, le changement climatique, la déforestation, les pollutions de l’eau et de l’air… 
Planet-score est le seul outil de transparence environnementale consommateur et d'écoconception totalement indépendant. La marque est détenue par un organisme d'intérêt général, dont la gouvernance est assurée par des scientifiques et experts, et des associations : pas d'entreprises, pas de filières, pas de syndicats, et une indépendance totale également vis-à-vis des forces et courants politiques. Un ADN unique, qui fait son succès en Europe et au-delà : Planet-score est le dispositif le plus déployé aujourd'hui en Europe et au-delà. Plus de 300 marques actuellement, plus de 120 millions d'emballages en circulation, et plus de 135.000 produits alimentaires étiquetés Planet-score sur l'application mobile gratuite d'UFC Que choisir Quel Produit.

> Providing an innovative array of transport solutions to meet urban challenges;
> Preserving the environment through a responsible company policy.

Desde o início dessa administração as rodovias SP075, SP127, SP280, SP300 e SPI 102/SP300, passam por constantes investimentos para mais conforto e segurança dos usuários. A concessionária está cumprindo o cronograma de investimentos e até o momento já foram investidos R$ 458,73 milhões em duplicação de estradas, implantação de sistema de ajuda ao usuário, passarelas, pontes, viadutos, dispositivos de retorno, recapeamento, construção de postos de fiscalização, equipamentos para o sistema de rodovia inteligente, recuperação de pistas, atendimento ao usuário, etc.

 O contrato de concessão tem vigência até ao ano de 2028, com investimentos previstos de R$ 1, 42 bilhão. Os recursos são provenientes de aporte dos acionistas da concessionária, receita de pedágio e financiamento junto às instituições financeiras.

 As evoluções sinalizam mais respeito à vida dos usuários que passam pelas cidades que compõem o lote sob concessão da Colinas: Boituva, Cabreúva, Campinas, Cerquilho, Indaiatuba, Itu, Itupeva, Jundiaí, Piracicaba, Porto Feliz, Rio Claro, Rio das Pedras, Salto, Saltinho, Sorocaba, Tatuí e Tiete

Name: TheLotter
Description:
TheLotter Group, established in 2002, serves as the leading lottery courier service and has built a stellar reputation among its customer base. TheLotter offers lottery services worldwide and through its operating entities holds licenses from the Malta Gaming Authority, Isle of Man, Swedish Gaming Authority, Australia’s Northern Territory Government, and the Mexican Ministry of the Interior.

In the United States, theLotter, operating as NJ Lotto LLC, has been vetted by the New Jersey Lottery and approved as a registered lottery courier in the State of New Jersey. In the State of New York, NJ Lotto LLC holds a Lottery Courier Service License issued by the New York Gaming Commission. In addition, theLotter offers its lottery courier services in Texas, Oregon, Minnesota, and Florida.

Name: Ridwell
Description: Ridwell is a service that inspires people to create a future without waste. Today, we make it easy to reuse and recycle more by identifying recyclable and reusable items that the city doesn't collect, picking them up from our customers' doorsteps, and matching them with local partners that can use them sustainably.

Name: SpaceGuru
Description:
Somos una baulera inteligente, la mejor forma de guardar todo eso que no usás. 

Nuestra solución es integral: 
 Cotizamos solo por el espacio que necesitás, así no pagás de más.
 Nos encargamos de la logística de retirar y trasladar lo que vas a guardar.
 Creamos un catálogo con fotos de tus cosas para que las gestiones desde tu celular.
 Desde nuestra app podés vender, donar, reciclar o pedir la devolución de tus objetos. 

 Tenemos una misión circular: creemos que es tiempo de que reutilizar y compartir para crear un futuro de menos cosas y más espacio, de menos ataduras y más libertad. 

 Ofrecemos un servicio especializado para tu empresa, una solución 360°: nos encargamos del inventario, almacenamiento y traslado de todo lo que necesites guardar. Somos una alianza estratégica, el soporte logístico que necesitás, y estamos a un clic de distancia. 

En 4 años logramos:
+80.000 objetos guardados de manera inteligente.
+64.000 ítems fotografiados y catalogados en nuestra app.
+5.000 usuarios únicos que confían en nuestro servicio.

Lo hacemos todo de manera fácil, segura y digital 

Conocé más en spaceguru.com

Name: ColourDrive
Description:
ColourDrive is an Innovative and customer centric firm that was Incorporated in the year 2014, by a group of professionals from IIT's ,NIT's and business executive from reputed b-schools who decided to aim for the highest standards of professionalism and utmost transparency in operations thus resulting in increased customer satisfaction levels, that was then unheard of in this unorganized industry.
Ever since then, Colourdrive has been one of the pioneers in Painting and Home decor service providers serving across all major cities of India like Bangalore, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Delhi, Indore etc reaping accolades for successfully delivering more than 5000+ residential, commercial and  industrial projects across PAN India.
Our team has been specialised in delivering customized  Interior painting, Exterior painting, False Ceiling , Wall fashions that includes Texture, stencils, Wallpapers and Cleaning solutions like Deep cleaning and Sanitization for all Apartments, Villas, Independent Bungalows and taking up many Commercial projects too.

Name: Emporium da Beleza - Franqueadora
Description:
Em 2005, a empresária Ana Paula de Freitas Ferro sente a necessidade das mulheres em ter um local onde conseguem realizar seus sonhos estéticos por meio de tecnologias inovadoras de alta performance com um preço justo.
A primeira unidade em Curitiba no bairro Água Verde foi inaugurada e o sucesso da democratização da beleza e o poder das mulheres é uma realidade.A família Emporium da Beleza cresce e em pouco tempo Curitiba ganha mais unidades, a região metropolitana de Curitiba recebe outra... o estado do Paraná fica pequeno e partimos para outros horizontes, Florianópolis e Balneário Camboriú. 
Em 2014 chegamos com a nossa 6ª unidade própria no bairro do Juvevê em Curitiba.Nosso sucesso precisava crescer,  uma vez que agora já sabíamos o que, porque e como fazer, então... resolvemos expandir para o Brasil, surgindo em 2018 o processo de formatação do negócio para o Franchising, permitindo assim que todas as brasileiras desfrutem o que tem de mais avançado e tecnológico no segmento de beleza e bem estar.

Name: COMPAÑÍA NACIONAL DE GAS CONGAS C.A.
Description:
Compañía Nacional de Gas CONGAS C.A.

Somos una empresa ecuatoriana dedicada al envasado, transporte y comercialización de Gas Licuado de Petróleo (GLP) dese 1976. La Matriz se encuentra ubicada en la ciudad de Quito, contamos con 5 centros de acopio, 3 plantas de almacenamiento y envasado de GLP. Estamos al servicio de todo el Ecuador para el suministro y abastecimiento a través de nuestros productos de GLP: doméstico, industrial, comercial, agroindustrial y servicio técnico.

Name: Happy End
Description:
Happy End est votre meilleur compagnon face à la mort et au deuil. Avec pédagogie et optimisme, nous vous aidons à : 

• Anticiper votre départ en rédigeant vos volontés et en les partageant facilement avec vos proches
• Préparer des obsèques à l’image du défunt
• Cheminer moins seul dans votre deuil

En fonction de vos besoins, nous vous apportons des ressources personnalisées (articles, témoignages, guides pratiques) et nous vous mettons en relation avec les bons professionnels ou associations. 

Expert de la mort et du deuil, Happy End propose aussi ses services aux professionnels : 

 • Nous formons vos équipes au sujet du deuil et à un meilleur accompagnement de la mort
• Nous vous aidons à valoriser vos services et vous démarquer de vos concurrents en communiquant sur ces sujets sensibles sur un ton dédramatisant et fédérateur.
• Nous organisons pour vos équipes/clients/souscripteurs des événements avec des experts pour informer et libérer la parole sur ces sujets sensibles

Name: Goodwill Industries of Kentucky
Description:
Goodwill Industries of Kentucky helps people with disabilities or other challenges achieve and maintain employment to gain a better quality of life. Founded in Louisville, KY in 1923, Goodwill has 66 retail stores throughout the state that provide opportunities for hands-on experience in customer service, cashiering, time management, and production/processing. 

Donations of clothing and household items are the fuel that keeps Goodwill's engine running; they generate revenue to support our 11 Opportunity Centers around the state, to support job preparation, training, and placement programs for people who face barriers to finding and maintaining employment.
